Neither can Clarke locate "the king of terrors" in either Testament; so, he takes a long sweep around his own left end and gives us Coverdale, Ovid, Sophocles, the Vulgate, and Virgil in hopes that he will get a "first in ten." But after five minutes of running in all four directions, Clarke is sacked for "demons" or a Persian king, or a Roman king, or---God knows what. This is the equivalent of "no gain," and the reader who has taken the time to read Clarke's notes (Ibid., p. 86) is in the same position he was in before the play was called.

5\. The [Pulpit Commentary ]{.class_3759}spotted "the bars of his strength" (Hebrew for vs. 13) but couldn't read the rest of the Book to find out what the ["bars"]{.class_3760} were. The ["bars"]{.class_3760} are the bars of Job 40:18---the bars of Satan Incarnate, but having called the ["Behemoth"]{.class_3760} of Job 40:18 a "hippopotamus" (see any commentary by any jackleg), how in creation could Rev. Rawlinson (the [Pulpit Commentary]{.class_3759}) exposit it properly in English or Hebrew? He couldn't. So he didn't.

6\. Heavenor, Kline, Bullinger, Peake, Duhm, Budde, Ley, Hitzig, and the [Septuagint ]{.class_3759}are up to their usual tricks, and of them, it may be said: ["I cannot find one wise man among you"]{.class_3760} (Job 17:10). They say that the ["king of terrors"]{.class_3760} (vs. 14) is ordinary dying---not DEATH (see Rev. 6:8). They say that verse 7 should have been "cause him to stumble." They say the "soles of his feet should be devoured" (vs. 13). They say "the last groaned for him" (vs. 21). They say "Make him piss over his feet" (vs. 11: [NEB]{.class_3759}). They say "magic herbs lie stewn about his tent" (vs. 15). They say "death's most loyal henchman" (vs. 13). They say "death gnaws at his splendor." That is, they say every cotton-pickin, thing they can say (or think or imagine) before they will believe ONE WORD of what God said. And in these matters (as we have said a score of times), the essays of Mao Tse-tung on Communism are just as "Scriptural" and just as "authoritative." Mao, at least, has 6,000,000 soldiers to back up his lying philosophy, and that is more than the Scholars Union ever had or ever will have. (All right, if you can't say "Amen!", then don't go around quoting 1 Thessalonians 2:13 like you thought you had enough grace to feed two billy goats---let alone "sheep.")

[]{#IMh58iSMTFKKU0J9qyaeHw1554.xhtml}

CHAPTER 19

19:1 Then Job answered and said,

2 How long will ye vex my soul, and break me in pieces with words?

3 These ten times have ye reproached me: ye are not ashamed that ye make yourselves strange to me.

4 And be it indeed that I have erred, mine error remaineth with myself.

5 If indeed ye will magnify yourselves against me, and plead against me my reproach:

6 Know now that God hath overthrown me, and hath compassed me with his net.

You may have noticed in the last four chapters that the conversations are getting hotter by the minute. The vilifying and name calling is increasing at a lively tempo, and by the time we get to Chapter 22, Job is calling his "friends" liars, mockers, and outright enemies; and they are calling him wicked and sinful.

"[How long will ye vex my soul, and break me in pieces with words?"]{.class_3760}(vs. 2). And that is what they are doing. It is one thing to preach the word of God from the pulpit until a sinner is broken down to a contrite heart and spirit, and it is another thing to sit around a bedridden saint and insult him by the hour.

"[These ten times have ye reproached me"]{.class_3760} (vs. 3). (Note the GENTILE number; not Issachar's son, in the Preface.) ["Ye are not ashamed that ye make yourselves strange to me"]{.class_3762} (vs. 3). The ten reproaches will be found in Job 4:5, 4:8, 5:4, 8:2, 8:6, 11:3, 15:2, 15:5, and 18:2, 4. Every one of them is a personal accusation or a personal insult that is not even couched in the general terms of a "third person singular."

"[Mine error remaineth with myself"]{.class_3760} (vs. 4). And this is a great truth of Romans 14:12 which many Christians have not learned. If Job had sinned against God and had earned his chastening, it was still a matter between him and God (1 John 1:9), not him and a "priest." Job knows that if he has sinned against God, it has not been something overt which ruined anyone else but [himself ]{.class_3761}(see Job 31 and remarks). If he had ["erred"]{.class_3762} (vs. 4), it would have to be an error of omission, speech, thought, or motive; and such errors are dealt with by God Himself, dealing directly with an individual. It is "God" who has overthrown Job (vs. 6), and if he has been caught in a net (vs. 6), at least he (Job) did not spread it for someone [else]{.class_3761}! This time the "net" is like a mullet net (a "throw net") which circles out into a compass, when it is thrown, by means of lead weights around the bottom of the net.

Clarke and the [Pulpit Commentary ]{.class_3759}agree that the number ["ten"]{.class_3760} (vs. 3) means "many times" instead of TEN (see 1:3 for this HPD), and they cite Genesis 31:7 and Numbers 14:22 as examples of this scholastic tradition (which has been passed down from one apostate to another). However, a close examination of the truth (instead of Adam Clarke and Rev. Rawlinson) reveals that the ["ten"]{.class_3760} in Genesis 31:7, 41 meant "TEN;" for right in verse 41 [two other figures ]{.class_3759}are given, and Laban does not correct [any of the three figures. ]{.class_3759}Ten is a Gentile number, not the "whole number" of "completeness" representing a "large amount" or any other godless, hellish, damnable, depraved sophistry invented by any Conservative, Evangelical, or Catholic scholar to destroy the authority of the word of God (Mark 7:7, 13). The "ten times" Israel tempted the Lord God are found in the following passages, and the word "MURMURING" has been carefully preserved in the infallible [English Text ]{.class_3759}of 1611, so as to correct any erroneous Hebrew, Greek, or Arabic texts which may differ.

1\. Exodus 15:24.

2\. Exodus 16:2.

3\. Exodus 16:7.

4\. Exodus 16:8.

5\. Exodus 16:7 (different Hebrew word!).

6\. Exodus 16:8 (different Hebrew word!).

7\. Exodus 16:9.

8\. Exodus 16:12.

9\. Exodus 17:3.

10\. Numbers 14:2.

The eleventh murmuring is found in Numbers 14:27.

19:7 Behold, I cry out of wrong, but I am not heard: I cry aloud, but there is no judgment.

8 He hath fenced up my way that I cannot pass, and he hath set darkness in my paths.

9 He hath stripped me of my glory, and taken the crown from my head.

10 He hath destroyed me on every side, and I am gone: and mine hope hath he removed like a tree.

11 He hath also kindled his wrath against me, and he counteth me unto him as one of his enemies.

12 His troops come together, and raise up their way against me, and encamp round about my tabernacle.

13 He hath put my brethren far from me, and mine acquaintance are verily estranged from me.

14 My kinsfolk have failed, and my familiar friends have forgotten me.

15 They that dwell in mine house, and my maids, count me for a stranger: I am an alien in their sight.

16 I called my servant, and he gave me no answer; I intreated him with my mouth.

17 My breath is strange to my wife, though I intreated for the children's sake of mine own body.

18 Yea, young children despise me; I arose, and they spake against me.

19 All my inward friends abhorred me: and they whom I loved are turned against me.

The passage not only deals with God's treatment of Job physically and economically, but [socially ]{.class_3759}(vs. 13--18). He now speaks of the reaction of his brethren, kinfolk, wife, servants, friends, and neighbors to his calamity. Verses 7--11 can be applied to every lost soul in hell at the time of this writing or at the time of the writing of Job. Verse 9 is a matchmate to the condition of Israel in the Tribulation (see Lam. 3), right before the Second Advent of Jesus Christ. Again, the Messianic references to the first coming of Christ are so apparent (compare vss. 13--15 with Psa. 31:11, 55:13 and 69:8) to the devout mind as to need no documentation. Still, Adam Clarke, Kline, Heavenor, Dummelow, and others miss it like a blind man walking through a red light.

Now, an unsaved man in Hell will [cry out ]{.class_3759}(vs. 7) for what he considers to be [wrong ]{.class_3759}(Gen. 4:13). He will NOT be [heard ]{.class_3759}(vs. 7) because his judgment is PAST (vs. 7), and the only judgment he is awaiting is the final appeal before going into the Lake of Fire (Rev. 20:15). The unsaved sinner in Hell is ["fenced up"]{.class_3760} (vs. 8) with gates and bars (Rev. 1:18; Jonah 2:6), and he is in [darkness ]{.class_3759}(Matt. 25:30). The passages in Job 29:3 and 23:17 all sound the same note. Once more, there is an overlay applying to Christ, because He bore our judgment and our sins (1 Pet. 2:24) and took what we should have gotten in Hell (Gal. 3:13); consequently, He cries ["out of wrong,"]{.class_3760} in darkness (Matt. 27:45): ["My God, my God why hast thou forsaken me?"]{.class_3760} (Matt. 27:46). Jesus Christ was counted as one of God's "enemies" (vs. 11), for He had to take the place of God's enemies (Rom. 5:10) to get us---we are the enemy--- back to God (2 Cor. 5:21). Ah, the unsearchable riches of the divinely preserved English. How profound are its "coincidences," and its "mistakes" past finding out.

And if those aren't enough Christ-exalting riches from God's gold mines, look at verse 9. The [crown ]{.class_3759}(vs. 9) belonged to Jesus Christ (Rev. 11:15, Luke 1:30--34), and He was "stripped of His glory" (John 19:24, Psa. 22:18) before He could wear a "crown of glory" on the ["throne of his glory"]{.class_3760} (Matt. 19:28). You see, the matter is exactly as we have stated it; the [Book of Job ]{.class_3759}is a picture of God's Son in humiliation, Israel in the Tribulation, an unsaved man in Hell, and revelation of the Antichrist, in addition to the moral and devotional material lying on the suface (see any Commentary by Greene, Ironsides, or Feinberg).

As Job approaches the climax of his pleas for sympathy (vs. 21) and his prayer to God (vs. 23), he describes his condition as one who is:

1\. Cut down and hauled off like a log (vs. 10).

2\. Set fire to and left to burn (vs. 11).

3\. Encamped against by an army (vs. 11--12).

His brothers and sisters (vs. 13) no longer come to see him; his casual friends (vs. 13) are estranged from him; his aunts, uncles, nephews, and nieces won't offer him any help; his close friends (vs. 19) have forgotten him (vs. 14); he is an alien to the people he employed (vs. 15--16), and his wife (vs. 17) will have no more to do with him than a rabid polecat (vs. 17).

19:20 My bone cleaveth to my skin and to my flesh, and I am escaped with the skin of my teeth.

21 Have pity upon me, have pity upon me, O ye my friends; for the hand of God hath touched me.

22 Why do ye persecute me as God, and are not satisfied with my flesh?

23 Oh that my words were now written! oh that they were printed in a book!

24 That they were graven with an iron pen and lead in the rock for ever!

25 For I know that my redeemer liveth, and that he shall stand at the latter day upon the earth:

26 And though after my skin worms destroy this body, yet in my flesh shall I see God:

27 Whom I shall see for myself, and mine eyes shall behold, and not another; though my reins be consumed within me.

28 But ye should say, why persecute we him, seeing the root of the matter is found in me?

29 Be ye afraid of the sword: for wrath bringeth the punishments of the sword, that ye may know there is a judgment.

Job is nothing but skin and bones (vs. 20), and he is only alive "by the skin of his teeth." Could any picture be more pitiful or more melodramatic? There is nothing like it in the Bible apart from a few passages in the Psalms which deal with the experiences of David's soul in adversity, and many of these passages are really Messianic Psalms (Psa. 22, 31, 55, 69, etc.) which point to the betrayal, crucifixion, and sufferings of Jesus Christ.

"[Have pity upon me, have pity upon me, O ye my friends"]{.class_3760} (vs. 21)!

The Lord Jesus Christ called them His "friends" not ten hours before "they all forsook him and fled" (John 15:15). ["For the hand of God hath touched me" ]{.class_3760}(vs. 21). And so, although it was the hand of [Satan ]{.class_3759}(2:6) that executed the baleful deeds, it was [God's hand]{.class_3759} that determined what could and could not be done (Gen. 50:20 and comments). Pity should be showed to the afflicted (Job 6:14). It is David's lack of pity (2 Sam. 12:6) that brings him under the scourge of God (2 Sam. 12--18) until he is greatly in need of some pity himself (2 Sam. 18:33). Job no more got this pity from his friends than the Lord Jesus did in Psalm 69:20, even though God (Psa. 103:13) is supposed to have "pity" on His children.

"[Why do ye persecute me as God, and are not satisfied with my flesh"]{.class_3760} (vs. 22). Hasn't God done enough to him? Do you have to add to it? What do you want; "vengeance" or retribution? If the object of your jealousy or hatred has lost his family, his friends, his money, his property, his goods, his testimony, his reputation, his health, and his sleep, what more do you want---you sadistic pervert---his [soul?]{.class_3761} Well, that is what Satan is out to get (Rev. 12:10), and if he can damn you, he will do it. You are not playing "ring-around-the-rosey" when you attempt to live for God and stand for His word. You are entering the "arena of Faith" (citing Erich Sauer and Watchman Nee), and mark it down: if the Devil could get permission to do to you what he did to Job, he would put you on the ash heap with Job TONIGHT. You don't joke about Satan, not if you have enough sense to breathe air.

Here is Rachel Baum (1921--1944). Rachel was arrested in 1943 and sent to the concentration camp at Auschwitz, Poland. First they murdered her father, and then they took her mother (Malka Baum) and led her to the shooting pit between a cordon of police dogs and SS men. There Malka Baum was shot through the back of the head with a .25 caliber pistol (5 mill.) and then shoved into a trench containing the burning bodies of 500--1,000 other victims. Rachel was then transferred to Birkenau where she began to organize the women prisoners into a resistance movement. On October 26, 1944, an abortive revolution was started by some of the prisoners before the partisans outside the camp could get ready. The "sonderkommandos" who had started the revolt were butchered, and then inquiry was made to find out where they had gotten their weapons and explosives. Rachel's number finally came up because the SS men had torn the bones out of the sockets of nearly eighty women until one of them screamed out Rachel's name. In twenty-four hours they had Rachel and the other four "ring leaders" of the resistance; these five women were stripped naked (in the winter) and whipped up and down a line of 5,000 men twice a day, at roll call, for two days. Two of them died from the cold and lashings. The three remaining women had their hands crushed by a vise before they were brought out for the next day's whipping. On the fourth day Rachel was the only one left. She had to be dragged out to the roll call because her feet had been broken. She still survived six days, and on the sixth day they carried her out to a gallows and hung her.

"[Why do you persecute me as God"]{.class_3760} (vs. 22).

The word "Job" means "one persecuted," and no man who read Revelation 12:4--5 and 13 could miss the import of the name. [Israel ]{.class_3759}has been, and will be, the special object of Satan's wrath until Revelation 20:8--9 is over.

Here is an Israelite named Langner. He was the son of the owner of a small shoe store in Czestochowa. He was caught by the Treblinka SS men (1944) while slipping a wad of bank notes into his pocket; he did this while sorting out a pile of clothes taken from dead Jews. They hung Langner up naked by his feet on a ten foot gallows. Then all of the prisoners of Treblinka were assembled in the sorting square in front of the gallows---they had roll call there twice a day---to watch Langner hanging there by his feet, while a Ukranian guard whipped him back and forth with a horsewhip, about once every fifteen seconds. Langner's Jewish friends saw him hanging there in the morning and hanging there at night. All day long, from 6 a.m. to 6 p.m., they could hear his cries and groans while they worked. He called for his mother all afternoon; he begged for them to kill him all morning. When they finally beat his brains out with a rifle butt, he was nothing more than a flayed animal with huge shreds of skin hanging down over his stomach, chest, and face. It took them twelve hours to whip him to death, but at the end of that time Langner---a shoe salesman---was a mutilated, torn mass of raw flesh.

"[Have pity upon me, have pity upon me, O ye my friends"]{.class_3760} (vs. 21)!

Wouldn't you think that it would be enough punishment for a man to gas his wife and children, take his clothes and money from him, coop him up in a barracks with no heat (in below zero temperatures), force him to work a twelve hour day on less than 300 calories a day, shoot his brother in front of his eyes, and then steal all of his mail and supplies? No, it was not enough. Herr Somner (Buchenwald, 1942--1944) would still tie some of the wretches to a hot radiator till they passed out, and then he would immerse their testicles, alternately, into hot water and iodine and back into ice water till the skin peeled off.

And don't you think for a minute that we are talking from an "insuler" point of view about isolated cases where [German ]{.class_3761}sadism had reached an extreme. [Foxe's Book of Martyrs ]{.class_3761}is filled with material like this, and the cases are documented into the thousands. If every POW could be released right now from every foreign country where he has been held captive, you would hear the same kind of stories repeated and repeated and repeated. Torture, sadism, bestiality, and perversion are not "Germanic." They are part of man's depraved nature; they are as old as Cain and Abel, and they will yet blossom into their full glory (Rev. 6--16) in the future under the leadership of the HRS, UNESCO, the CFR, the Illuminati, and "The People's Party." Torture and cannibalism have been on the increase since 1950, and the fool who is stupid enough to believe in a theory of moral evolution has to do it in the face of so many "scientific" facts concerning degeneration, that one can only come to the conclusion that Evolution is a [religion;]{.class_3761} it must be accepted by blind faith without ANY evidence whatsoever.

When Maynard Shipley (President of the Science League of America) says that scientists the world over regard the processes of evolution as a "FACT," he is referring to a "GOSPEL" (see Prof. J. A. Thompson, cited on p. 14 of Hooper's work, [Does Science Support Evolution?]{.class_3759}), and this "gospel" has less historical evidence behind it than the resurrection of Jesus Christ or the conversion of Paul. Haeckel admitted that the theory of spontaneous generation cannot be proved (p. 24); David S. Jordan (President, Stanford University) said that there is no case of spontaneous generation known; and Professor Fleischmann (Zoologist, Erlangen) stated that the Darwinian theory has not a [single fact ]{.class_3759}to confirm it. Professor Fleischmann correctly states the matter when he says that the evolutionary theory, as found in American school textbooks, is "the product of the imagination." When Chapman and Miller ([Evolution Has Failed]{.class_3759}, p. 10) state that evolution is the result of a "semi-barbarian imagination" and the "playful guess of SAVAGE MEN," they are stating it exactly.

The barbarian savage will be the leading man in history from 1976--1998.

Man is a wreck; he began lower than the angels (Psa. 8:5), and he is now approaching the level of the animals (Ecc. 3:18).

Professor William Bateson (British scientist) said (after forty years of research) that no evidence has even been discovered to verify Darwin's genesis of the species. Every one of Darwin's theories is contradicted by FACT, according to Prof. L. T. More ([The Dogma of Evolution]{.class_3759}), and "natural selection" and "acquired characteristics" are about as "factual" as Moroni's golden plates (see Wismann, A. B. Wallace, E. R. Lankester, and D. M. Panton, plus the work on Darwinism Today, by Vernon Kellogg).

If you were Job's enemy, you could have afforded yourself the luxury of sympathizing with him, but, instead, his friends go right on with the accusation (Job 20:5, 11, 29; 22:3, 6, 7, 19, etc.). ["Oh that my words were now written"]{.class_3760} (vs. 23). ["Oh that they were printed in a book"]{.class_3760} (vs. 23). So, without Job knowing anything about it, God writes them down and then has them printed in His book. Job's words are ["graven with an iron pen and lead in the rock for ever"]{.class_3760} (vs. 24), for when the heavens and earth have melted with a fervent heat (2 Pet. 3:8--4), Job's words will still be there (Matt. 24:35)! We-e-e-e- l-l-l-l Gloreee!

But at the time Job says these words, the arch of the rainbow bridge has collapsed, the pot of gold has rusted, and his "castles in Spain" have caved in from termites. "This old house" (to cite Stu Hamblin) is still an earthen vessel, and no matter how many times we redecorate it and patch it and repair it, it still falls apart one piece at a time.

I led a sixty-four-year-old man to Christ one time in the Baptist Hospital, Pensacola, Florida. Of his four children only one was saved. The family had gathered downstairs to await his death, and when the one saved son requested a minister, the rest of the family rose up in arms against him: "He will cause a heart attack!" "Those holy rollers will give daddy a relapse!" "If you excite him now, it will kill him!" (You know, same old routine. They let you go to Hell for sixty-four years and let you destroy your body with liquor and tobacco, and then they get real "concerned" and upset about your "welfare" twenty-four hours before the undertaker gets you. Same old crap.) But the saved son got me in, even though the man was in the Intensive Care unit. We talked about twelve minutes. He admitted he was a sinner, he admitted he had wasted his life, he admitted that he was ruined for time and eternity, and in awhile he took my hand on an invitation to receive Christ; he prayed "the sinner's prayer" and asked Jesus Christ to save his soul. The man lived about six weeks after that, and just before he died his wife said to his family: "You know, I know something happened to him up there in the hospital; he is a different man altogether!"

Yes, he was, but they [buried him]{.class_3759}. Our glory is "by and by," and no matter how the world mocks us and scorns us for not following Darwin and Marx (John 14:1--3), we know that the answer is not down here: It is up THERE (Eph. 1:18).

In 1955, I was talking with a backslidden Christian in a hospital in Atlanta, Georgia. He said that he had been living for the Devil, so God had finally caught up with him. He also said that when he got out of that hospital he was going to live for God. I believed him. (You'd better believe them when they talk that way. If God has already scourged your brother in Christ, you'd better keep your hands off him.) This young man had been standing on the tracks in the railroad yard, working on the back end of a coal car. In the noise of the locomotives and freight cars, moving on the side lines and shuttle tracks, he didn't hear a box car rolling down the track behind him. It coupled him, right through the middle of his body, to the coal car in front of him; he screamed and passed out. Someone heard him and got him down and off into an Emergency Room. When he left that hospital, his left leg was gone, his left hip was gone, and part of his lower stomach was missing. And I'll tell you something, Christian; you'd better keep your mouth shut about any brother or sister in Christ with whom God has dealt in this manner. Do not play Eliphaz, Zophar, and Bildad just because God hasn't given you [your ]{.class_3759}desserts.

I went up into the Baptist Hospital (Pensacola, Fla.) one time to talk to an old friend of mine. He was an old sinner from Andalusia, Alabama, named "Kato." Kato had had his intestines cut in two during a knife fight years ago, and when I met him first (1953), he was lingering between life and death with a bad case of peritonitis. He finally received the Lord Jesus Christ as his Saviour, after I pointed out to him that the scar on his slit belly (the last knife fight) and the scar on his chest (another knife fight) and the scar on his forehead (shrapnel in Korea) were God's warnings to him that his time was about up. He got saved, straightened up his life for awhile, and then, with no one to ground him in the word and teach the word to him (Acts 20:32), he went "back to the dogs." When I visited him in Pensacola, nearly nine years later, he was back in the hospital; this time someone had blown the right side of his face off with a shot gun during a brawl in a liquor joint.

I came up to Kato and smiled at him and said, "Do you remember me?"

"No," he said, "I don't know you."

"Well," I said, "I know you. How are you doing?"

"Oh, pretty good."

"Don't look so good. Looks like sombody 'bout finished you off."

"Well yea (laughing), I lost a little of my jaw and cheek there, and some of my sinuses. Who are you anyway?"

I ignored it and went on: "How's that scar doin' down under that sheet, that one on your chest where you got cut when you were about fifteen years old?"

Kato's face paled and he said, "H-h-how did you know about [that]{.class_3759}?"

"And how's that scar on your belly where Teal sliced you open?"

"Wwh-h-ho-o are you?" he blurted, as he rose up in bed.

"And if you'd take that bandage off your forehead," I said, "you probably still got the shrapnel scar there, don't you?

Kato was now white in the face and panting. "WWHH-O-O-are you?! [Where are you from!?"]{.class_3759}

Then I told him.

Well, Kato relaxed and began to chuckle again and kid around. And the last thing he said to me was, "Preacher, I ain't been livin' right, but when I get out of here I'm going back to church."

Well, I hope he did. And I hope to God when he got there that God had some Bible believing man in the pulpit who knew about life and death and wasn't afraid to teach and preach that old English 66 ([AV]{.class_3759}, 1611) just as straight and as hard as a German 88. The last thing that American "Teals" and "Katos" need is some of you mealy-mouthed, cultured, sophisticated, educated asses throwing Greek and Hebrew around like you thought you had good sense.

"[For I know that my redeemer liveth"]{.class_3760} (vs. 25). And this time, the reference is so obvious that ninety percent of the major commentators find it---will miracles never cease! However, when they continue into ["that he shall stand at the latter day upon the earth"]{.class_3762} and on into ["yet in my flesh shall I see God"]{.class_3762} (vss. 25--26), they break down for the "jillionth" time all over the highway, with kingpins, axles, valves, pistons, carburetors, nuts, bolts, bulbs, fuses, fan belts, hub caps, and drive shafts flying in every direction. And before we call out the police department and the ambulances to help clean all the litter and debris off of the Biblical "interstate," let us see what God the Holy Ghost has preserved for our edification and instruction.

1\. The Redeemer [will ]{.class_3759}be visible when He comes (vs. 27).

2\. The Redeemer [will ]{.class_3759}come to this earth and land on it (vs. 25).

3\. The Redeemer [has ]{.class_3759}"accidently" been associated with written words (vs. 23), a BOOK (vs. 23), and the ROCK (vs. 24); and if that were not enough, the Redeemer's written words in His Book will abide ["for ever"]{.class_3760} (vs. 24).

4\. The Redeemer is alive at the time that Job complains (vs. 25).

5\. The Redemer is able to resurrect a man's dead body and put it back together again (vs. 26).

It is immaterial whether or not Job realized the doctrinal import of all that he says, the point is that he [says ]{.class_3759}it, and it is [recorded]{.class_3759}, and it [works out ]{.class_3759}as it is recorded. So---! So, the first thing the dead orthodox apostates must do is give the Biblical text a black eye: no sooner thought than executed.

A. [RSV ]{.class_3759}(1952): Job is not going to be "in his flesh" (vs. 26) at the resurrection; he is going to be in a [spiritual body ]{.class_3759}OUTSIDE his flesh. Having inserted this Gnostic interpolation into the Bible, according to the best dictums of Philo, Valentius, Marcion and Origen, some of the Fundamentalists begin to holler about the [RSV ]{.class_3759}and the NCCC like they thought those outfits were "Liberals." But "WITHOUT my flesh," my dear Fundamental buffoon, is the reading of the [American Standard Version ]{.class_3759}(1901) recommended in the [Sword of the Lord]{.class_3759}, with Jack Hyles and Robert Sumner both backing John R. Rice up. People who live in glass houses shouldn't throw stones. Fundamentalists who think they are smart enough to correct God Almighty had better keep their cheap, lying, compromising, backslidden mouths SHUT when talking about the [RSV ]{.class_3759}and the NCCC. Hypocrisy is not becoming to a man who blabbers about "God-breathed originals." The [RSV ]{.class_3759}reading of the National Council of Churches was recommended for fifty years before it was printed: It was recommended by Fundamentalists and Conservatives in the [ASV ]{.class_3759}of 1901. Hypocrites of a forked tongue spit poison together.

B. But the [ASV ]{.class_3759}(1901) and the [RSV ]{.class_3759}(1952) are not the only combination of Conservatives and Liberals to make an ecumenical attack on the Holy Spirit. The [Septuagint ]{.class_3759}has translated ["mine eyes shall behold"]{.class_3760} (vs. 27) to "mine eye HAS seen" putting the whole verse in the past tense, and then, since Job had NOT seen God literally, the verse was reworded to mean Job saw God inside himself. (Oh, yeah baby! We got the grimmies. Like man, one geek a minute.) This is the [Septuagint ]{.class_3759}which the first century Christians used? Sure kid, we understand. Try some paregoric.

C. The [NEB ]{.class_3759}(C. H. Dodd) says, "standing at my side," for ["in my flesh,"]{.class_3760} and the ["Living" Bible]{.class_3759} (Taylor) has muffled through the verse with "then he will be on my side." Anything but the truth. However, the [Pulpit Commentary ]{.class_3759}assures us that the literal translation of the Hebrew ("mibsari") means "FROM my flesh." But if this is so, how did you twist it into "without my flesh" and "on my side" and "at my side," etc., etc.? Why did you appeal to literal rendering to rid yourself of the bodily resurrection, and then, when the literal rendering didn't go as far as you wanted it to go, [you added your own interpretation?]{.class_3759} This is the "consistent translating," is it, that we heard so much about when you hypocrites were belly-aching about "ecclesia" and "baptizo" in the New Testament? Yes, you are the "qualified, recognized meatheads," without a doubt.

D. Williams: "Who I shall see ON MY SIDE" Moffatt: "Yearn to see Him ON MY SIDE." Dummelow: "Gaze on as for me." And so on and on and on and on till Hell freezes over and Michael the Archangel expires. You cannot cure a fool of his folly though you bray him with a pestle in mortar (Prov. 27:22), and the faculty members of many modern Christian schools (take forty at random and you won't miss more than two of them) are so far off the deep end in their mania for altering the word of God that "lunatic fringe" would be the proper placement of their exegesis.

For once, Jamieson, Fausset, and Brown almost get the truth, but at the last minute Fausset resorts to "FROM my flesh" instead of "IN my flesh."

Now, before the Bible believer abandons the living words of the living God for these fickle faddists who can do nothing but "hear or tell something new" (Acts 17:21), let's just go to pages 481--485 of [The Hebrew and Chaldean Lexicon ]{.class_3759}and read five pages of notes on the Hebrew prepositional prefix "MIN." And while doing this, let us never forget that if we are half as "godly" as the ungodly, unethical rascals who had a reputation for being "godly" (the last ten revision committees), we would naturally choose a [God-honoring ]{.class_3759}meaning for a Biblical word if a choice of meaning came up: AMEN? (It's awfully quiet out there!)

a\. Part of my flesh, among my flesh, or out of my flesh (p. 481).

b\. Some of my flesh, some part of my flesh, even one of my flesh (p. 482).

c\. Going out of my flesh, from out of my flesh, on account of my flesh (p. 482).

d\. Because of my flesh, according to my flesh, away from my flesh (p. 483).

e\. Far off from my flesh, near my flesh, separated from my flesh (p. 483).

f\. Chose out of my flesh, because of my flesh, so that my flesh (p. 484).

(Does this give you any idea of the Mickey Mouse type of scholarship that is going on in the New Testament when someone like Zodhiates, Sanford LaSor, Wuest, or any Church of Christ elder or Jehovah Witness is hollering about "eis" in Acts 2:38? Gnat strainers of a feather "flea" together.)

Now, to locate one out of [eighteen ]{.class_3759}possible translations, what better lexicon could we have at our disposal than the [context ]{.class_3759}of Job's statement, right where he is speaking it?! Observe: ["Whom I shall see for myself, and mine eyes shall behold, and not another"]{.class_3760} (vs. 27). The words ["yet"]{.class_3760} (vs. 26) and ["though"]{.class_3760} are plainly set in apposition to the positive statements. The meaning is clear: "Even THOUGH my reins are consumed within me (vs. 27), I'm going to see God with my eyes, and even though worms eat up my body (vs. 26), MY FLESH shall see God"!

Therefore, the farthest you could possibly go toward the Liberal private interpretation would be "Yet from WITHIN my flesh\...." So the [AV ]{.class_3759}translators simply gave the Lord God the benefit of a doubt and wrote, ["yet in my flesh."]{.class_3760} Since none of the translators of the [ASV ]{.class_3759}or [NASV ]{.class_3759}ever gave God the benefit of the doubt, He has sacked (and will continue to sack) their work no matter if 50,000 of them agree to promote it, recommend it, and use it in the classroom.

The thing that threw Jamieson, Fausset, and Brown was Fausset's original work (p. 47). Fausset never believed the passages in 1 Corinthians 15; Revelation 11, 20--22; and John 11 anymore than Calvin did. These passages applied to the resurrection of NATURAL BODIES (see Lazarus, Dorcas, Jairus' daughter, Jonah, etc.). Job's flesh will be [his own flesh ]{.class_3761}at the resurrection (["my flesh"]{.class_3762}), even though [your ]{.class_3761}flesh will be the glorified spiritual body of 1 Corinthians 15. That is, what ANY Hebrew lexicon cannot clear up, with the aid of eighteen centuries of Conservative "scholarship," is a simple pushover for a [King James 1611 Authorized Version.]{.class_3761}

"[But ye should say"]{.class_3760} (vs. 28). Job's three buddies should say, "The trouble is probably with ME, not Job!" ["Be ye afraid of the sword"]{.class_3762} (vs. 29) because he who wields the sword (Rom. 13:4) is a ["minister of God"]{.class_3762} (Rom. 13:4) to execute vengeance: ["that ye may know there is a judgment" ]{.class_3762}(vs. 29).

The wrecking crew (98 percent of the commentators and revisors) cannot leave the chapter without saying of verse 17: "This translation is scarcely tenable" (the [Pulpit Commentary]{.class_3759}, p. 321); instead, we are to translate as follows; 'I am loathsome to the children of my mother's womb.'" Having made this authoritative, dogmatic, infallible decree, the committee of 1901 ([ASV]{.class_3759}) says, "All Hail the power of Rawlinson's name. Let angels prostrate fall. Correct the Bible with his conjecture and crown scholarship Lord of All!" The ruinious [ASV ]{.class_3759}of 1901 (used by John R. Rice to correct the [King James Bible]{.class_3759}--- see [Sword of the Lord]{.class_3759}, Oct. 10, 1975) immediately adopts Rawlinson's suggestion just like they thought it has "parachuted down out of heaven from God" and was, therefore, "verbally inspired." There is just one little problem: The Hebrew texts all read "beteni" (Beth, Teth, Nun, Yod)---["mine own body."]{.class_3760}

But don't you ever think that just because the Hebrew text says ["mine own body"]{.class_3760} that the "recognized" Hebrew scholars will abide by it, if it happens to match the [AV]{.class_3759}. The trick in this business (see [The Monarch of the Books]{.class_3759}) is to get rid of the [King James ]{.class_3759}text by ANY means, fair or foul. When Christian educators went off the deep-end and began to sit in judgment on the Bible, they followed these blind leaders of the blind until now some of these deluded idiots actually think that the [AV ]{.class_3759}must always abide by the Hebrew and Greek texts; and where it doesn't, it is wrong, and where it DOES, it is wrong. (And imagine John R. Rice talking about "hell-raising nuts." Tsk, tsk, kiddies, some of us couldn't get on the same race track with his crowd when it comes to "nutty.")

The stumbling, bungling, blind, blithering, staggering Alexandrians translate "the sons of my concubines" ([Septuagint]{.class_3759}), when Job [never had ]{.class_3759}any concubines. The [NEB ]{.class_3759}backs off with "family"---which is no translation of any Hebrew text; Kenneth Taylor alters the Hebrew word for ["son"]{.class_3760} ("benay") to "brothers," while still professing to be "paraphrasing" the Bible. These "brothers" are the "close family intimate," according to Kline (p. 476), while Heavenor (p. 432) just generalizes the list (vss. 13--17) and pretends the Hebrew text wasn't there. Dummelow picks up Rawlinson's dead cat by the tail, again, and tells us that ["body"]{.class_3760} should have been "womb" and "mother's" should have been added to the verse. Jamieson, Fausset, and Brown also adopt this conjecture. Adam Clarke and Maurer at least try to find a way out. Maurer suggests "grandchildren," which is a perfectly legitimate inference, but Clarke says simply that Job was appealing to his wife (vs. 17) on the basis of the fact that the two of them had raised the children together, and this last conjecture is much more reasonable and much more Scriptural than any of the manipulations of the text by Origen, Eusebius, Monser, Zenos, Terry, Robertson, Price, Sampey, Peake, Duhm, Budde, Dodd, Taylor, Fausset, or Brown.

And before you throw Adam Clarke out of court this time (for agreeing with the Received Text), why don't you spend a little time dealing with couples who have "broken up" and then have been united over a casket? I think you will be surprised to see how a little [practical experience in LIFE ]{.class_3759}will solve many of the exegetical and theological problems that the Scholar's Union have such a tough time with. Did you ever hear a divorced woman pleading with an "ex" when they stood side by side at a little white casket? Well, why don't you reserve comment on the [AV ]{.class_3759}text of Job 19:17 until you have experienced enough [living ]{.class_3759}to know that the [AV ]{.class_3759}text is right and one hundred percent of the commentators who disagree with it are LYING.

No sooner has Adam Clarke justified the [Authorized Text ]{.class_3759}than he turns around completely backwards and attacks it. This is done to "stay in good" (see any issue of the [Sword of the Lord ]{.class_3759}dealing with Christian scholarship) with both camps---the Holy Spirit and Christian Education. According to Clarke, the translators of the AV have made a "strange mistake" (p. 90) when they wrote[ "printed"]{.class_3760} in verse 23 instead of "traced out." (Ah yes! but haven't we heard this blarney before. Remember that ["Jesus"]{.class_3760} should have been "Joshua" in Acts 7:45? Remember how ["Easter"]{.class_3760} should have been "the Passover" in Acts 12:4? And who can forget that ["churches"]{.class_3760} should have been "temples" in Acts 19:37? And wasn't that an HPD in Luke 1:9 where Nestle's text had to be translated as the [King James Version ]{.class_3759}even where the Greek verb didn't match either translation? And who can forget little Bobbie Sumner calling the Holy Bible's version of Luke 1:3 \[[AV]{.class_3759}\] a "monstrous blunder"? Ah yes, we can count on you "gassers" for "light from the original" every time, can't we?)

Adam Clarke is extremely concerned about "superficial readers." (Ah yes. Here we go again. We Bible believers are not as "deep" as you linguistic judheads.) Clarke imagines that the art of printing did not exist in Job's time as it was not in existence until the "fifteenth century of the Christian era." Well, a man might think that if [he ]{.class_3759}was extremely superficial. However, if a man were not "superficial," he might have found out that printing was a highly developed Chinese art before 1000 B.C., and if he was even less "superficial," he might even find that Webster's definition of "PRINT" is a "mark made by pressure, something stamped with an impression." Coins were "printed" (Matt. 22:20) long before the term "Christian era" was used. It is always a good idea when dealing with superficial scholars like Clarke and the [ASV ]{.class_3759}committee ("inscribed"), the [Septuagint ]{.class_3759}("recorded"), Dummelow ("inscribed"), Fausset ("engraven"), Kline ("written"), and---take a number from one to a thousand; you won't bat less than .900---to take for granted at the start that the prejudices against the Bible will affect about 99.99999 percent of their works.

Job alludes to three types of "printing": Words [printed ]{.class_3759}on a piece of paper by pen and ink (vs. 23), words [engraven on a rock ]{.class_3759}with an iron tool like a chisel (vs. 24), and words engraven into soft lead and then mounted on (or in) a rock (vs. 24). The lengthy expositions about certain manners of writing being "unknown" in Job's day (see any major commentator) are to be taken with a ton of salt. One must never forget how the silly [ASV ]{.class_3759}committee of 1901 adopted the Modernist's translation of Judges 5:14 on the grounds that ["the pen"]{.class_3760} could not have been used at that time (1400 B.C.). This ridiculous corruption still stands in the [ASV ]{.class_3759}of 1901, although it has long since been proven that "pens" were in use more than 500 years before Judges chapter 5 took place. But such are the fantasies, follies, and fanaticism of the lunatic fringe of Christian education; it is caused by the educator's desire to gain a reputation for "scholarship" with the UNGODLY. One dud per minute with three fizzles in between.

Before stepping out of Chapter 19 into Chapter 20, Adam Clarke takes one more slap at the Bible that led him to Christ and gave him his lifework. Clark says ["me"]{.class_3760} (vs. 28) should be "him." The authority for this alteration (Heb: "bi" altered to "bo") was the Old Testament critical authorities Kennicott and DeRossi who, by the way, will match Westcott and Hort's approach to the New Testament. Dummelow also buys this and suggests the alteration also. However, the Masoretic Text of the Protestant Reformation, still used by orthodox Jews the world over, says ["me."]{.class_3760} (Notice this same flimflam in Zechariah 12:10 where the Liberal has altered "me" to "him," so as to rid you of the Deity of the Lord Jesus Christ. Evidently the one syllable words in the [AV ]{.class_3759}are a great deal more important than John R. Rice, Archer Weiniger, Cleason Archer, John Linton, Spiros Zodhiates, Wedge, Munts, Culbertson, Anderson, Coder, Mitchell, Johnston, and Reuben Olson think they are. If you want to see a real Comedy Hour, you should watch Laird Harris, Guassen, or John Rice, trying to prove verbal inspiration for the WORDS of the Bible by using the WORDS of the [King James Text ]{.class_3759}and then denying that these words [they just used ]{.class_3759}were inspired. Every believer should obtain a copy of the correspondence between Rice and Evans (May, 1973) on "inspiration." It is available from Box 442, Herkimer, N. Y. 13350. That is about the nearest thing you'll see, this side of glory, to a battle between a Chameleon and a King Snake.)

Well, Job must stop for breath; he is panting and crying, and his last few words (vss. 28--29) are an anti-climax. He is lapsing back into silence again.

[]{#IMh58iSMTFKKU0J9qyaeHw1684.xhtml}

CHAPTER 20

20:1 Then answered Zophar the Naamathite, and said,

2 Therefore do my thoughts cause me to answer, and for this I make haste.

3 I haved heard the check of my reproach, and the spirit of my understanding causeth me to answer.

4 Knowest thou not this of old, since man was placed upon earth,

5 That the triumphing of the wicked is short, and the joy of the hypocrite but for a moment?

The first five verses introduce us to the main theme of the chapter; it is "the wicked" again (see the remarks under 15:20--35). All that follows refers doctrinally to the Antichrist, practically to any wicked man, and historically, the verses are being aimed at Job whether they strike "on target" or not. ["Therefore"]{.class_3760} (vs. 2) shows that Zophar has been gobbling up Job's discourse like a dog eating Red Heart on a "commercial." The ["therefore"]{.class_3760} refers to Job's warning about a ["judgment"]{.class_3760} (19:29). That is, Zophar is saying, "Sure Job, we know there is a judgment, and that is exactly why I've got to get this off my chest; THEREFORE\...."

"[I have heard the check of my reproach"]{.class_3760} (vs. 3). It could mean: "I heard you put a body check (hockey term) on the reproach I just reproached you with in Chapter 11." But if the ["my"]{.class_3762} refers to something aimed at Zophar, then it is "I have heard what you aimed at me, just then, in order to stop me (["check,"]{.class_3762} as in "checkmate"), and I'm going to answer." The latter meaning is a little better in view of ["the spirit of my understanding causeth me to answer"]{.class_3762} (vs. 3). (Fletcher's [Checks ]{.class_3761}was a book written to refute the Calvinistic position of the Reformers, as taught by Watson, Gill, and Dodd---the Puritan writers. Anyone bothered with the "TULIP" of Ultra-Calvinism (Pink, Shelton, Gilpin, Barnard, [The Baptist Examiner]{.class_3761}, etc.) should obtain a copy of Fletcher's [Checks ]{.class_3761}and see what the other side of the Bible looks like.)

"[Since man was placed upon earth"]{.class_3760} (vs. 4). The word for ["man"]{.class_3762} in Hebrew is old Adam himself, pointing out for the "umpteenth time" that the characters in the Book of Job are not living in post-Mosaic times, let alone post-Davidic times. Furthermore, the "wicked" and the "hypocrite" of verse 5 are about to take us right into Isaiah 14:10--15 again, where we are dealing with Revelation 12:1--10 and 2 Thessalonians 2. After all, the main subject of the Bible is the Second Coming of Christ, and the main theme of the Bible is AUTHORITY---a throne (Isa. 14:13 and 9:6). The Book of Job has more material in it on the Second Coming than the book of the Acts of the Apostles or the book of Hebrews combined. (Verse 5 should be compared with Job 8:13 and 27:8.)

There is no way to make a break in the chapter logically. The entire discourse (see Job 15:20--35) is one unremitting, merciless refrain: God's judgments on a sinful man, in this life and hereafter.

20:6 Though his excellency mount up to the heavens, and his head reach unto the clouds;

7 Yet he shall perish for ever like his own dung: they which have seen him shall say, Where is he?

8 He shall fly away as a dream, and shall not be found: yea, he shall be chased away as a vision of the night.

9 The eye also which saw him shall see him no more; neither shall his place any more behold him.

10 His children shall seek to please the poor, and his hands shall restore their goods.

11 His bones are full of the sin of his youth, which shall lie down with him in the dust.

12 Though wickedness be sweet in his mouth, though he hide it under his tongue;

13 Though he spare it, and forsake it not; but keep it still within his mouth:

14 Yet his meat in his bowels is turned, it is the gall of asps within him.

15 He hath swallowed down riches, and he shall vomit them up again: God shall cast them out of his belly.

16 He shall suck the poison of asp: the viper's tongue shall slay him.

17 He shall not see the rivers, the floods, the brooks of honey and butter.

18 That which he laboured for shall he restore, and shall not swallow it down: according to his substance shall the restitution be, and he shall not rejoice therein.

19 Because he hath oppressed and hath forsaken the poor; because he hath violently taken away an house which he builded not;

20 Surely he shall not feel quietness in his belly, he shall not save of that which he desired.

21 There shall none of his meat be left; therefore shall no man look for his goods.

22 In the fulness of his sufficiency he shall be in straits: every hand of the wicked shall come upon him.

23 When he is about to fill his belly, God shall cast the fury of his wrath upon him, and shall rain it upon him while he is eating.

24 He shall flee from the iron weapon, and the bow of steel shall strike him through.

25 It is drawn, and cometh out of the body; yea, the glittering sword cometh out of his gall: terrors are upon him.

26 All darkness shall be hid in his secret places: a fire not blown shall consume him; it shall go ill with him that is left in his tabernacle.

27 The heaven shall reveal his iniquity; and the earth shall rise up against him.

28 The increase of his house shall depart, and his goods shall flow away in the day of his wrath.

29 This is the portion of a wicked man from God, and the heritage appointed unto him by God.

It is Lucifer who tried verse 6 in Isaiah 14:14, and he winds up as verse 7 in Isaiah 14:15. Verses 8 and 9 are self-explanatory (Isa. 14:6--11). ["His children"]{.class_3760} (vs. 10) cannot be pressed into John 8:44 completely, but He still has "children" on this earth at the end of the Millennium, which is more than apparent by Revelation 20:8. In the Millennium, these ["children"]{.class_3760} are servants in a military theocracy where the form of government is an absolute dictatorship (Psa. 110; Rev. 2:27; Zech. 14:9--19).

The wicked man (any wicked man) will not come up at the first resurrection to see the "Kingdom" (vs. 17), and the terrible joke of it all is that everything for which unsaved men are working for NOW (to perfect) will be handed over to the saints (Dan. 2:44, 7:27) because they ceased working (Rom. 4:5). Verse 18 should be compared with Psalm 17:10, 14; Jeremiah 12:1; and Psalm 93:2. God's ["bow of steel" ]{.class_3760}(vs. 24) will strike him through with its arrows (Deut. 32:23), and his own bow of steel (Rev. 6:2) will be broken by the "Son of David" (2 Sam. 22:35). The portion and heritage of the ["wicked man"]{.class_3760} (vs. 29) is from God, and it was appointed to him by God (Matt. 25:41). His portion and heritage is sickness (vs. 15), poison (vs. 16), restitution of stolen goods (vs. 18), restlessness (vss. 19--20), opposition (vs. 22), loss of everything (vs. 28), fear (vs. 24), death (vs. 25), exposure in judgment (vs. 27), and ETERNAL FIRE (vs. 26). ["A fire not blown"]{.class_3760} is a fire which God kindles (Deut. 32:22; Isa. 30:33), not man.

Biblical illustrations of the verses are numerous. Nebuchadnezzar (one of the greatest types of Antichrist in the Bible) "mounts up" (vs. 6) and is brought down (Dan. 4). Baasha (1 Kings 15--16) perishes like his own dung (1 Kings 16:4--14). Josiah, the son of Mannaseh (2 Kings 21) seeks to please the poor, and his hands (vs. 10) restore their goods which Mannaseh had ruined. (Verse 11 should be compared with Psa. 25:7 and Job 13:26.) Second Chronicles 21:18 illustrates verses 13 and 14 vividly. Verse 15 applies to Satan (Jer. 50:17--19 and 51:34--35), and the side references to Jonah (and Christ) in these passages are supernatural in their wording. Jonah's whale has to vomit up (vs. 15) what he swallowed (vs. 18), and Jonah is not only a type of Christ, but will also be a type for 144,000 Jewish evangelists who will be preaching to GENTILES in the Tribulation (see Acts 9:5--15 and comments).

Observe once more the constant reference to saints being POOR in the Tribulation and under the heel of a TAXER (Dan. 11:20) who oppresses the poor. There are more than one hundred references to this business in the Bible, and the sample passages in James 2 and John 16 and Matthew 25 should warn the modern Christian financial executive (or promotional motivator) that he may be building on the wrong foundation. ["Riches profit not in the day of wrath"]{.class_3760} (Prov. 11:4); so before this mess is through (being conducted now by the SDA, FCC, NAACP, RCC, UNIFCO, NCC, NEA and HEW with the "Civil Liberties Union"), we Christians might be put in the position where we can either compromise that English Protestant Bible or STARVE. If you get in practise now---compromising it with the [ASV ]{.class_3759}and [NASV]{.class_3759}---you will make out fairly well with the Devil's church when it takes over. However, if you get in practise now of standing for the word of God, you will go to jail or a mental ward when the real pressure comes, and the real pressure is coming.

On the covers of (and inside) the book by Mao Tse-tung, [Four Essays on China and World Communism]{.class_3759}, one will find that the editors are saying that Mao's "DOCTRINES" are a great, revolutionary "challenge" to the West. But anyone who read Mao's four essays would know that Mao's position is the exact position of the Roman Catholic church (A.D. 500--1800), Charlemagne, Hitler, Lenin, Castro, Marx, the Kennedy family, and other 5,000-year-old groups of humanitarian "do gooders," and fascists leaders who rejected the Bible revelation of history and man.

Mao's "position" (p. 2--4, 14--15, 17, 38, 81--83, 85--86, 90--91, 102--103) is the position of the NAZI PARTY; only Mao's alibi is different. And there is no real difference between Mao's philosophy and that of the Russian Czars of 1800--1914 or the Wall Street financiers of 1880--1930. There is not one inch of space between Mao's "position" and the position of Bloody Mary (1553--1558) or the position of Kaiser Wilhelm (1914). Mao just stuffed his creed with a few more platitudes and some modern terminology. Basically Mao's doctrine is this:

1\. I am right, and I am "WE."

2\. "WE" 'are right because "WE" are "THE PEOPLE."

3\. "THE PEOPLE" are "us."

4\. If you are not one of US, you are not "THE PEOPLE."

5\. If you are not one of us, you are against "THE PEOPLE" (i.e. "ME!").

6\. Anything is all right to get rid of anyone who is against "THE PEOPLE," provided it doesn't stir up too much trouble so "THE PEOPLE" will revolt against US (i.e., "THE PEOPLE").

7\. Any people can revolt against "THEM" (i.e., those who are not "THE PEOPLE"), but no one has a right to revolt against us, because "WE, THE PEOPLE" (Oh, yeah man!) are "THE PEOPLE."

Now if you think that is stewed prunes, or slander, against the "monumental struggles of Mao" (Mein Kampf---"My Struggle"), then go over there and try to get "the people" to revolt against the "establishment," like some of you suckers are trying to do here. Go on, try it; I dare you! When they put you in solitary confinement, on drugs, you'll find out who the liar is and where the stewed prunes are. I don't care how great the "fog of verbiage" is, the old stinking, self-righteous self of "SELF" shines through everything any Communist or Evolutionist ever said or wrote, and the only "challenge" that such a philosophy is to those of us who are born again (and know what is going on) is that we recognize the HORNS and the HOOFS (Ezek. 28:14) when we see them. They "challenge" us to pray and keep our powder dry. We know what the challenge is: It is a military challenge and has no more to do with philosophy and doctrine than an Atom Bomb.

If you will go back to the points listed above, you will also find that this format will fit the leading scholars of Christianity, the Vatican State, the Pentagon, the United Nations, the Educator's Association, and either major political party; human nature is quite consistent and quite universal. Mao has nothing more to offer "the West" than an iron-clad dictatorship where man is god and God and the Bible are outlawed, since no dissenting opinions are allowed in such "WE, THE PEOPLE" settings. At least Hitler and his troops bowed their heads (see The Prayer to the Power of Love in the Zappenstreicht) before they enforced their "philosophy" and "doctrines" on the West and the East. The only part of Mao's system we have respect for is the armed population behind it that can be mobilized to kill. As far as truth, righteousness, and spiritual power are concerned, Mao has no more corner on sound "doctrine" than the worst pope who ever lived. When Mao and Castro "violently took away houses" which they ["builded not"]{.class_3760} (vs. 19), they only did what Rusk, Acheson, Dulles, Hess, Herter, Roosevelt, Lamont, Chambers, and others did with countries they never even lived in. The Institute of Pacific Relations (see [The Naked Capitalist]{.class_3759}, Skousen, pp. 44--50) with the Council on Foreign Relations (pp. 50--79) are just as much responsible for their robbery of goods, property, money, and sane policies as any Communist guerilla who ever lived and terrorized a town. And the enemies' guns are only warming up! When the Tribulation comes, "the POOR" will not only be here (John 12:8), but they will be YOUR class of people if you are on God's side at all: Matthew 25:35--38; Proverbs 14:31, 10:15, 13:41, 28:15, 29:14, 22:9, 16; 1 Samuel 2:8; Psalms 10:10, 41:1, 72:13, 82:34--45, 113:7, 10:2, 9, 12:5, 110:4, 72:2, 4, 12; Isaiah 32:7; Ecclesiastes 4:14; and 2 Kings 24:14. And whatever you do, don't let any dead, orthodox, "devotional" commentator or teacher kid you into thinking that those references only deal with "proper treatment of the poor" in the Old Testament. The context of James 5:1--6 is ["the coming of the LORD"]{.class_3760} (James 5:7). The final outcome of International Socialism, cooperating with the Roman Catholic Church, is the financial and domestic bankruptcy of every man, woman, and child on earth who believes in God or believes what God said. And even though you may not have to go through the time of Jacob's troubles (Jer. 30:7), which Job is now experiencing (see Job 42:10 and comments), you will see the prelminary matches. You will see the "Play-offs" as the United States and Great Britain fold up and become Communist satellites to Rome and the United Nations.

Verse 23 is well illustrated in Numbers 11:33, and verse 25 is illustrated by a man in Judges 5 who has ["COLLOPS of fat on his flanks"]{.class_3760} (Cf. Job 15:27!). The fire ["not blown"]{.class_3760} comes from inside the Devil (Job 41:19--21); so, anyone "in" him (1 John 5:19) is going to be in trouble (Rev. 17:8). The ["glittering sword"]{.class_3760} (vs. 25) is the sword of Hebrews 4:12, which is called ["the sword of the Spirit"]{.class_3760} (Eph. 6:17), and it proceeds out of the mouth of the Word of God (Rev. 19:15). We know the place, the dwelling (18:21), the portion, and the heritage (vs. 29) of the wicked man (vs. 29), and in a while we will know his strength, size, shape, composition, position, power, location, plan, and attitude (see Job 40--41). These revelations about Satan are not found in "Present Truth" for the "Body Mystery" (to quote the outworn cliches of Bullinger, Baker, Stam, and Ballinger). Satan is a subject of Revelation (exactly as the church), and this revelation is in the Old Testament mainly. Never abandon Genesis, Exodus, Proverbs, Job, Isaiah, and the Psalms simply because some dry-cleaning dispensationalist wants you to wrongly divide the word of truth.

Reluctantly (and I mean it), we must review the works of the destructive critics before leaving the chapter. This is necessary since nearly every ministerial student left in America is being subjected to a twenty-four-hour-a-day bombardment against the [AV ]{.class_3759}in the institutions that were founded by men who believed in it when they got saved. (Our purpose \[God giving us grace, time, and eyesight\] is to produce a set of Commentaries where the Bible believing Christian can see where every verse has been attacked by a Conservative or Fundamental scholar of some profession, and then find out how that Conservative or Fundamental scholar lied about \[or stumbled over\] the truth in an effort to make Christian Education the final authority for the believer instead of the Bible itself. And this explains the "fundamentals" John R. Rice, Robert Sumner, Kenneth Wuest, Dummelow, Torrey, Robertson, Heavenor, Kline, Clarke, Sampey, Monser, Wilbur Smith, Rendall, Peake, Williams, Lange, Bullinger, and Culbertson all believed in: the "fundamentals" of the Nicene Creed. That doesn't mean that any of them were consistently faithful in preserving the truth as it was preserved by God Almighty in the Protestant reformation text of the Authorized Version. We intend to remain consistently faithful in this realm as well as in the "fundamentals," and if no one goes with us, at least we won't have to alibi our unbelief at the Judgment Seat of Christ, when again we stand alone---like YOU will.)

1\. Rawlinson (the [Pulpit Commentary]{.class_3759}) tells us that verse 21 is "an impossible rendering"; therefore the gullible [ASV ]{.class_3759}(1901) committee takes Rawlinson's advice (again) and alters the text. It is also altered in the ["Living"]{.class_3759}---forgive thy people, O Lord!---[Bible]{.class_3759}, the [NRSV]{.class_3759}, the Roman Catholic Bibles, and all the accumulated trash of nineteen centuries of cockeyed HPD. The original perverters of verse 21 were the writers of the Septuagint, and these readings are cited from A.D. 330--550 just like the scholars (Swete, Rendall---go on, you know what to write) thought it was written in 200 B.C. It is not the "viper's tongue" (vs. 16) but his "tooth," according to the [Pulpit Commentary]{.class_3759}, and Rawlinson flatly denies that Job could have known anything about the creation of Adam (p. 339). Exactly why a man living thirty-six centuries closer to Adam's creation than Rev. Rawlinson could not have known about it is a little bizarre, but when it comes to grotesque Bible exegesis, the [Pulpit Commentary ]{.class_3759}is about as "off beat" as you can get without becoming a Seventh-day Adventist.

2\. Dummelow recommends the corrupt [RV ]{.class_3759}of 1881--1885 for verses 3, 11, 17l, 21, 11, 15, and 26; and Dummelow would no more allow a "steel bow" (vs. 24) in 1200--1800 B.C. than he would an eight-track stereo; so he makes it "bronze."

3\. The Septuagint manuscripts---written 200 years after the New Testament was completed---have Zophar spotted as a "Minaean" instead of a ["Naamathite"]{.class_3760} (vs. 1). Then they have erased the reference to Satan in verses 6 and 7 by saying that it is his "gifts" and "sacrifices" which reach the clouds. Then the word "let" has been inserted into verses 16--17, 20, 23, 25--28, so that the judgments become requests instead of prophecies.

4\. Heavenor almost locates the "fire" of verse 26 but runs back to Job 1:16 to explain it instead of going to Job 41:18--21 and Matthew 25:41. (Heavenor, like his Conservative buddies, is a little too anxious to cover up the Lake of Fire.) But Heavenor ([New Bible Commentary]{.class_3759}, p. 433) has recorded a most remarkable statement from the writings of Strahan. Strahan says that "when any man makes his own opinions and sentiments 'the standard of divinity,' that man magnifies himself on the throne of the universe!" Now when Strahan said THAT, he was making a direct reference to Zophar in the context of Job 20; however, isn't it a remarkable observation? Consider the terrible truth which is couched in Strahan's remark about Zophar being "magnified on the throne of the universe." For as surely as Bill Rice, Tom Malone, Lee Roberson, Tom Wallace, Jerry Falwell, Robert Sumner, John Rice, and others were taught the "mistakes" in the [King James Bible]{.class_3759} by sinners like themselves, the opinions and sentiments of Conservative scholars (1800--1908) have been accepted as the "STANDARD OF DIVINITY" by the majority of educational institutions in America who profess to be "Christian." Do you know what that does, if you take Strahan at his word? It places Conservative sinners and Evangelical sinners and Fundamental sinners "on the throne of the universe" to replace the authority of God Almighty. (Okay, get mad about it, you simpering fool. Make an ass out of yourself and then get to a mourner's bench and get your heart right. If it was right in the first place, you would have said, "Amen.")

Bullinger, Peake, Kline, Williams, Gudde, Duhm, Klostermann, Merz, Delitzsch, Gesenius, and Keil suggest about thirty more alterations for the chapter. Alter them.

[]{#IMh58iSMTFKKU0J9qyaeHw1745.xhtml}

CHAPTER 21

21:1 But Job answered and said,

2 Hear diligently my speech, and let this be your consolations.

3 Suffer me that I may speak; and after that I have spoken, mock on.

4 As for me, is my complaint to man? and if it were not so, why should not my spirit be troubled?

5 Mark me, and be astonished, and lay your hand upon your mouth.

6 Even when I remember I am afraid, and trembling taketh hold of my flesh.

7 Wherefore do the wicked live, become old, yea, are mighty in power?

The section ends with one of those great hallmark questions which we listed under Job 3:23. The question is crucial in the history of man, and it has been asked (or thought) by someone (or some group) one hundred times a day since Cain killed Abel. The question is a refutation of Zophar's thesis, for Zophar has not allowed the wicked to "get old" or become ["mighty in power"]{.class_3760} (Job 20:2, 7--8, 16--17, 24); and what follows (21:8--13), Zophar would never allow at all. But Job has better sense; he, as Solomon, knew that ungodly men often fare better in this life than the godly (Psa. 49:6, 11, 13), for "gain" is not always a sign of godliness (1 Tim. 6:5). Job's "opener" is a riot: ["\...after I have spoken, MOCK ON"]{.class_3760} (vs. 3), which is the equivalent of saying, "After I have intelligently discussed the real problem, you go ahead and cut the fool."

"[Is my complaint to MAN?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 4). No, not even when Job began his complaint (Job 3:1--3) was he complaining to [man]{.class_3761}; Job was complaining to [God ]{.class_3761}(see 7:11 and comments). But even if Job had gone around town grumbling and griping about the way he was being treated (instead of going out of town and toughing it out alone), ["why should not"]{.class_3762} his spirit be troubled (vs. 4)? (See Job 19:4 and comments.) Haven't some of you gone all over town (via the telephone) griping and complaining about how you were being treated by a Bible-believing pastor and the "brethren?" And haven't many of you done it with a full stomach, money in the bank, central air-conditioning, and a two-car garage? Yes, you have. Job would have been perfectly justified, by all the laws of society, if he had gone on a tour as a first class freak and charged admission for people to come in and look at his sores.

"[Mark me\...lay your hand upon your mouth"]{.class_3760} (vs. 5). (See Prov. 30:32 and comments.) Even when Job remembers (vs. 6) the judgment (19:29) and the punishment of the wicked man (20:29), he is afraid. He fears God just as much as Zophar: ["Even when I remember I am afraid"]{.class_3762} (vs. 6), and Job's "remembrance" goes back once again to Genesis 6--9. If any doubt was in your mind about it, compare the next passage (vss. 11--14 with 11:12--17) with this one. The memory of Noah's flood is fresh in the minds of the four men huddling by the city dump.

"[Wherefore do the wicked LIVE, become old, yea, are mighty in power?"]{.class_3760}

Now there is a question! No pretending that ["wicked"]{.class_3760} is a relative term; no ducking the sin issue before attempting to answer the question (see any Logical Positivist or Phenomenologist); no nonsense about "so much good in the worst of us and so much bad in the best of us that it ill behooves us to judge one another," and all that custard pudding. No, the question is: "Why do WICKED men often outlive good men, and get power in their hands and keep it to the detriment of good men?" That is the question.

Why is it that the longest reign of the kings of Judah is the reign of the worst king Judah ever had (1 Chron. 33)? Manasseh worshipped devils, prayed to statues, killed babies, and paid no more attention to the Bible than last year's [Farmer's Almanac]{.class_3759}, yet he was a king!

Why is it that [40,000,000 ]{.class_3759}people are still in bondage to a pitiful handful of Italian winoes whose past record would make Homer Van Meter and Baby Face Nelson blush for shame? [John XII ]{.class_3759}(955--963) made the Vatican palace a brothel and was killed by a jealous husband in the act of adultery. [Pope Gregory VII ]{.class_3759}(1076) excommunicated Henry IV, whereupon Henry elected a pope himself and marched on Rome. [Urban II ]{.class_3759}took Gregory's place, and so you had two "vicars of Christ" whose "ex-cathedra" utterances were "infallible" (1377--1417). [John XXIII ]{.class_3759}(1410--1415) was called the most depraved criminal who ever sat on the papal throne, being guilty of sodomy and other nameless vices. [Paul II ]{.class_3759}(1464--1471) had a house filled with concubines. [Sixtus IV]{.class_3759} (1471--1484) sanctioned the Spanish Inquisition and was implicated in a plot to murder Lorenzo DeMedici. [Pope "Innocent"]{.class_3759} (!) the eighth (1484--1492) had sixteen children by various married women, and he sent armies out to murder Bible believing Waldenses. [Urban VI, Clement VII,]{.class_3759} and [Paul III ]{.class_3759}had many illegitimate children ([Halley's Bible Handbook]{.class_3759}, pp. 779--789). And THAT is the crowd who produced the Jesuit Bible of 1582, recommended by the Roman Catholic Church. And THAT is the Greek text of [Vaticanus ]{.class_3759}and [Sinaiticus]{.class_3759}, recommended by the [Bible Department of Bob Jones University.]{.class_3759}

Now, how did that gang of murdering, whoremongering, adulterous thieves ever get so much power that when you carry a sign downtown saying "No hope in the Pope!" the Christians, Catholics, and [Jews ]{.class_3759}get upset? Did you ever wonder about things like that? ["Wherefore do the wicked live, become old, yea, are mighty in power?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 7).

How does Dr. Custer (Bob Jones University) get away with lying deliberately about the Christian's "final court of appeals" in his correspondence aimed at overthrowing the authority of the [AV ]{.class_3759}text (see correspondence, 1975)? Custer says that Fundamentalists have always made "the [original ]{.class_3759}Greek" manuscripts their final court of appeals. Dwight Moody didn't; was he a Fundamentalist? Frank Norris didn't. Was he a Fundamentalist? Bob Jones didn't. Mordecai Ham didn't. Jack Hyles doesn't. John Rawlings doesn't. Beauchamp Vick didn't. Harold Sightler doesn't. Maze Jackson doesn't. Percy Ray doesn't. Were they "Fundamentalists," or are the "Fundamentalists" these silly crackpots who think their education permits them to appeal to a "final court of appeals" that no one [has]{.class_3759}, no one can [get]{.class_3759}, no one has [seen]{.class_3759}, no one can [quote]{.class_3759}, and no one can [read]{.class_3759}?

Witness the late Jack Kennedy (Aug. 28, 1961, cited in the [New York Times]{.class_3759}, Aug. 29, 1962), suggesting that "isolationism" is a dirty word, and that, therefore, our Constitution is no longer "workable," because [at the time it was written]{.class_3759}, we were in a period of "isolation." Do you know what the overtones or aftermath of that type of statement is? I mean, do you think that that "chance remark" was just political rhetoric? Oh, no! You send troops into Korea, Vietnam, and Katanga so that you will be enmeshed and intertwined in everybody's business but your own. Kennedy was not an idle speaker: He [promoted ]{.class_3759}international socialism and national bankruptcy.

Witness Senator Fullbright ([San Diego Tribune]{.class_3759}, Aug. 14, 1961) telling us that [one man ]{.class_3759}should run the country and that government "by the people" is only a "cherished and [traditional ]{.class_3759}belief." Do you know what logically follows this? I'll tell you what follows it: dictatorial powers given to a [Roman Catholic ]{.class_3759}president. Witness Secretary General U-Thant (Apr. 5, 1963) telling the students at Columbia University that talks about private enterprises have been transcended by the "realization" that we should "change" to benefit everyone. Do you have any idea of what U-Thant just said? I mean [really?]{.class_3759} Did you catch those words like "sharing,' "realization," "change," "program," "validation," and "communal?" He just said that [you have no right to own your own property and business]{.class_3759}, thus they will be "violently taken away" (vs. 19) before 1980, according to a plan laid down by Lenin and Trotsky. (And Walt Rostow, Chairman of the State Department \[1963\] and Adlai Stevenson \[1961\] put it even plainer than that.)

"[Wherefore do the wicked live, become old, yea, are mighty in power?"]{.class_3760}

What business does Alexander the Great have conquering the known world when he was a demoniac conquering epileptic who promoted racial integration? What business does Nero have on the throne while he is burning law-abiding citizens in his palace gardens to light up his sex orgies? Why is Nebuchadnezzar given the power of life and death over all of his subjects while, at the same time, he is demanding they bow down to a golden phallic symbol? How did the HEW get away with threatening the property and buildings of Lester Roloff, when they admitted they could not even do the job with young people that he was doing in rehabilitating drug addicts and street walkers? How did the FCC run Carl MCIntire's broadcasts off in the Bay after he told the country the truth about Bernadette Devlin and North Ireland?

How does the Irish Republican Army get the backing of the Associated Press, the British Broadcasting Company, NBC, CBS, Mutual, and [LIFE ]{.class_3759}and [Time ]{.class_3759}magazines, while it is engaged in overthrowing "the people's government" (there you go, buster, right on the money and back to "The People" again!) of North Ireland and turning that democratic country into a Fascist [Church-State ]{.class_3759}like South Ireland and Spain?

In Ronald Glasser's definitive work on the war in Vietnam ([365 Days]{.class_3759}), there is a boy named David Jensen (twenty- years-old), dying in the hospital in Zama, Japan. He has 80 percent second and third degree burns; the detonators he was carrying in his rucksack exploded. The doctor works on him: Demeral, furacin dressings, sulfamyelon, polymyxin, chloromycetin, kanamycin, whirlpool baths, skin grafts, respirators, etc. It is no dice; David dies. In the account given, he dies without a Bible, without Christ, without hope, and without God. When the doctor is cutting a hole in his windpipe so that he will not drown in his own blood, the boy gasps, "Doc, take me home too\...please Doc\...take me home with you\...I don't want to go home alone!" Not a trace of the Gospel in his letters home, not a trace of a witness for Christ in the "Burn Ward," and not a trace of regeneration in his twenty short years. David, like thousands of young soldiers, steps out to meet God unprepared. And if David Jensen were some fictitious character, the narrative is as real as rain.

Who got "David" into that mess?

Who got David and a thousand other boys into that mess? Do you reckon that when President Johnson (Honolulu, 1966) and General Taylor (1961) and President Kennedy (1961) and Pope Paul XII (with MacNamara and Rusk, guided by Hiss, Chambers, and Roosevelt) set up that war in Vietnam, had they had to watch a corpsman pulling burnt flesh off his own chest? Do you reckon when Kaiser Bill, President Wilson, Lloyd George, Clemenceau, Pope Pius XI, Orlando, the Romanoffs, and the Hapsburgs set up that first World War, they had to do it while gangrene was creeping up their wounded legs? A lot of boys died of gangrene in World War I---hundreds of them. Do you reckon when Roosevelt, Hitler, Chamberlain, Churchill, Stalin, Mussolini, Hirohito, Pope Pius XII, and the League of Nations set up that Second World War, that they had to plan it while they watched their children die of atomic radiation burns?

And be not deceived! No system of International Socialism or Communism will ever solve the problem. The superficial thinkers always assume that if you could get rid of the "king pins" (kings, popes, ambassadors, congressmen, presidents, lawyers, etc.) and let "the people" run things, that the killing will end. You are greatly in error; there have been more of "THE PEOPLE" killed, tortured, imprisoned, and exiled in the last twenty-eight years in Romania, Bulgaria, China, and Russia than there were killed in [czarist Russia ]{.class_3761}(or Mussolini's dictatorship) from 1400 to 1900. All ruling systems are the same where they use "humanism" in the place of Biblical Christianity and use force to enforce their "humanistic" religion. Communism, Fascism, Catholicism, Socialism, and Nazism are the [same system]{.class_3761}; they just [profess ]{.class_3761}to be different. Anyone of them would take your house, land, car, bank account, children, job, or church. Anyone of them would jail you, torture you, or slander you to obtain their objectives. Anyone of them would destroy the [AV ]{.class_3761}(1611) Bible as quick as look at it. No humanistic system based on the worship of the "common man" will tolerate any competition for long; they all would resort to ANY method, fair or foul, to obtain their political and economic objectives.

But before we end on this negative note, let us see if God has an answer to the question ["Wherefore do the wicked live, become old, yea, are mighty in power?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 7).

1\. They do, so that some of them may become [monuments of God's mercy]{.class_3759}. The Apostle Paul is the outstanding Biblical illustration of this truth, and church history is replete with the conversions of men who were drunken, cursing, fighting, lying, swearing, cheating, killing scoundrels who were salvaged from the junkyard by the grace of God.

Did you ever read about what happened to some of the so-called "Wicked" of the Nazi high command? Goering committed suicide as a Deist.
