And whether the scholars be German, American, or English Conservatives (Thiersch, Lange, Zodhiates, Ebrar, Guericke, Wuest, Zahn, Salmon, Von Hogmann, Robertson, Alford, Lake, Cadbury, Lightfoot, Hays, and the Catholics) or whether they be German or English Liberals (Hilgenfeld, Holtzmann, Ramsay, Harncak, Steck, Naber, Zeller, Kostlin, Volkmar, Holsten, Pfleiderer, Weatherhead, Volter, Bauer, Moffat, and the Catholics), they all agree on one thing: There is nowhere available on this earth any infallible authority in the form of the Holy Bible. When Stewart Custer (Bob Jones University) tells you that the "original manuscripts" are the "final court of appeals" for a Fundamentalist, he is talking like a man with barnacles for brains. [There are no "original" manuscripts, nor is there any "original" text.]{.class_3759}

For example, when Professor Thiessen (Wheaton College) tells you that the [science ]{.class_3759}of textual criticism has "at last" produced the text that was in "the [original ]{.class_3759}writings" ([Introduction to the New Testament]{.class_3759}, 1955, p. 31) and that you must reject any "Syrian reading" of your [AV ]{.class_3759}Bible that "stands alone," he is merely saying what every Roman Catholic pope and every Bible-rejecting Liberal has been saying for fifteen centuries; i.e., [science ]{.class_3759}and [religion ]{.class_3759}are more authoritative than the Bible. If that is not what he is saying, then how does the "[science ]{.class_3759}of textual criticism" get in a position where it tears up your Bible? When Professor Thiessen tells his Christian students not to listen to any "naturalistic explanation" which robs them of "an AUTHORITATIVE Bible" (p. 97), he no more believes [that ]{.class_3759}than he believes he can dig through Mt. Everest with a teaspoon. If he (Thiessen) is authoritative enough to [correct ]{.class_3759}"an authoritative Bible," then who is the highest authority---[him ]{.class_3759}or the [Bible?]{.class_3759}

The theories of Westcott and Hort [were ]{.class_3759}naturalistic, and they DID rob America and England of an authoritative Bible, and Thiessen took the hallucinations of Westcott and Hort to be as factual---where they dealt with the Received Text and "families of manuscripts"---as the Irish Republican Army takes the Assumption of Mary. Thiessen, following in the footsteps of Origen, Eusebius, Jerome, and Gregory, leads you to believe that the only way you can get back to a "neutral text" in the New Testament is to [ignore the Syrian text. ]{.class_3759}Now, he does not say this in one sentence where anyone can understand it, but when one sees this kind of thing going on he doesn't have to be in the dark:

1\. Each group of manuscripts [has to be evaluated as a group ]{.class_3759}and used as a [group ]{.class_3759}(p. 70). (Note the hysterical tantrum of the professors at Bob Jones (correspondence, Nov. 1975), trying to prove that you must accept or reject EVERYTHING that Origen or Jerome wrote or you cannot cite them for ANYTHING, right or wrong. This "groupitis" is quite characteristic of the "communal synthesizing" that goes on in the mind of the spiritual adulterer as he mixes dissimilar elements.)

2\. [Nothing ]{.class_3759}found in the Alexandrian family can be classified "Syrian" even if it matches the Syrian text (p. 70--72).

3\. Only the Western and Alexandrian families are worthy of comparison (Ibid., pp. 64, 70, 72--73, 75, 37--39).

4\. The first and early second century "fathers" are [not authoritative ]{.class_3759}because they favored [some Syrian readings over the Alexandrian readings ]{.class_3759}(p. 64).

5\. But they [are ]{.class_3759}authoritative when determining the canon of the New Testament (pp. 64--65).

6\. Origen is more authoritative ([even though he is in the second century!]{.class_3759}) because he was acquainted with more texts that DIFFERED with the Received Text (p. 65).

Then we know exactly what to do with Thiessen: place him and his friends right into the same slot with Origen and his friends and then draw the conclusion that the ["WORDS OF GOD'S MOUTH" ]{.class_3760}(Job 23:12) were no more "esteemed" by these sinners than a loaf of mouldy bread.

23:13 But he is in one mind, and who can turn him? and what his soul desireth, even that he doeth.

14 For he performeth the thing that is appointed for me: and many such things are with him.

15 Therefore am I troubled at his presence: when I consider, I am afraid of him.

16 For God maketh my heart soft, and the Almighty troubleth me:

17 Because I was not cut off before the darkness, neither hath he covered the darkness from my face.

Everything in the section is crystal clear. Notice how the words match the context of Romans 9:9--10 and Job 12:13--25. When God is "of a mind" (vs. 13) to do something, He does it (Rom. 9:18--22). What His soul ["desireth,"]{.class_3760} He does (Eph. 1:4--8), and He will perform ["the thing that is appointed"]{.class_3760} (vs. 14).

The fatalism in all of this is evident, and the truth in all of it is also evident. Although we never have to be as fatalistic as Calvin (see Exod. 9:16 and comments) or Buddha (563--483 B.C.) and although we never have to descend to the existential depths of the despair of Kierkegaard, still when God sets up Galatians 6:7--8 and 2 Corinthians 9:6, many things are "appointed unto us." Every one of us has a rendezvous with death and the grave if the Lord tarries. Every one of us had a day "appointed in court" (Rev. 14:13), and every one of us shall give account of HIMSELF to God.

"[THEREFORE AM I TROUBLED AT HIS PRESENCE"]{.class_3760} (vs. 15), like Paul was troubled (1 Cor. 9:16) when he thought of running the race in vain (Phil. 2:16). ["When I consider, I am afraid of him"]{.class_3762} (vs. 15). Although ["perfect love casteth out fear"]{.class_3762} (1 John 4:18), that perfect love had nothing to do with "reverential trust." The context of 1 John 4:17 was not Christian service, but [assurance of eternal life]{.class_3761}; when it came to service, the orders given to the born again, blood-bought child of God were ["work out your own salvation with FEAR AND TREMBLING"]{.class_3762} (Phil. 2:12). (See Prov. 1:7 and comments.) Job fears God exactly as a man should fear God (1 Pet. 1:17), and if a man really "considers" God (vs. 15), he will do some trembling, saved or lost. ["Men do therefore fear him: he respecteth not ANY that are wise of heart"]{.class_3762} (Job 37:24). Men like Van Doren, Huxley, Rockefeller, Paley, Lyell, Lorenz, Mao Tse-tung, Einstein, Heidegger, and the leaders of UNESCO and UNICEF make no more impression on the Almighty than Mickey Mouse, Pogo, Donald Duck, Mutt and Jeff, or Kilroy. There is ["no respect of persons"]{.class_3762} (Rom. 2:11) with God, and when it comes to the great ocean voyage of life and to the eternal issues of salvation, death, sin, suffering, Heaven, Hell, absolute truth, and the judgments of God, the Almighty will not give a genius any more berth or passageway than a junkie in the bilge. You don't bamboozle God with an I.Q. of 150. Many a maggot has feasted on a man smarter than the men who compiled the [Encyclopedia Britannica]{.class_3761}.

"[God maketh my heart soft"]{.class_3760} (vs. 16), and no matter how hard and bitter Job gets (Job 31), he never gets to the brittle breaking point of Pharaoh (Exod. 9:16 and comments).

Job was not ["cut off"]{.class_3760} (vs. 17), for he did not die. But again, he was experiencing a "darkness" as great as death itself (vs. 17), for he was going through a [living death ]{.class_3759}(Job 3:21, 23) that made death preferable to living (3:11, 13).

Madam Guyon (1648--1717), the Christian mystic, said that the worst thing God ever did to her was not in taking her family, money, and property from her (although this did happen when Madam Guyon was as rich as the Kennedy family). Madam Guyon said that the worst thing that happened to her was not being thrown into a miserable prison for fifteen years, a prison that was little more than a dungeon. She said the worst thing was that God gave her no revelation of Himself and had no close fellowship with her for nearly five years after her arrest. When someone asked the saintly woman how she had managed to stay sane and sweet and triumphant through all that time, she replied: "Well, after all, I am not responsible for God's attitude towards ME; I am only responsible for my attitude towards HIM!"

But Madam Guyon had the indwelling Comforter and a finished Atonement.

The apostle Paul is heading for the chopping block; they take everything but his cloak and parchments, and they probably tried to steal them. He goes out to face the executioner with no house, no car, no real estate or buildings, no stocks or bonds, no family, no insurance policy, no survivors, no Sunday School attendance, no busses, and no grave. On the way to the block he is bragging about God's "deliverance" (2 Tim. 4:17--18).

But Paul had the indwelling Comforter and three quarters of the New Testament.

At about five in the afternoon on April 2, 1967, Nicolai Shelestun appeared at the Boyarsk Police Station (Kiev, Russia). The chief of police and the "district attorney" took turns hitting him in the face with their fists. After thirty minutes he was told, "We are going to beat out your innards and tear out your guts, and we don't have to answer to anyone for this." Nicolai finally fell out of his chair from the beatings and lay unconscious on the floor. He was pulled back up on the desk by his hair and was then asked to sign a false confession. Upon refusing, Nicolai was knocked to the floor and then kicked in the kidneys till blood came out of his mouth and nose. They then robbed him of his personal belongings and sent him home with this: "Warn your friends that the same fate awaits them if they assemble to worship and [teach the Bible!"]{.class_3759} (You see, "civil rights" and "human rights" and "Humanism" and "a just distribution of the economy" were never the real issues to start with.)

Nicolai Shelestun was only one of six hundred Baptists to be treated in this fashion---the standard treatment given to Bible believers by the Roman Catholic Church for eight hundred years (A.D. 800--1600)---while the Baptists in the World Council of Churches were bragging about "freedom of worship in Russia." But Nicolai got off light. Most of his ministerial brethren were in Siberia, and they had been slave laborers for twenty years. Many of his congregation (and other congregations) have had their children kidnapped, and they have been fined the equivalent, in American money, of about \$50,000. (The average Russian income in American dollars amounts to less than \$2,000 a year.) Yet the "underground church" in Russia still exists with people still getting saved.

But even in the terrible conditions described above, a real believer has the [abiding Christ ]{.class_3759}and a [completed salvation ]{.class_3759}that can never be undone (Rom. 8:35--39). Job is going through the torments of the damned with no indwelling Spirit, no finished redemption, and only some verbal orders God had given him (directly or indirectly) long before "the axe" fell. He has no knowledge, for certain, about the immediate future, and he is being forced to continue a walk in darkness when he has no motive for walking and no goal to reach. ["The Almighty TROUBLETH ME"]{.class_3760} (vs. 16).

[]{#IMh58iSMTFKKU0J9qyaeHw1983.xhtml}

CHAPTER 24

24:1 Why, seeing times are not hidden from the Almighty, do they that know him not see his days?

2 Some remove the landmarks; they violently take away flocks, and feed thereof.

3 They drive away the ass of the fatherless, they take the widow's ox for a pledge.

4 They turn the needy out of the way: the poor of the earth hide themselves together.

5 Behold, as wild asses in the desert, go they forth to their work; rising betimes for a prey: the wilderness yieldeth food for them and for their children.

6 They reap every one his corn in the field: and they gather the vintage of the wicked.

Job never denies for a minute the truths presented by his friends in regard to the punishment of the wicked; this is apparent by Job 24:17--24. The only exception he takes with them is in the matter of tem[porary blessing]{.class_3759}. Job insists that chastening is not always a [punishment]{.class_3759} and that wicked men can avoid both, at least for [awhile]{.class_3759}.

Verse one is saying: "Why doesn't God just kill the wicked instead of letting them go on day after day? After all, the Lord knows (vs. 1) the time of punishment is coming (2 Pet. 2:9). Why does He let the wicked go right on living and enjoying the daylight, when they ought to be dead?"

Umbreit and Jamieson don't like the text therefore it is perverted to mean: "Why do they that know him not, do NOT see his days?" The Jehovah's Witnesses read with Jamieson. That is, they deny that the wicked DO see ["his days."]{.class_3760} The [Amplified Bible ]{.class_3759}immediately confounds ["days"]{.class_3760} with ["times" ]{.class_3760}(vs. 1) and then makes them both the same, [which they are NOT. ]{.class_3759}But Kenneth Taylor "takes the cake" with The ["Living"]{.class_3759}---got your fingers crossed?---[Bible]{.class_3759}. Taylor has made an agnostic ("know him not") into a [godly ]{.class_3759}man. (Dummelow anticipated Taylor's private interpretation in this matter by nearly seventy years (Ibid., p. 308). The reading, of course, is a nullity.)

You see, once you turn the ungodly agnostic of verse 1 into a saint, you cannot continue into verse 2, for it begins: ["SOME REMOVE the landmarks."]{.class_3760} Who? The "godly"? Sensing this anomaly, Taylor ([TLB]{.class_3759}) quickly invents a "paraphrase" suggested nowhere in any manuscript in the world. To cover up his first blunder, Taylor has written, "a crime wave has engulfed us"! (The ["Living"]{.class_3759} [Bible]{.class_3759}---[paraphrased]{.class_3759}? "Paraphrased Bible"? [Bible?]{.class_3759} What in the world are you talking about? If you're going that far out on the "lunatic fringe" \[cliché used by Communists and Conservative Bible scholars: 1940--1970\], why not just write: "If God knows what goes on in Greenwich, how come the refrigerator doesn't give the time every half hour? Vital statistics, via tape deck, show that abortions have increased twenty percent." I mean, after all, if "making the Bible plainer" consists in replacing it with hot air, why not just open the steam valves and fumigate the place?)

What follows is the work of those who ["know him not"]{.class_3760} (vs. 1).

They take up bench markers and change fence rails (vs. 2); they rustle cattle (vs. 2); they confiscate a farmer's stock if he doesn't join the "five year collective plan" of "communal SHARING" for "ecological environmentalists" (vs. 3). (Oh sure, kiddies, most higher education is just varnished hypocrisy with a touch of elaborate lying for a "finisher.") They persecute anyone who doesn't take the ["mark"]{.class_3760} (vs. 4; see Rev. 13:15--17). These refugees (Heb 11:37) are driven into the desert and the wilderness (Heb. 11:38), and they are fed (vs. 5) there (Hosea 2:14; Rev. 12:6).

They are not ["wild asses"]{.class_3760} (see 11:12), but they are made to live like them (vs. 5); they gather their corn in ["the field"]{.class_3760} (vs. 6)---not "their own fields." The wicked men make them gather their own vintage (vs. 6), according to James 5:3--5, because in the Tribulation you are to ["hurt not the oil and the wine"]{.class_3760} (Rev. 6:6). The prophetic import of the passage is missed entirely by the Hyper-Dispensationalist Williams, the Premillennial expositor Biederwolf, the Postmillennial expositor Rev. Rawlinson, the Amillennial expositor John Calvin, and all of the Roman Catholic priests, cardinals, popes, and bishops of the last fifteen centuries.

Moral: All sinners who correct the [AV ]{.class_3759}text share one common religious bond of ecumenicity: BLINDNESS.

24:7 They cause the naked to lodge without clothing, that they have no covering in the cold.

8 They are wet with the showers of the mountains, and embrace the rock for want of a shelter.

9 They pluck the fatherless from the breast, and take a pledge of the poor.

10 They cause him to go naked without clothing, and they take away the sheaf from the hungry;

11 Which make oil within their walls, and tread their winepresses, and suffer thirst.

12 Men groan from out of the city, and the soul of the wounded crieth out: yet God layeth not folly to them.

We have taken the division at verse 6 and 7 because the main subject of verse 5 and 6 was the persecuted Tribulation remnant. However, notice that verses 2 and 3 (which introduce the treatment of the remnant) deal with the wicked: the ["THEY"]{.class_3760} of verses 3 and 4 are those who ["know him not,"]{.class_3760} in verse 1. Here, at verse 7, the ["THEY"]{.class_3760} are the same bunch. The second "they"---see verse 8---are the [remnant ]{.class_3759}again.

"[They pluck the fatherless from the breast"]{.class_3760} (vs. 9). Note the tribulation comparison in James 2:27, written to the ["twelve tribes"]{.class_3762} (James 1:1). All that Job says is true of the dealings of wicked men with poor people in any age (Deut. 19:14; Prov. 22:28; 1 Sam. 8:3; Lam. 4:5), but these passages will have a special significance during the time of Jacob's troubles when no "saint" can be rich without losing his soul (Rev. 13:16--18). The wine and oil (vs. 11) are to be protected in the Tribulation (see Rev. 6:6), and the figure is shockingly accurate; for Rome (Heb: "EDOM") has always furnished the nations with wine (Rev. 17:4--7) to keep them drunken, and Arabia (Ishmael) controls the OIL. \[Ah, Rocky and Chase, you will have to "wheel and deal" to get around that [AV ]{.class_3761}(1611)!\]

"[Men groan from out of the city"]{.class_3760} (vs. 12), and those [in the city]{.class_3761} (Rev. 11:2, 13) will have it a lot tougher than those in the [country ]{.class_3761}(Rev. 17:16, 18). The first man to build a city was a murderer (Gen. 4:17). Those who lay ["house to house"]{.class_3762} (Isa. 5:8) will ["CRY OUT"]{.class_3762} (vs. 12) when the Antichrist finally "brings in the Kingdom," with the help of UNESCO, UNICEF, the CFR, the Catholic popes, and their "friends" from outer space. Men groan out of the city NOW, but their groaning will seem like rejoicing in the day that God turns the city water systems into blood (Rev. 16:6), the city atmosphere into hail and fire (Rev. 8:7), the city populace into demon-possessed drug addicts like Charles Manson (Rev. 9:21), and the moon into blood (Acts 2:20). The misery of the Warsaw Ghetto (1939--1943) was only a down payment on "things to come," as the scientists, evolutionists, educators, psycho-politicians, diplomats, priests, and popes prepare to bring in "peace on earth" at the expense of ["GLORY TO GOD in the highest"]{.class_3762} (Luke 2:14; Rev. 14:7).

Alex Dunlap took Ian Paisley through a certain section of Philadelphia (1972). When Paisley saw the collapsed walls, the barricaded doors, the broken windows, and the cracked buildings, he said, "Are you having a civil war over here?" Dunlap assured him that this was just the logical outcome of "Urban Housing Renewal," the "Civil Liberties Union," and the "liberation of oppressed minorities," etc. When asked if he would trade the Irish Rpublican Army (100 percent Roman Catholic) for the populace of that section of Philadelphia, Paisley said, "Well I might have if I had not seen it, but now I'm not so sure!" Paisley said he was going to bring some of the Scotch Presbyterians over to Philadelphia and let them look at American Socialism in action; he thought it might "greatly encourage them," after they had put up with assassinations, bomb plots, hails of bullets, false brethren, phony politicians, and "bad press" for two decades.

Did you ever read [Ill Fares the Land ]{.class_3759}(Van Gorder, 1953)?

Did you know that a planned FAMINE---not just a planned "gas shortage"---was set in motion as far back as 1937? Tell me something. Having over-escalated the "standard of living" to the point where less than 10 percent of the people [grow ]{.class_3759}food, what do you think is going to come to pass when food runs out for the 91 percent? The millennium? Did you read about those seven years in Genesis 40--47? Did you mark those twelve famines in the Bible? Do you honestly think that nine to sixteen square miles of people packed in, room to room (Detroit, Cleveland, Philadelphia, New York, Cincinnati, Los Angeles, Baltimore, Chicago, and Pittsburgh), can find enough to sustain them in one hundred grocery stores, when the price of bread goes up to \$12.00 a loaf? Do you know how much land the average family in the city has on which to [grow ]{.class_3759}their own food if a famine comes? Well, be not deceived:[ "Skin for skin, yea, all that a man hath will he give for his life."]{.class_3760} (Job 2:4). And when "push comes to shove," in the next twenty years, the Government will take your property and food by force to feed people who will submit to IT without question. If they don't, they will authorize your "neighbor" to do it on the grounds of "communal sharing."

Every civilization this world has ever "hosted" passed through eight stages:

1\. [Discovery]{.class_3759}: which is the equivalent (spiritually) of [Evangelization]{.class_3759}.

2\. [Colonization]{.class_3759}: which is the spiritual equivalent of [Education]{.class_3759}.

3\. [Cultivation]{.class_3759}: which is the ethical equivalent (look out!) of [Culture]{.class_3759}.

4\. [Luxury]{.class_3759}: which is matched in the spiritual realm with APOSTASY.

5\. [Leisure]{.class_3759}: which is followed by ecumenical movements in [RELIGION]{.class_3759}.

6\. [Deterioration]{.class_3759}: which drives a country into a Roman Catholic system of [Political Fascism]{.class_3759}.

7\. [Destruction]{.class_3759}: which is carried out by revolutionaries and Communists (called "Pagans" in A.D. 300--900 and "Atheists" in A.D. 1700--1900).

Yet ["God layeth not folly to them"]{.class_3760} (vs. 12), at least as far as anyone can tell. Instead, those who pay for the folly of the thinkers (Marx, Freud, Darwin, and Huxley), the political leaders (Lenin, Trotsky, the popes, the kings, and the "Kennedys"), the Generals (Charlemagne, Mao Tse-tung, Alexander, Napoleon, et al.), the dictators (Castro, Franco, Batiste, DeGaulle, Hitler, Mussolini, et al.), and the "planners" (the Illuminati, the CFR, the HEW, and the NEA) are the common ordinary everyday sinners who are caught up in the system of this ["evil world"]{.class_3760} (Gal. 1:4) and cannot rid themselves of it short of dying (see [The Sure Word of Prophecy]{.class_3759}, 1970).

24:13 They are of those that rebel against the light; they know not the ways thereof, nor abide in the paths thereof.

14 The murderer rising with the light killeth the poor and needy, and in the night is as a thief.

15 The eye also of the adulterer waiteth for the twilight, saying, No eye shall see me: and disguiseth his face.

16 In the dark they dig through houses, which they had marked for themselves in the daytime: they know not the light.

17 For the morning is to them even as the shadow of death: if one know them, they are in the terrors of the shadow of death.

What follows describes why men ["groan from out of the city"]{.class_3760} (vs. 12).

The city dwellers who ["know him not"]{.class_3760} (vs. 1) do not know God's ["ways"]{.class_3760} (vs. 13), and they will not even abide in "His paths" (vs. 13), for they are of ["those that rebel against the light"]{.class_3760} (vs. 13). Thirteen is the number of [rebellion ]{.class_3759}(see [Mark of the Beast]{.class_3759}); so, those who rebel against ["the words of his mouth"]{.class_3760} (see 23:12) rebel against "Light," for, after all, God's word is LIGHT (Psa. 119:105). (As we stated very clearly \[under 23:12\], those who profess to "obey THE LORD JESUS," or "JESUS" as "Lord," as the [authority ]{.class_3759}in their lives---[while rebelling against His word]{.class_3759}---are LIARS; they are no more obedient subjects of Christ as "King" \[or Jesus as Lord\] than the worst Satanists and Atheists active in the world today.)

The three cardinal sins so characteristic of "city life" are now enumerated:

1\. MURDER (vs. 14).

2\. ADULTERY (vs. 15).

3\. ROBBERY (vs. 14).

Today, these sins are listed as "civil disobedience against the Establishment," "adult consent in a permissive society," and "obtaining reparations for injustices done to oppressed minorities." All three "modern" definitions are [newspaper definitions ]{.class_3759}propagated by the press, where the naive and stupid reporters have been covering the "beat" that crosses the path of Communist and Socialist professors in pagan universities. A liar is a liar, no matter what kind of terminology he covers his lies with.

The ideal time for "fun" in the city is when the sun goes down (vs. 16), for they ["loved darkness rather than LIGHT, because their deeds were evil"]{.class_3760} (John 3:19), and ["everyone that doeth evil hateth the LIGHT"]{.class_3760} (John 3:20) as[ "whatsoever doth make manifest is LIGHT"]{.class_3760} (Eph. 5:13). Every weekend, our city officials pick up corpses in the alleys and streets of Cincinnati, Los Angeles, New Orleans, Miami, New York, Philadelphia, Chicago, Detroit, Cleveland, and Baltimore. Not very many of them had much money on them when they were killed (vs. 14: ["the poor and needy"]{.class_3760}). Many a man or woman has been murdered at night in downtown Baltimore to obtain the price of a "fix." Judas wasn't that stupid: He got \$17.00 in American money (by the standards of inflation, the present reward would have been about \$160.00). There are pushers, pimps, junkies, and hustlers in America who have killed a man for less than \$15.00. (See any of the works by Wilkerson, Nicky Cruz, or Gimenez.)

In the Tribulation, the adulterer (Rev. 2:22), murderer (John 8:44), and the ["thief"]{.class_3760} (John 10:1) will be personified in the Man of Sin and his female consort (Zech. 5:7,8). The rule for the day will be "morals are a relative matter," "there are no absolute right and wrongs," and the only thing anyone [must do ]{.class_3759}is obey SATAN. After the body of Christ has left this sin- cursed, war-torn, strife-riven, pock-marked, deteriorating planet, God will allow man to have his way (Jer. 18:12) for seven years. Murder will be as common as speeding on the highway, adultery will be as common as eating and sleeping, and stealing will come to ten major thefts every minute and forty minor thefts every minute, in a twenty-four hour day. With no rain on this earth for three and a half years, you will have to STEAL or KILL (or both) to stay alive.

David, at one time in his life, fell into all three of the classifications of Job's speech: as a [rebel]{.class_3759}, he disobeyed God's commandment not to multiply wives (Deut. 17:17; 2 Sam. 5:13), then he committed [adultery ]{.class_3759}(2 Sam. 11:4), and then he [murdered ]{.class_3759}the woman's husband after stealing his ["ewe lamb"]{.class_3760} (2 Sam. 11:14). Isn't it strange how thin the line is between the Antichrist and the "sweet Psalmist of Israel" who wrote more praises to God than Moses or Paul? There must be something way down deep in the "best of us" that is kin to the "King of terrors" (18:14).

"[They dig through houses, which they had marked for themselves in the daytime"]{.class_3760} (vs. 16). Mud walls and clay floors can be entered in this fashion (see Ezek. 12:7). ["They know not the LIGHT"]{.class_3762} (vs. 16), for they are not children of the daytime (1 Thess. 5:5) but children of the NIGHT (1 Thess. 5:5); and, in this context, we are right back in the Tribulation again---fifty references in Job before you have gotten much beyond the middle of the Book. ["For the MORNING is to them even as the shadow of death"]{.class_3762} (vs. 17). Although the ["shadow of death"]{.class_3762} is primarily a reference to a cloud in the Tribulation that will pass over areas and kill everything under it, the [unsaved ]{.class_3761}will take that attitude toward the cloud of Revelation 14:14 and 1:7, when Christ appears[ "IN THE MORNING"]{.class_3762} (2 Sam. 23:4; Mal. 4:1--3; Matt. 13:43; and Exod. 19:16). Ah, the unfathomable riches of the Elizabethan English. How superior its text is to the "original Greek" of Wilbur Smith, John Rice, Custer, Yaeger, Metzger, Bob Jones III, Aland, and Zodhiates.

24:18 He is swift as the waters; their portion is cursed in the earth: he beholdeth not the way of the vineyards.

19 Drought and heat consume the snow waters: so doth the grave those which have sinned.

20 The womb shall forget him; the worm shall feed sweetly on him; he shall be no more remembered; and wickedness shall be broken as a tree.

21 He evil entreateth the barren that beareth not: and doeth not good to the widow.

22 He draweth also the mighty with his power: He riseth up, and no man is sure of life.

23 Though it be given him to be in safety, whereon he resteth; yet his eyes are upon their ways.

24 They are exalted for a little while, but are gone and brought low; they are taken out of the way as all other, and cut off as the tops of the ears of corn.

25 And if it be not so now, who will make me a liar, and make my speech nothing worth?

Now notice how the ["HE"]{.class_3760} of verse 18 is connected with the preceding expression ["shadow of death"]{.class_3760} (vs. 17), as well as the ["THEY"]{.class_3760} of previous verses. The Antichrist is a [composite beast ]{.class_3759}of multiple [beasts ]{.class_3759}(see Dan. 7:7 and Rev. 13:2). As a ["Behemoth"]{.class_3760} (Heb. for[ "animals"]{.class_3759}), he is ["THEIR"]{.class_3760} (vs. 18), but also[ "HIM"]{.class_3760} (vs. 20). Since 100 percent of the commentators (Catholic, Fundamentalists, Liberal, Conservative, Evangelical, Atheist, Neo-Evangelical, Modernist, and Reformed) canceled the Behemoth of Job 40:15 as having any "relevancy" to the Antichrist, we cannot expect any exposition of Job 24:18--25 but a deceptive, issue-avoiding, spiritualizing, generalizing discourse on the passage. Before examining this mass of trivia, we will see what God the Holy Spirit has to say about matters.

"[Swift as the waters"]{.class_3760} (vs. 18). The wicked man comes and goes like water goes over a rapids: Here today, gone tomorrow. ["Their portion is cursed in the earth"]{.class_3762} (vs. 18). \[See Isa. 14:9, 26:14--19.\] ["He beholdeth not the way of the vineyards"]{.class_3762} (vs. 18). He not only departs before he can get the fruit from [his own vineyards ]{.class_3761}(20:7, 28), he will not see ["the vineyard"]{.class_3762} (Matt. 21:39) bearing fruit (Isa. 27:2--3) after Christ harvests Satan's vineyard (Rev. 14:19--20). Since the references are largely to the Second Advent (Deut. 32), the scholars (any of the last 30,000) miss them, thumbs down.

"[Drought and heat"]{.class_3760} (vs. 19) is self-explanatory. Men rot in the grave and dissolve just like heat melts snow. (See 21:33 and comments for verse 29.) Wickedness ["shall be broken as a TREE"]{.class_3762} (vs. 20), for this is the figure of SATAN (Ezek. 31) who was typified by Nebuchadnezzar (Dan. 4) and counted as a tree by David (Psa. 37:36). With [three references to the Antichrist, 100 percent ]{.class_3761}of the commentators miss all three. (Typical "recognized scholarship" by "qualified scholars" whose "loyalty to the word is unquestioned," Blah, blah, blah.)

Verse 21 is self-explanatory and matches the "barren" of Matthew 25:35--37 and the widows of James 1:27. ["He draweth also the mighty with his power"]{.class_3760} (vs. 22), and his bodyguard turns out to be ten "king pins" (Rev. 17:12) who are part human (Dan. 2:41) and part superhuman (Dan. 2:43). (No, don't go running off to Ellicott, Delitzsch, Jamieson, Fausset, Brown, Lange, Dummelow, Williams, Matthew Henry, Heavenor, Kline, or Gesenius to find it. Their combined scholarship never produced ONE Biblical truth not found in the sermons of fifty uneducated preachers who died before they were born. They simply amplified what God had already showed Christians, through the King James text, and either denied those truths or reinforced them, depending upon their particular whim at the time they were writing.)

"[He riseth up"]{.class_3760} (vs. 22) as we just mentioned under Job 3:8, which see. ["He riseth up"]{.class_3762} among Daniel's ["horns"]{.class_3762} (Dan. 8:9), and he is ["RAISED UP"]{.class_3762} (Rom. 9:17) as Pharaoh (Exod. 9:16) to declare God's power throughout this earth (Rev. 13:1--9). At that time ["no man is sure of life"]{.class_3762} (vs. 22), for if he takes the mark he can die of LEPROSY (see 11:15 and comments), get killed by plagues (Rev. 16), or be killed in war (Rev. 6:8). If he does NOT take the mark, he can be beheaded (Rev. 20:4) or be starved to death (Heb. 11:37--38; Rev. 13:17). And the pitiful attempts of the "qualified" commentators and "recognized scholars" (see below) to abort the passage into a setting that will be familiar to them---while stepping all over the Truth of God with their dirty, disbelieving feet---is a monument to the depravity of Christian scholarship (Fundamentalist or otherwise).

(Recently, a pastor cancelled a meeting with me because he wanted to get some publicity in a "Christian" newspaper, whose editor was rather upset over the success of our book and tape ministries. In his letter, this pastor said that he believed that John R. Rice best represented the "BIBLE BELIEVING" Fundamentalists of America. Where he got this terminology from no one knows. Rice's official profession of faith (in a dozen of his words [and attested to by his signature on his own stationery]{.class_3759}) is that only the "fundamentals" are infallible truths. Rice has no infallible Bible; he has never seen one, never read one, never believed the one God gave him to be such, and he never heard of an infallible Bible available to anyone on this earth. He couldn't get a copy of an infallible Bible, [according to his own profession of faith and belief]{.class_3759}, if you paid him \$10,000,000 in cash tonight. If you don't believe it, go ask him for a copy. You can get a copy here at the [Pensacola Bible Institute]{.class_3759}, but you couldn't find an infallible Bible in [Rice's library ]{.class_3759}if you looked all night. "Fundamentalism" is one thing, and believing what GOD SAID is often something else. "Representing Fundamentalists" [in order to get into their churches, and submitting to the Authority of God Almighty are two different leagues]{.class_3759}.)

"[Though it be given him to be in SAFETY"]{.class_3760} (vs. 23), as the Antichrist will be for seven years, ["yet HIS EYES are upon THEIR WAYS"]{.class_3762} (vs. 23). God's eyes are on the Antichrist's ways (2 Chron. 16:9; Prov. 15:3) and the ways of his cohorts and legions. ["They are exalted for a little while"]{.class_3762} (vs. 24)---seven years---["but are gone and brought low"]{.class_3762} (vs. 24). The rest is self-explanatory.

"[And if it be not so NOW, who will make me a liar\.... ?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 25). Nobody, because it was not so THEN, but it will be---see Revelation 13--14, 17--19.

Having "clued us in" on a dozen details which deal with the time of ["Jacob's Troubles,"]{.class_3759} let us lay aside the infallible words of the Living God for a moment and see what the fallible foolishness of "Bible-believing" Fundamentalists have to say about what they refused to believe:

1\. [Adam Clarke:]{.class_3759} Verse 12 should be: "God doth not attend to their prayers." Verse 18 should be: "light is he on the face of the waters." Verse 19 should be: "they fall to their lowest depth." Verse 21 should be: "he feedeth the barren," and so on and on and on, until you have your own "bible" that says exactly what God did NOT say.

2\. The [Vulgate:]{.class_3759} Verse 21 should have been "he has been kind to the barren woman." Verse 23 should have been: "gave him space for repentance." Verse 12 should have been: "God will not leave these disorders unpunished," and so on and on and on.

3\. The [ASV ]{.class_3759}(1901): Verse 12 should have been: "God regardeth not their folly." Verse 16 should have been: "they shut themselves up in the daytime." Verse 17 should have been: "the errors of thick darkness." Verse 21 should have been: "he devoureth the barren." Verse 22 should have been: "God preserveth the mighty by his power," and so on and on and on.

4\. Jamieson, Fausset, and Brown make fifteen changes in twenty verses; Peake and Budde make fifteen changes in fifteen verses; Dummelow alters verses 9, 10, 13, 17, and 18 with the grossly corrupt [RV ]{.class_3759}of 1884; and by the time Taylor ([TLB]{.class_3759}) and Dodd ([NEB]{.class_3759}) get through with the passage, it looks like Dresden, Germany, on the morning of February 16, 1945.

The cause for these alterations (all of them), and the reason for making them, lies in two simple facts:

1\. The best Conservative brains of the last one hundred years couldn't see their hand in front of their faces when the [AV ]{.class_3759}spoke of the Second Advent of Jesus Christ in the Wisdom books of the Old Testament.

2\. This willful ignorance and sinful stupidity had to be covered up with some "tarpaulin" that looked like "[Christian ]{.class_3759}scholarship," or "[scientific ]{.class_3759}research."

So, our "qualified authorities" went off the deep end and simply rewrote Job 24 to suit themselves. And this radical extremism (or blind fanaticism) is so characteristic of some of the faculty members at Trinity, Pillsbury, Wheaton, Piedmont, San Francisco, Columbia, and Pacific College that you can expect the same exegetical lunacy right up to, and past, the rapture. John R. Rice, for example, didn't think Revelation 22:14 was good Christian doctrine; so he just rewrote it ([ASV ]{.class_3759}or [NASV]{.class_3759}) to suit himself. Typical. If you had rewritten Job 24:17--25 in the following fashion it would be just as "reliable" (cliché used by dead orthodox apostates when talking about the [AV]{.class_3759}) as any [ASV ]{.class_3759}ever printed.

"Ol Sol, comin up isd a bad cat man; like it don' get you nowhere. So [bug out]{.class_3761}, man, and take ten before the tide comes in, and you're a wipeout. He trips to the bull's eye store and gets [stoned ]{.class_3761}like Dino, man. His old lady will be hung up on Lib when he kicks the bucked from [gaposis]{.class_3761}. It'll take a cave to house that Milwaukee goiter. If he don't swipe some [moola ]{.class_3761}or [shanghai ]{.class_3761}some [Jane]{.class_3761}, you'll be in the [looney bin ]{.class_3761}from sweatin out [cold turkey]{.class_3761}. Even if we cool it, man, we get [flipped ]{.class_3761}and its curtains for us, [bongoed ]{.class_3761}or not! Down the tube, daddy O! And if that ain't the scene, son, I'm [ready for Freddy ]{.class_3761}or a Devil's dozen."

And if you have to choose between THAT and a "reliable translation" which you "prefer," (instead of the living words of the living God), CHOOSE THAT: It's in better taste.

[]{#IMh58iSMTFKKU0J9qyaeHw2067.xhtml}

CHAPTER 25

25:1 Then answered Bildad the Shuhite, and said,

2 Dominion and fear are with him, he maketh peace in his high places.

3 Is there any number of his armies? and upon whom doth not his light arise?

4 How then can man be justified with God? or how can he be clean that is born of a woman?

5 Behold even to the moon, and it shineth not; yea, the stars are not pure in his sight.

6 How much less man, that is a worm? and the son of man, which is a worm?

Here comes the shortest man in the Bible again ("Bildad the SHOE-height"), and his brief contribution indicates that he has been sidetracked from the main argument. Job's blast has driven him into an abstract reverie, and Bildad is "wandering."

"[Dominion and fear are with him"]{.class_3760} (vs. 2), and this is illustrated in Daniel 4. ["He maketh peace in his high places"]{.class_3762} (vs. 2) by casting out one-third of the angels and the heavenly "Absalom" (Rev. 12:1--10 and 2 Sam. 17--18). Before there can be ["on earth peace, good will toward men"]{.class_3762} (Luke 2:14), there must be ["GLORY TO GOD IN THE HIGHEST"]{.class_3762} (Luke 2:14), because His will cannot be ["done in earth, as it is in Heaven"]{.class_3762} (Matt. 6:10) until heaven is clean (Job 15:15) and the ["STARS ARE NOT PURE IN HIS SIGHT"]{.class_3762} (vs. 5), whether they be "light bearers" (Psa. 19:2) or angels (see Rev. 1:20 and comments). (Bildad's "off the cuff" comments, given in a state of semi-awareness, still turn out to be a little beyond the major commentators of the last twenty-five centuries.)

"[Is there any number of his armies?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 3). Not when you consider that He is the ["Lord of HOSTS"]{.class_3762} (["Sabaoth,"]{.class_3762} James 5:4), and the ["host of heaven cannot be numbered"]{.class_3762} (Jer. 33:22; Gen. 2:1; Isa. 40:26). The Lord of "Hosts" is mentioned more than 140 times in the Prophets alone. Since He is a ["man of war"]{.class_3762} (Exod. 15:3) at the Second Advent (Rev. 19), His armies (Rev. 19) follow the ["CAPTAIN of their salvation"]{.class_3762} (Heb. 2:10), and His two HOSTS (Gen. 32:12) come to the wilderness (Song of Sol. 6:13), down the King's Highway (Num. 21:22), on WHITE ASSES (Judg. 5:10) and WHITE HORSES (Rev. 19:11--16). (And don't look for it in the writings of any Christian Greek or Hebrew scholar with fifty-five years of formal education. The Greek and Hebrew scholars at Dallas Theological Seminary have no more light on these matters than Tom Paine or Madalyn Murray O'Hare. If Robert Dick Wilson couldn't find TWO of the references in any language, don't think that you are going to get the other FIFTY in English. Robert Dick Wilson could read and write twenty-five different languages, but when faced with the mighty Monarch of the Books---the [AV ]{.class_3761}1611---he checked out and fell into goosestep with the agnostic critics of his day and time. Proficiency in Greek or Hebrew was never (nor shall it ever be) a substitute for a BELIEVING HEART and a HUMBLE MIND.)

"[And upon whom doth not HIS LIGHT arise?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 3). Well, it was a spiritual light to the Jews (Luke 2:9) and Gentiles (Isa. 9:2) at His first coming, but it will be a shining light (Psa. 50:13) to Israel at His second coming (Psa. 68:1,8), exactly as it appeared to Paul (Acts 9:3). His physical lights light every man that comes into the world (Psa. 19:1--6), and His spiritual light also (John 1:9). When His light "arises" in the Tribulation (Rev. 14:14--15), those who (["look for HIM"]{.class_3762} (Heb. 9:28)---ah, here we go---will see Him, but those who are not looking for Him (Matt. 25:8)---ah, there it goes again---cannot see Him, for without ["HOLINESS"]{.class_3762} no man shall ["SEE THE LORD"]{.class_3762} (Heb. 12:14)---ah, one more time, you ole "erudite Greek scholar," you---because only the ["PURE IN HEART\...SHALL SEE GOD"]{.class_3762} (Matt. 5:8)---it wasn't in the "original Greek," stupid; [it was in the original ENGLISH.]{.class_3761}

There is where you Charismatic, blubber-blabber, chariscipled, Kerygmatic, "holiness" people got your split rapture from. You old rascal, you. Like Robert Sumner (see his comments on Luke 1:3), you figured if the Bible statements didn't match your own stupidity, you would just alter the text to match your own stupidity: Look how the [NASV ]{.class_3759}altered Hebrews 9:28 to match theirs. Well if men like John R. Rice and Robert Sumner are ever entrusted with preserving the truth, they will alter it every time it doesn't match the material they were taught by a Bible-rejecting "fundamentalist" like themselves. And before you follow the blind leadership of such blind "scholarship," you'd better do some "tall" praying.

"[How then can man be justified with God? or how can he be clean that is born of a woman?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 4). This is another one of the great hallmarks of the [Book of Job ]{.class_3761}(see 3:23 and comments). If Job 14:1 and 15:15 are right (and they certainly are), no man can be justified before God (Gal. 3:11) unless God does something to bring this about. Man's natural birth (vs. 4) begins with sin (Psa. 51:5) and ends with sin (Rom. 6:23), and he can no more meet God's requirements (Rom. 10:1--4) for absolute sinless perfection than a goldfish can repair a TV set.

Physical birth is a messy business no matter where it takes place, and even if it takes place in an air-conditioned delivery room sterilized to the "-nth degree," the product is a son of Adam, made in Adam's image (Gen. 5:1--3)---not God's (Col. 3:10)---and without the new birth his destiny is fixed. He will be conformed to the image of his father (John 8:44; Eph. 2:1--3) and share his "father's" dwelling place (Matt. 25:41). Although sin is not imputed to any child (Rom. 4:15) until there is "knowledge of good and evil" (Rom. 5:13), still God must impute Christ's righteousness to any child who dies, [for children inherit a fallen and ruined nature from Adam ]{.class_3759}(Rom. 5:14--20). "Original sin" would not affect that truth one way or another. If you are sane you know three things for certain: You know you have done wrong, you know you have done wrong more than once, and you know you are going to drop dead in your tracks one day (Rom. 6:23). And that is all you need to know to realize that if there is any God at all, you will give an account to Him (Rom. 14:12).

The only way that God can justify man, and still be "just" Himself, is by the transaction that took place at Calvary (Rom. 3:20--26); and where God does [not ]{.class_3759}require perfect righteousness (see any Old Testament setup), He does not allow entrance to Heaven directly (Luke 16:19--24; Exod. 34:7; Heb. 10:4; Eph. 4:8--9; Luke 23:43), or He has a remedy (Rev. 22:14!) at a future day, [after the Millennium ]{.class_3759}(Rev. 123:17, 14:12). That is where Rice, Sumner, Zodhiates, Scofield, Barnhouse, Pentecost, Ironside, Custer, Greene, Walvoord, and McGee checked out---at the place where they either believed what God said or where they altered what He said to suit their fancy.

"[Even\...the moon, and it SHINETH NOT" ]{.class_3760}(vs. 5). And it won't shine in the Tribulation (Acts 2:20, Rev. 8:12), any more than it did in Pharaoh's day (Exod. 10:22). But, even further, the moon doesn't SHINE anyway; if reflects the light of the sun. You say, "Bildad did not mean this when he\..." Yes, but you Bible rejecting ass, you, [what if he didn't? ]{.class_3761}Does that mean that he didn't SAY it? If Isaiah couldn't figure out the suffering and the glory (Isa. 53--54) that was to follow (1 Pet. 1:9--11), are you going to slap the words of the Holy Spirit out of Isaiah's mouth and make him kowtow to your "scholarship"? Well, if we look at the versions on Job 25:5, I guess that is about it. Rather than let any advanced scientific revelation be found in a Book written more than 1,000 years before Christ was born, our modern "fundamentalists" have done this:

1\. "The moon has no brightness." The Lockman Foundation, who put out the counterfeit [NASV ]{.class_3759}(1969), has decided that Bildad could not have put out such information before Kepler. (BJU recommends this version.)

2\. "Even the moon, it is not bright," says the Jehovah's Witness "bible," backing up the Lockman Foundation and adding support to Bible-rejecting scientists who had their little feelings hurt when the [AV ]{.class_3759}text attacked them.

3\. "The moon and the stars are less than nothing," says Kenneth Taylor ([TLB]{.class_3759}), which isn't the sense (paraphrased, transliterated, translated, or exegeted) of any Hebrew manuscript.

4\. "The moon hath no brightness," chimes in the [ASV ]{.class_3759}of 1901, to help the Jehovah's Witnesses out. (Ditto Dummelow, [RSV, ]{.class_3759}and [RV]{.class_3759}.)

5\. "If he gives an order to the moon, it shineth not," says the [Septuagint ]{.class_3759}manuscripts, written more than two hundred years after the completion of the New Testament.

6\. The moon is "continually changing its appearance" according to Adam Clarke.

7\. "The brightness of the moon" is what we are talking about in Kline's comments (p. 479).

But why go on? The creed of "Christian Education" is simple: If you object to the Bible, [change ]{.class_3759}it. Isn't that what every atheist, agnostic, Satanist, Catholic, communist, pagan, and infidel did on this earth since the Book was written? You're in good company: FDR didn't like all of it Kissinger doesn't like all of it; Nixon, Spellman, Sheen, and the Jesuits don't care for all of it; neither does Cassius Clay, Abernathy, Rap Brown, Senator Powell, Mrs. M.L. King, the Kennedy family, or the last three presidents. If you don't like it, change it. That's how it's done on the faculty at Bob Jones, Piedmont, Arlington, Columbia, Trinity, Clearwater, Miami, Dallas, Fort Worth, Midwestern, Northwestern, and North-northeast by South- southwest. Just believe in the "fundamentals," you see. \[And then try to kid us into thinking that you are a "Defender of the faith" in the sense of a [Bible believer]{.class_3759}. Sure, kid, "so's your old man."\]

Well, the moon doesn't [shine, ]{.class_3759}and it never has. As a "lesser light" it [reflects ]{.class_3759}the greater light (see Gen. 1:16 and comments). If Isaiah says the world is round like a circle (Isa. 40:22), it is, and if Bernard Ramm (Fuller Seminary) doesn't like that "pre-Copernican" revelation, he can go soak his head in a cold pack. If Moses tells a surgeon to wash his hands in running water (Lev. 14:51) to keep the germs away and then no surgeon from 1000 B.C. to A.D. 1800 does it, that is their problem, not God's. If Christ tells you that it can be day and night at the same time on this earth (Luke 17:31, 34) and you are stupid enough to think otherwise (like every "Christian" did from A.D. 33 to A.D. 1400), you'll pay for the meal, not me. If that Book tells you that the stars cannot be numbered (Jer. 33:22) and you're dumb enough to think that "modern science" has done it, you're about as "scientific" as "modern science." If that Book tells you to speak with your neck relaxed instead of [stiff ]{.class_3759}(Psa. 75:5) and you still think it is "figurative poetry," go on and ruin your voice; it's yours, not mine. If that Book warns you about cross-pollination in crops (Lev. 19) and you don't believe it, go out and buy a yellow watermelon. If that Book tells you that [Jupiter ]{.class_3759}is the planet to look out for, that vampires will obtain blood as Eve obtained it, that Christ comes to Mt. Sinai before the Mt. of Olives, that there will be a Lake of Fire in Edom [during the Millennium]{.class_3759}, that monsters will come out of the hollow earth in the next thirty years, that the Devil has a church and that he protects it, that the word of God lives and abides forever, and you don't believe it---that is your problem, not mine; and I don't care to take on God Almighty in a contest with the problems I already have. If you think you are smart enough to correct that Book with that godless drivel you learned at a Christian college or university, you only prove that you are one to fifteen centuries [behind ]{.class_3759}the times, and you'll have to catch "UP" to the Bible instead of worrying about going back "TO" the Bible. Where science ([of any brand]{.class_3759}, promoted by Christians or Atheists) contradicts that Book, you would be wise to label their "science" as "mythology" and turn to something factual. When, for example, you pick up a pile of exegetical trash like [The Church and the Tribulation ]{.class_3759}(Robert Gundry), which professes to be the "scholarly STANDARD study" on the subject, it might be a good idea to correct the author throughout (from the Preface to the Epilogue) with the [King James ]{.class_3759}text. Gundry no more believed that the Book he was handling was the word of God than he believed in the seven resurrections and seven judgments.

"[How much less MAN, that is a worm? and the SON OF MAN, which is a worm?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 6). The male sperm has this appearance, and the word has been used in the vulgar sense in reference to the means of producing seed. Furthermore, in eternity ["their WORM dieth not"]{.class_3762} (Mark 9:46; Isa. 66:24), because the One who endured eternal punishment (Psa. 22:6) said He was like a serpent (John 3:14), taking the sinner's place (Num. 21:8). (Wouldn't it be a terrible calamity if a man's soul \[see comments under Gen. 2:7\] degenerated to that SHAPE (\[Isa. 34:10--17\] in the Lake of Fire? Ever study the matter?)

Bildad is through. His speech has answered nothing, and really, it is not connected to any of Job's speeches before or after. As a matter of fact, Job has so thoroughly silenced his opposition that Zophar does not take a third crack at him, although he could have. But at this point, Zophar has come to the conclusion that Bildad and Eliphaz have come to: It is useless to argue with Job. How can a man with only an [argument ]{.class_3759}answer a man who has an argument and an [experience?]{.class_3759} Bildad's mumbling fades off into silence, and from here on to Chapter 32, Job carries the day. (Irwin's guess is that we are dealing with "a tattered manuscript" in Job 25---that is, most of the speech has been "lost." This is quite typical of the Disneyland comments we get from men who can't understand anything that doesn't line up with what they've been taught; nothing has been "lost" except Irwin's fidelity to the word of God.)

A silence follows Bildad's contribution. When Job next opens his mouth, he runs six chapters without an interruption.

[]{#IMh58iSMTFKKU0J9qyaeHw2100.xhtml}

CHAPTER 26

26:1 But Job answered and said,

2 How hast thou helped him that is without power? how savest thou the arm that hath no strength?

3 How hast thou counselled him that hath no wisdom? and how hast thou plentifully declared the thing as it is?

4 To whom hast thou uttered words? And whose spirit came from thee?

In view of Matthew 12:36 and 2 Corinthians 5:10, 11, the words that Job now speaks are some of the most important words in the Bible for the body of Christ. Job asks Bildad six questions, and as sure "as God made little green apples," these six questions will be put to the child of God when he faces the Judgment Seat of Christ (not "God" as in the corrupt [ASV ]{.class_3759}of any edition).

1\. ["How hast thou helped him that is without power?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 2).

2\. ["How savest thou the arm that hath no strength?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 2).

3\. ["How hast thou counselled him that hath no wisdom?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 3).

4\. ["How hast thou plentifully declared the THING AS IT IS?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 3).

5\. ["To whom hast thou uttered words?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 4).

6\. ["And whose spirit came from thee?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 4).

These are essential issues for the believer in the Church Age, since the believer's works will be ["tried by fire"]{.class_3760} (1 Cor. 3:13). Observe that four out of the six questions begin with questions of QUALITY ("How?"), not QUANTITY ("How MANY?"). Observe further, that every preacher or teacher is going to have to face Question No. 4 head-on, and then, woe be to the "qualified scholar" who wasted his life trying to usurp the authority of the Holy Bible with his unholy "original Greek text." Dr. A. T. Robertson (the greatest Greek scholar America ever produced) could not declare ["THE THING AS IT IS"]{.class_3760} with the aid of ten Greek lexicons, the words of the classical Greek grammarians, and the writings of Greek scholars from 500 B.C. to 1930. Robert Dick Wilson of Princeton could no more ["declare the thing as it is"]{.class_3760} with his knowledge of twenty-five languages than Philip Mauro or Louis Berkhof. Everyone of these men was an Amillennial baby-sprinkler, except Robertson, and he was an Amillennial supporter of the Cooperative Program, who also subscribed to the "two document theory" of Liberal Theology. When it comes to declaring ["THE THING AS IT IS,"]{.class_3760} saved scholars with twenty-eight years of formal education are often just as stupid (and just as dishonest) as illiterate Christians with only a high school education, at least this has proved to be true on several dozen occasions.

Now suppose for a minute that the Lord Jesus Christ gave "account of Himself" to God the Father on the six questions: Did you notice that He could "bat 1,000" without any effort? The Lord Jesus did help those without power (Matt. 4:24); He gave the right counsel to any man who had no wisdom (James 1:5); He always declared the thing the way it was (Matt. 16:14); and He always did it plentifully (Matt. 23:2-30). Furthermore, the Lord Jesus uttered words to the Jews (Matt. 10), the Gentiles, John 12), big shots (John 3:13), little shots (Mark 10:49), rulers (Matt. 27:2), slaves (Matt. 15:28), fishermen (Mark 1:16), tax gatherers (Matt. 9:9), women (Luke 7:48), children (Matt. 18:1-6), soldiers (Matt. 8:10), friends, and enemies (Matt. 23:32). His love was [always ]{.class_3759}["without dissimulation"]{.class_3760} (Rom. 12:9) or hypocrisy, and His motive for service (Heb. 10:7) was impeccable (John 5:30). In addition to all of this, the Spirit that came from Him (vs. 4) was [always ]{.class_3759}the Holy Spirit---never His own spirit (John 3:34) or an unclean spirit (Matt. 12:24).

(Now. If you can find a written record from history \[John 20:31\], testified to by 500 eye-witnesses whose lives backed up their faith \[1 Cor. 15:6\], that the things listed above were also true of Buddha, Mohammed, Mao Tse-tung, Lenin, Confucius, Zoroaster, "Father Divine," or any Pope \[or any other Bible- rejecting sinner\], we will trade our "religion" in; but, until you can produce THAT kind of evidence, don't waste our time with a lot of superstitious nonsense. Time is valuable.)

Returning to some practical matters of the present: How would YOU answer those six questions if God Almighty put them to you tonight? Have YOU helped anyone without power? [How ]{.class_3759}did you do it? Have YOU saved the arm of some sinner who had no strength? [How ]{.class_3759}did you do it? How did you "counsel" in your "pastoral counseling"? Was your guide Gothard, Kinsey, Narrimore, Menninger, or the Book? Have you plentifully declared ["ALL THE COUNSEL OF GOD"]{.class_3760} (Acts 20:27 and comments), or just those parts that would keep you in good standing with your financial supporters? Hmmm? When you ["declared"]{.class_3760} the passages in Revelation 12:17, 14:12, and 22:14, did you declare them as they WERE, or did you alter them like John R. Rice and R. A. Torrey to match your "theology"? Hmmm? Do you witness to everyone regardless of their station in life (Acts 26:26 and comments)? And when you declared, counseled, and uttered words, ["whose SPIRIT came from thee?"]{.class_3760} God's? The Devil's? Your own? There are THREE spirits which can come from a man's mouth when he talks:

1\. The Holy Spirit (Gal. 3:5) which is a [Divine ]{.class_3759}spirit.

2\. The Unclean spirit (Rev. 16:13 which is a [Devilish ]{.class_3759}spirit (James 3:15).

3\. The spirit of Man (1 Cor. 2:11) which is a [Human ]{.class_3759}spirit (Ecc. 3:21).

If we are going to be condemned or justified by our ["words"]{.class_3760} (Matt. 12:37) and give account for ["every idle word"]{.class_3760} (Matt. 12:36), don't you suppose it is rather important for us to know who is using our mouths when we open them (James 3:1--12)? When you say, "The [Authorized Version ]{.class_3759}is 'reliable' but not without many errors," is that the HOLY SPIRIT from God speaking through you to your students? When you say, "The [Authorized Reformation text ]{.class_3759}is not infallible, but it is 'reliable,'" are you [sure ]{.class_3759}that God Almighty is leading you to say that? That's what Bob Jones Jr., and Bob Jones III say in all of their correspondence where is deals with the "infallibility" and "reliability" of the King James text. When you say "[The ]{.class_3759}original Greek text" to your students, have you ever considered that you might be a blatant, out-and-out liar and that the Holy Spirit would no more think of saying a thing like that (seriously) than saying that a Christian can "choose the Bible he PREFERS." (You'd better "prefer" what God "prefers," unless you want to spend the rest of your life kidding yourself and your followers about your spirituality.)

It would be interesting to see a definitive work written on the kinds of "spirits" which came from the pens and mouths of the last 50,000 authors. But of course, this could not be done without a "criteria" being selected by which to judge matters, and since the "criteria" of the majority of authors (secular or sacred, saved or lost, Fundamentalist or Liberal) is [their own education]{.class_3759}, such a study would be impossible. Where there is no [absolute authority]{.class_3759}, there is anarchy and chaos, and whether that anarchy and chaos is produced by Communist revolutionaries or Christian Conservatives, sin is still SIN.

"[To WHOM hast thou uttered words?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 4).

Well, to Marines, for example. I preached to "Buddy" one night. Buddy was sixteen years old the last time I was with him (when I myself was an unsaved man); then four years later, I saw "Buddy" come into a preaching service in a Marine's uniform. He was loaded up with medals like an Army and Navy store. At the end of my evangelistic message, he was pale and trembling. He came forward and took my hand and said, "Pete, something has sure happened to you since the last time I saw you." "Sure it has," I replied. "I got saved." "But Pete," he said, "I don't believe in God. I'm an Atheist. If you had seen what I saw over there\...."

I asked him if he was willing to see if there was a God. He said, "Yes." So. Back we went into a prayer room, and I pulled an "R.A. Torrey" on him; I made him follow me in prayer, one clause at a time. The first prayer went: "God, if there is a God, I want you to reveal yourself to me." The second prayer went: "God, if there is a God and Jesus Christ was really your son, I want you to show me right now." In the middle of the fourth prayer ("God, if I am a sinner, show me"), I heard Buddy yell, ["God, I KNOW I'm a sinner!!"]{.class_3759} To make a long story short, Buddy walked out of that church building a six-foot, two-inch, SAVED Marine. When he got outside, he and I went to his car. Seated in the front seat was a small frail woman, about forty-two years old---his widowed mother---who had raised him, alone, by working as a waitress. She had been praying for him for nearly ten years. When we got to the car, I said to Buddy, "Go on and tell your mother what you just did." And I thought for a minute he wasn't going to make it. That six-foot, two-inch, bronzed Marine stood there (with his medals rattling on his life chest like a dice game), and then he looked straight into his mother's face. I saw her stare up at him out of the car window, and then she said, "W-what did you do, s-s-son?" There was a wild moment of tension, and then suddenly Buddy broke down bawling like a three-year-old child; he hollered, "I got saved, Mom! I got saved!" And we had us a "camp meeting" on that dirt parking lot, right out in front of the church.

"[To whom hast thou uttered words?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 4).

Well, to farmers, for example. I sat down at the table with a farmer and his family. His "family" was a thin, worn-out farm woman---bare feet, gingham dress---and three or four barefooted children, between four and ten years old. (I will call him "Henry," although I have forgotten his real name.) "Henry" worked on the ore carriers up in the Great Lakes part of the year, and then he came back to his farm in Alabama at plowing, planting, and harvesting times. Henry was a drinker, curser, smoker, and everything else that goes with them. After dinner, he and I went into the living room and sat down. I preached to him for about thirty minutes and then gave him an invitation to receive Jesus Christ. At the moment he was about to answer, his little girl in the back room tipped over in a rocking chair and hit the floor; she began to holler bloody murder. Henry said, "Scuse me, preacher!" He got up and went back and straightened things out. When he came back I saw his wife through the hallway door, pacing up and down, and wringing a little handkerchief together. She was a Christian woman herself and had been praying for her husband for nearly five years. I took Henry up the "Romans-road" and offered him my hand on an invitation to accept Christ. He was about to open his mouth and say something when two of the children got into a fight in the kitchen, and Henry had to go back and separate them: "'Scuse me, preacher!"

Then next time he came back I decided to "strike while the iron was hot." I extended my hand and said, "Henry, if you will, the best way you know how, receive the Lord Jesus as your\..." [Beeep!]{.class_3759} Some horse trader had hauled up into the driveway with a horse in the back of a pick-up truck. Henry got up again: "'Scuse me, preacher." I collapsed. I got down on my knees after he left and cried out: "Oh God, [do something ]{.class_3759}for that bird. Blow up the truck, kill that horse, do something. I don't care what you do, but Lord, in Jesus' name, for Jesus' sake, will you please overrule the Devil and give this man a chance!?"

Back came Henry.

He flumped down on the sofa and looked at me; I looked at him. Both of us were perspiring. I suddenly said, "Let's pray." Blump! Blump! Down we both went by the sofa. And to make a long story short, Henry received the Lord Jesus Christ. When he got up, he was wiping tears out of his eyes. He said, "I shore feel better, preacher." "Well, that's good," I said, "but being saved is not a matter of feeling; it's a matter of believing." "Ah know it," said Henry, "but I [still ]{.class_3759}feel better." I put my arm around him and said softly, "How about going back in the bedroom and telling your wife what you did?"

He nodded. You couldn't have seen anything like it in any movie that Billy Graham, Hollywood, Estes Pirkle, or Bob Jones University ever made. That skinny woman standing on a bare floor of a bedroom that just barely had wall-to-wall [boarding;]{.class_3759} those chickens out in a grassless "lawn" scratching up dirt; those "young'uns" standing there in their dirty clothes watching "daddy," and that big bruiser lumbering back to the bedroom where his wife had been praying for him ever since I came into the house. I thought for a moment he wasn't going to make it. Then, suddenly, he blurted out: "Momma, I-I-I just accepted J-J-Jesus as my, my SAVIOUR!" And the rest of it was lost in tears.

"[To whom hast thou uttered words?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 4).

Well, to murderers, for example. Chuck Huntsinger (Spartanburg, S.C., 1952) went by one of my street meetings where I was drawing a picture of the crucifixion. He stood there transfixed for about thirty minutes, and when I finished, he drew a half empty whisky bottle out of his coat pocket and threw it down on the gravel between the buildings where I was preaching. The bottle didn't bounce twice before another road- boy picked it up and ran off with it. Huntsinger came up to me and hollered, "I'm saved, [ain't I?"]{.class_3759} I replied sullenly, "I don't know. ARE YOU?" "Well," said Huntsinger, "you said that the blood of Jesus Christ would take away my sins, and that if a man put his trust in the shed blood of Jesus Christ, that would do the job, [right?!"]{.class_3759}

"Right," I said.

"Well," he said, "I done did that just then while you were preaching, and I want to go and tell my wife what happened to me."

And with this, Chuck pulled a loaded .38 out of his pocket and handed it to me. While I hesitated he said, "Preacher, when I came by here I was on my way to murder my ex-wife. I've served five years out of a ten-year sentence for manslaughter, and I was on my way to kill her when I came by here. Now I want to make things right." (I had run into this same situation in downtown Greenville, S.C., not three months before, and the man in Greenville had also repented of his intentions and gone his way as a saved man.)

Well, we put Chuck in a car and drove him to his former home. His wife was not there, but his daughter and son-in-law were. They laughed at him when they opened the door. They did not let him in or even believe his testimony. However, Chuck stood there and gave them the gun that he had offered to me; he insisted that he had been born again. Finally, they took the latch off the screen door and opened it to stare at him. To make a long story short, in ten minutes all three of them were on their knees on that porch praying and crying. And the last time I saw "Chuck," he was out on the street witnessing. He had some sinner backed up against a building on Highway 29 in downtown Spartanburg, and he was "preaching" to him out of a Hertel "Blue Ribbon" Bible that was so big he could scarcely hold it open on one arm!

("Foolish," you say? Yes, but brother, he was doing more with that [King James 1611 ]{.class_3759}than some of your professors ever did with the "original Greek," and you'd better believe [it.]{.class_3759})

26:5 Dead things are formed from under the waters, and the inhabitants thereof.

6 Hell is naked before him, and destruction hath no covering.

7 He stretcheth out the north over the empty place, and hangeth the earth upon nothing.

8 He bindeth up the waters in his thick clouds; and the cloud is not rent under them.

9 He holdeth back the face of his throne, and spreadeth his cloud upon it.

10 He hath compassed the waters with bounds, until the day and night come to an end.

11 The pillars of heaven tremble and are astonished at his reproof.

12 He divideth the sea with his power, and by his understanding he smiteth through the proud.

13 By his spirit he hath garnished the heavens; his hand hath formed the crooked serpent.

14 Lo, these are parts of his ways: but how little a portion is heard of him? but the thunder of his power who can understand?

The tremendous passage deals with the [Great Deeps ]{.class_3759}(Gen. 1:1--4 and comments) and the Cosmology of true Metaphysics. Since Satan appears again in verse 13 (and look out for the thirteens), we may expect, again (see comments under Acts 14:13 and 19:35 in that Commentary), a wholesale defection to the Devil by the "recognized" Fundamental and Conservative faculty members when they hit the passage. Not even Scofield (Gen. 6:1--6) was exempt from collusion with the Devil to cover up his work; s we can hardly expect the Lockman Foundation and the Christian educators at Bob Jones University to do much better.

"[Dead things are formed from under the waters"]{.class_3760} (vs. 5), and some day they will be resurrected from those waters (Rev. 20:13). We shall judge[ "angels"]{.class_3762} (1 Cor. 6:3) who drowned as ["men"]{.class_3762} (Psa. 82:6--7), and every fable about Atlantis and the "hollow earth" has some foundation in these Bible truths (Psa. 18:4, Prov. 21:16, Isa. 14:9). ["The inhabitants"]{.class_3762} (vs. 5) under the water (Psa. 18:15) include monsters in a Bottomless Pit, whose leader is Abaddon (Rev. 9:11, Prov. 15:11), and fallen angels in a place called "Tartarus."

"[Hell is naked before him, and destruction hath no covering" ]{.class_3760}(vs. 6). Every reference is to the lower regions of the underworld ("under the waters," "Hell," and "destruction"). The angel of the Bottomless Pit (Rev. 9:11) bears this title---destruction---and he is identified in the Scriptures (John 17:12; 2 Thess. 2:2--4; Acts 1:25; Rev. 17:8) as the spirit of Judas Iscariot (see John 6:70--71).

"[He stretcheth out the NORTH over the empty place"]{.class_3760} (vs. 7); so the ["NORTH"]{.class_3762} is a stretched-out, beaten-out, firm expanse of FIRMAMENT (Gen. 1:3,4) composed of frozen ice crystals (Rev. 4:6) as clear as glass (Rev. 15:2). They form a glass through which we see ["darkly" ]{.class_3762}(1 Cor. 13:12), since the backside of a looking glass (Job 37:18---oh yeah, man, you couldn't find it in the "plenary, verbally inspired, etc.," for nothing, if you looked all night!) is DARKENED. Since every compass needle in the world points in this direction (Psa. 75:6, 7), Satan will [block it]{.class_3761} (Ezek. 8:3) to prevent you from getting up there (Ezek. 8:3), and the only way you will make it (Job 38:30) is for God to [cut a door in it ]{.class_3761}(John 10:1-4) by tearing a veil (Heb. 10:20) and then pulling you up through the ice (Job 38:30) like a FISH (Matt. 4:19)! (And if you think that the last 4,000 commentators who rejected the \[1611\] as the infallible truth could even get their wrecks in gear with the first reference we gave, you don't know as much about infidels as God knows. There is nothing in the entire bookshelf of Christian literature \[A.D. 200--1980\] published by Eerdmans, Zondervan, Harpers, Baker, or the Logos Publishing Company that would even give you a [lead ]{.class_3761}on the truth of the matter. Satan has carefully covered up these revelations by educating Christian scholars to sit in judgment on the revelations.)

"[And hangeth the earth upon nothing"]{.class_3760} (vs. 7) in spite of the fact that all of the scholars and scientists from Job's time to A.D. 1400 thought it was fastened or "hanging" on something.

"[He bindeth up the WATERS in his thick clouds"]{.class_3760} (v. 8), and these ["waters"]{.class_3762} by their context---see verse 9---have no more to do with what you see floating over your head (Gen. 1:1-4 and comments) than what you see running under your feet. ["The cloud is not rent under them"]{.class_3762} (v. 8) is a reference to clouds that are closer kin to the famous "dust clouds" and "Magellanic clouds" of Astronomy.

"[He holdeth back the FACE of his throne"]{.class_3760} (vs. 9), because this cloud is where God ["hath compassed the WATERS with bounds, until the DAY AND THE NIGHT come to an end"]{.class_3762} (vs. 10). The wording fixes, beyond all speculation, the location of God's throne: It is NORTH. It is on a frozen glass object, it is covered so that an astronomer cannot see it, it is above a body of water bigger than our solar system, it is at a place where molecular action ceases (eternity), and it is just a short hop of about 3,000,000,000,000 light years "over the way." \[Opinions to the contrary are to be entertained only by those "Christian" fools who think they are smarter than God and know more than God has revealed.\]

"[The pillars of heaven tremble and are astonished at his reproof"]{.class_3760} (vs. 11). (See the Divine commentary in Joel 2:30; Job 9:6; and 1 Sam. 2:8.) And observe that "pillars" are not always solid objects (Exod. 13:21; Prov. 9:1). We say this to warn the Christian who will be seduced by his "qualified" instructor into taking Job 9:6 and making it refer to the earth being placed on [something]{.class_3761}, whereas he was just told that the earth was hung upon ["NOTHING"]{.class_3762} (vs. 7). The "Van Allen belts," for example, are not physical "belts," but you can draw the shape of their magnetic field with a pencil.

"[He divideth the sea with his power"]{.class_3760} (vs. 12). He will at the Advent (Hab. 3:15) when He comes through ["the depths of THE SEA"]{.class_3762} (Psa. 68:22). No attempt by the dead orthodox Conservatives or Liberals (any of the 400 listed in Biederwolf's [Second Coming Bible]{.class_3761}) can confine the passage to Exodus 15, for Exodus 15 (as Judg. 5) is one of the greatest passages in the Bible on the Second Advent of the Lord Jesus Christ where it deals with the rapture (see comments in that Commentary). The ["sea"]{.class_3762} which is divided here (vs. 12) is in the heavens (vs. 13) exactly as we find it in Job 41, for the ["crooked serpent"]{.class_3762} (vs. 13) is in the SEA (Job 41; Isa. 27:1) according to every passage dealing with the subject. Pharaoh (Ezek. 29:3) is a [type ]{.class_3761}of this reality, but the [shadow ]{.class_3761}is not the [substance]{.class_3761}. Faced with detailed information on the shape, size, and structure of the universe, the events that attend the Advent, and the location and description of the archenemy of Bible belief (Gen. 3:1), the Conservative and Fundamental commentators and scholars throw in the towel and refuse to exposit the passage.

"[By his understanding he smiteth through the proud"]{.class_3760} (vs. 12), literally (Zech. 11:17; Rev. 13:3) with a SWORD (Job 40:19; Heb. 4:12), and the "proud" here is the ["KING OF PRIDE"]{.class_3762} (Job 41:34) which is evident by the next verse: ["THE CROOKED SERPENT"]{.class_3762}! \[Don't look for it in any commentary written by any "defender of the faith" who overruled one word in the [AV ]{.class_3761}1611. If the chump you are reading corrected ["Easter"]{.class_3762} (Acts 12:4) with "passover" \[see Rice, Jones, [ASV]{.class_3761}, [NASV]{.class_3761}, etc.\], don't think for a minute that he will be able to handle the material. [God doesn't entrust these revelations with people who think they know more than Him.]{.class_3761})

"[By his spirit he hath garnished the heavens"]{.class_3760} (vs. 13) according to Psalm 33:6, 104:30, 148:5; and Isaiah 40:28. The heavens (note the plural---2 Cor. 12:1--5) are garnished with stars, planets, suns, moons, asteroids, dust clouds, etc.; but they are also garnished with ["principalities and powers"]{.class_3762} (Eph. 6:11--12) in ["heavenly places"]{.class_3762} (Col. 2:15) who are higher than the kings of the earth (Isa. 24:21) because they represent, in the heavens, the activities on earth (Dan. 10:13, 20). And who is sufficient for these things? Back of the superstitions of Astrology and Demonology lies a solid Biblical basis for the control of nations and persons by extraterrestrial sources (Dan. 10--11). (The Biblical system will only be solved when the material covered in Genesis chapters 30--31 has been worked out: See the comments on that section in that Commentary.)

"[His hand hath formed the CROOKED SERPENT"]{.class_3760} (vs. 13). There are three pictures of this ["serpent"]{.class_3762} garnishing the heavens. The first of these is HYDRA (the water snake) lying along the equator with its head raised. The second is DRACO under the foot of Hercules, and the third is CETUS, who has water (!) coming out of his mouth (Job 40:23) to swallow a WOMAN (Rev. 12:15)! (Ah yes! There is more in that [King James Bible ]{.class_3761}than meets the eye, or the telescope for that matter.)

"[The serpent"]{.class_3760} throws all of his children, allies, prisoners, representatives, and protectors into an uproar, and the following fracas ensues:

1\. The serpent has already been "pierced," not "formed"---the [Amplified Bible ]{.class_3759}(Lockman Foundation).

2\. There is no serpent at all but only "darkness." \[This is given as a suggestion by Jamieson, before he tells us that he "prefers" the [AV ]{.class_3759}(1611).)
