After all, Biblical knowledge is [advanced revelation]{.class_3759}; "scientific discoveries" are belated confirmations of [non-essential matters]{.class_3759}. There have been no "scientific discoveries" in the last 2,000 years that have prolonged life for anyone but the [rich ]{.class_3759}or have made life more tolerable for anyone but the [rich]{.class_3759}. America still eats 75 percent of the world's food, though she constitutes six percent of her population. You have money while you honor the Bible (see England, Germany, America, etc.); you lose your shirt (Africa, Asia, China, India, Russia, Mexico) when you honor the Vatican text of the [NASV]{.class_3759} or the multiple "gods" of the Orient. "Scientific discoveries" have nothing to do with any of it; never have and never will.

11\. ["Hast thou WALKED in the search of the depth?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 16). No, not even Dr. Bebee did that. In 1969, Piccard and Walsh touched down at 35,000 feet below sea level in the submarine "Trieste" while exploring the Mariana Trench. (The Mariana Trench is out by Saipan and Guam.) The pressure on the sphere was equal to the weight of five battleships. They found fish at this level, living in temperatures of thirty-eight degrees. Do you think that Walsh or Piccard got out and walked (see the text) around? Well, Job didn't either. Science, since Job, batted .000 in 2,000 innings on that one.

12\. ["Have the gates of death been opened unto thee?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 17). They were not opened to the faculty at Wheaton or the "translators" of the Lockman Foundation. In the ridiculous [NASV]{.class_3759}, promoted by these Bible-insulting institutions, one will find the Scriptural ["gates of Hell"]{.class_3760} (Matt. 16:18) privately interpreted to be "the [powers ]{.class_3759}of death": This is the official teaching of the Roman Catholic Church (see any work by the Knights of Columbus on the passage). Reading "POWERS" (or "power") for ["GATES"]{.class_3760} is the standard Roman Catholic dogma. Actually (according to the highly scientific King James text), Hell has gates and bars, keys and doors, and an inner earth location (if we are to believe Jonah 2:1--9 and Rev. 1:18).

The ["doors of the shadow of death"]{.class_3760} (vs. 17) are connected with this place, and we will stop here while we are still in the running; for once we are caught between the depths of the sea (vs. 16) and the breadth of the earth (vs. 18) where darkness dwells (vs. 19), and a ["death"]{.class_3760} that has gates which can open (Rev. 9:1) we are coming close to a "hollow earth" doctrine, and the kiddies at Piedmont, Dallas, Moody, Wheaton, Pillsbury, Fuller, Gordon-Conwell, and Westminster will hardly be able to keep pace with the "original text" no matter how "scientific" they are. With a possible "sun" INSIDE the earth (hello, Apollos) and maybe even rivers that cannot issue out of the two poles (ah yes! Job 38:8--9)---we will stop before all the Scripture babies (any translator or revisor on any Bible committee since 1800) fall off of the church bus. We have not seen the ["gates of death,"]{.class_3760} and the ["doors"]{.class_3760} have not been opened to us, although there are several eye witnesses who have claimed revelations that we will temporarily omit from this commentary. Suffice it to say that the Bermuda Triangle and the UFOs are underworld phenomena, not terrestrial phenomena or celestial phenomena.

13\. ["Hast thou perceived the breadth of the earth?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 18). Well, no one in Job's day had, although we know now that the earth is about 24,811 miles in circumference around the poles, and about 24,894 around its equator. The oceans cover more than 139 million square feet (70.8%) of the earth's total surface area, to an average depth of 12,500 feet.

14\. ["Where is the WAY where light dwelleth?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 19): Not "the PLACE" as we find it in the absurd "newer translations." The word ["way"]{.class_3760} was mistranslated to mean "place" in the [ASV, NASV, RSV, NRSV, Good News, New English Bible]{.class_3759}, and the [New International Bible ]{.class_3759}(and other apostate corruptions) because it is "verbotten" in the Scholars' Union for the [King James Bible ]{.class_3759}to be more accurate in scientific matters than [any scientist ]{.class_3759}of Job's time (or Columbus' time or King James' time). You see, light is always moving and has no real ["place," ]{.class_3759}unless that place is the third heaven (see Gen. 1:3--4 and comments), for ["the light dwelleth with HIM"]{.class_3760} (Dan. 2:22). Light does not ["dwell"]{.class_3760} (vs. 19) anywhere on earth. The reading, therefore, of the [ASV ]{.class_3759}(1901) and the [NASV ]{.class_3759}(1963) is an attempt to make God---[God is speaking ]{.class_3759}to Job, remember!?---comply with the "scientific brains" of 1800 B.C. God is not supposed to have enough sense to word the question the way it is worded in the Bible.

(In a great evangelistic conference in Indianapolis, Indiana, where a number of "celebrites" met, a notice was sent out which stated that no one in the conference could advertise or sell the [RSV]{.class_3759}, the [Living Bible]{.class_3759},[ Good News for Modern Man]{.class_3759}, or the translation by Phillips. Oddly enough, no mention was made of the [ASV ]{.class_3759}(1901), which is the Greek text of the [RSV]{.class_3759}, nor was any mention made of the [NASV ]{.class_3759}(1963), which is the Greek text for "Good News." The thinking behind all of this lying, double-tongued, two-faced flim-flam was that if [Liberals ]{.class_3759}are connected with a translation, it is "of the devil," no matter [what text ]{.class_3759}it came from. To cover up for this bunch of Bible-denying reprobates, John R. Rice wrote personal letters to prove that no Christian layman had any business investigating [any Greek text ]{.class_3759}to find out where ANY of the newer translations came from. You couldn't be any more dishonest and inconsistent if you were a Black KKK.)

15\. ["As for darkness, where is the place thereof]{.class_3760}\...[?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 19). Now darkness has a [place]{.class_3759}; it can be located, so the question is "where" does darkness stay? Until men got out into outer space no one could prove it, but late in the twentieth century, Job's question is answered.

16\. Can you take darkness to its boundaries and ["know the paths to the house thereof?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 20). Well, you can't if it is the ["land of darkness"]{.class_3760} spoken of by Job in Job 10:21--22. Furthermore, the boundary would be the bottom of the sea of glass we spoke of in 37:22 and 38:13--15, if it were a reference to the darkness of outer space. If the direction is UP (never mind the silly note in the [New Scofield Reference "Bible"]{.class_3759} under 2 Cor. 12:1--4), the boundary is north. If the direction is DOWN, then we are back in the hollow earth again; so we have to climb out before the astronauts find some opening in the north end.

17\. ["Knowest thou it, because thou wast then born?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 21). Obviously not, if you know about outer and inner darkness, you wouldn't have gotten the information because you were there, back in Genesis 1:2--4; you were NOT there.

18\. ["Or because the number of thy days is great?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 21). Obviously not. Job was older when he died than your great-grandfather, and he didn't know the answer. If you had to put your finger on a map of the universe and take ["darkness\...to the bound thereof,"]{.class_3760} (vss. 19--20) where would you stop pointing?

19\. ["Hast thou entered into the treasures of the snow?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 22). There are some there, you know; Dr. Schutt says that there are \$8.14 worth of nitrates, ammonia, and albuminoid in an acre of ground that has been covered with one inch of snow.

20\. ["The treasures of the hail, which I have reserved against the time of trouble, against the day of battle and war?"]{.class_3760} (vss. 22--23). If you were as ignorant as Kenneth Taylor or C. H. Dodd ([TLB ]{.class_3759}and [NEB]{.class_3759}), you might think that the hail was only for things like Joshua 10:11, and although this is true for the battle and war of [Revelation ]{.class_3759}11:19 (which Dodd and Taylor forgot!), one must never forget that the ["small hoar frost"]{.class_3760} (Exod. 16:14), which melted when the sun came up (Exod. 16), will be dumped out again (Micah 7:14 and comments) in the Tribulation (Rev. 12) to Israel so that they can eat without taking the "mark" (Lam. 5:9). (Ah the unsearchable riches of the Elizabethan English. How superior its archaic words are to "living bibles," and how infallible are its revelations when contrasted with "reliable translations.")

Still, snow and hail in the ["day of battle and war" ]{.class_3760}can turn a victory into a retreat and a defeat into a massacre. Readers of Stalingrad (Heinz Schroeder), [The Siege of Leningrad ]{.class_3759}(Ballantine Books), and [This Kind of a War ]{.class_3759}(Fehrenbach) know what snow can do to (or for) an army. When the five German divisions around Dmitrevka, Goroditche, Nov-Alexeyevka, Karpovka, and Baburkin were overrun (Nov. 15, 1942) by Russian tanks, streams of wounded soldiers had to escape eastward to Pitomnik and Gumrak. It had been snowing for weeks, and the temperature was eighteen below zero. The wounded crawled yard by yard till they froze to death or were hauled by their comrades on tarpaulins, boards, and ammunition cases. It began to snow again, and many of the lorries broke down on the road. [Fourteen thousand men ]{.class_3759}fell on that road, frozen by the icy wind; their life's blood congealed upon gangrenous wounds, and their bodies were crushed beneath the wheels of fleeing vehicles: Frozen bones crack like glass. In the night snow storm, the drivers could often not see a man (dead or alive) until their front tires hit him. Wounded men, screaming and cursing, tried to hang on to the tail gates of the lorries that passed them, but they were already full of wounded so that the "boarders" were either hammered off the tailgates, or the boarders succeeded in pulling wounded men out of the trucks who froze to death on the road.

The battalions that passed over the road to Pitomnik made six miles in twelve hours; those who survived often passed piles of dead, huddled together in a frozen ball, twenty to thirty men, with their blood-soaked bandages, blankets, and uniforms frozen into a solid mass. Many a man that night, or the next day, pulled off a boot and his foot with it; the frozen lower extremity [had broken off at the ankle]{.class_3759}. When two planes landed at Pitomnik to "evacuate" the wounded, it began to snow again; the wounded, trying to get a seat on the planes trampled each other and half of them were wounded again; twenty of them were killed in the stampede. Some moved faster than others, bursting through the ranks of those with "leg and foot injuries." Those trampled down into the snows did not scream anymore, but those who were unable to get into the plane after they got there were screaming; rifle butts were used by the guards to clear paths to the planes, but when the guards fought [their own way ]{.class_3759}to the doors, they threw away their weapons and jumped in. With cabin doors still open and forty men in a plane (that would hold twenty), the Junkers would take off. Those trying to hang on to the wings and tails of the planes were hurled off into the path of stretchers where other wounded still lay on the ground. One wretched soul retained his grasp on the icy wheels of a plane until it was 200 feet in the air, and then he fell.

When the last plane left the Gumrak airport (Nov. 19, 1943) headed for Germany, twenty-four men were pushed into a cabin built to hold [sixteen men]{.class_3761}, while nine men were left outside in the snow (fifteen below zero). To get room for the nine men still left outside they had to throw out cannisters, stretchers, lighting equipment, ammunition, bandages, and dressings. At this point, one Lance Corporal, standing in the door of the plane, jumped [out ]{.class_3761}and said to a wounded man, "Both my arms are broken, chum, but you can't even walk." He gave his place to the man on the ground, and they picked that cripple up and put him into the plane, leaving his "substitute" on the field. The machine was so full they had to hook a belt through the door handles for two men to hold because the door could not be closed. When that plane took off, a single, lonely soldier sat in the snow at Gumrak with the collars of his two overcoats turned up and a scarf knotted over his face. The pilot said that he had never seen a more lonely man than that Lance Corporal, sitting in the snow, head raised, staring at the sky while his salvation departed from him; it was the last plane that ever left Stalingrad for Germany. He could not even wave to the plane because his arms were broken. That pilot took off, circled the field (wasting valuable gasoline), and flew over, dipping his wings in a salute to that remarkably brave and unselfish German. There is no other case in military history where an aircraft circled [to salute one enlisted man.]{.class_3761}

"[Who can stand before his cold?"]{.class_3760} (Psa. 147:17).

The Russian tanks at Stalingrad (financed by Communists in America) were able to grind several thousand German soldiers into the ice, because, with temperatures in the twenty to forty degree below zero area, no one could "dig in." Not even a grenade or a mortar shell could "dig" a trench in ground that was frozen eight feet down. So when the tanks came over, they often just hunted down one man at a time. Did you ever try to run on icy ground, covered with eight inches of snow, while you were dressed in [boots ]{.class_3759}and [overcoat ]{.class_3759}and carrying forty to sixty pounds of equipment? Many of the men they chased were wounded and suffering from frostbite, and scores of them had fevers of 102 degrees or more, and many of them did not have winter uniforms.

The snow ["reserved against\...the day of battle and war"]{.class_3760} (vs. 23) is often the undoing of an army. Out of 500,000 men who marched to Moscow under Napoleon (1812), only 25,000 returned. The snowstorms and sub-zero weather of Russia killed ten times as many men as were killed by bullets in any battle Napoleon fought in Russia. A cloud comes on the sky and the air gets chilly; one of the soldiers feels a snowflake on his cheek. Soon the plumes of the officers are decked with white. The horses begin to find it hard to pull the supply trains; men begin to fall under fatigue; they lie down in drifts and never rise again. The snow keeps coming; it blinds the eyes, it stings the faces, it blocks the vision of the enemy, it clogs the feet of the infantry, it prevents accurate fire on targets, and it covers those who lay down in it to rest. The victor of Jena and Austerlitz must surrender to [the snow.]{.class_3759}

"[Who can stand before HIS cold?" ]{.class_3760}(Psa. 147:17).

Robert Gautchie survived fifty-eight days on a frozen lake near the Arctic circle (1975), in a stranded plane, with nothing to eat but raw frozen fish that could only be thawed out by draining fluid and gasoline from the plane. Every other day he would pace out letters (SOS) 150 feet high (from the air) on the snow-covered ice, but in less than two hours the snow drifts would cover them up. He saw four planes go over in fifty days, and not one of them spotted the flares he shot up. His transmitter would not work nor would his emergency "Sarah set"---a portable radio used to contact the Royal Canadian Air Force.

With frostbitten toes and gangrene setting in, Gautchie was picked up on the fifty-eighth day by a "Beaver" which had been delayed three and one half hours in its flight to a small camp. At exactly 6:10 A.M., the co-pilot of that plane "happened" to see sunlight reflecting off of the windshield of the stranded plane; thirty minutes sooner or [later ]{.class_3759}and he would have missed it, as the Arctic sun never rose high enough to shine directly on the plane. They landed and picked up a man who later lost five toes and had to go through weeks of hospitalization. Gautchie's "survival secret" was simple: He had a Christian wife praying for him at home, and she had gone on praying [thirty days ]{.class_3759}after the RCAF had given up the search!

Did you know that only thirty-nine tanks out of 104 in the German 204th Panzer Regiment (Battle of Stalingrad), could move on the morning of November 10, 1942, when some kind of a "breakout" could still have been made? Do you know what put sixty-five tanks out of commission? Well, the tank pits were covered with [straw]{.class_3759}, and in the severe cold the rats had nested in this straw and had entered the tanks and [chewed up the rubber insulation on the wiring]{.class_3759}. Several tanks caught fire from short circuits and sparking, and the ones that didn't couldn't be started. If that weren't enough, the Panzer Regiment had no "track sleeves" for winter operations; so the tanks slithered from one side of the icy roads to the other.

If you doubt that snow and hail can influence the battlefield, talk to the ragged remnant of 1950--1953 who fought in the Korean "police action"; ask them how it went. Ask some of those Marines who made that frozen, bloody trek from the Changjin Reservoir to Hungnam (Nov. 30--Dec. 11, 1950). Combat in the "cold" has penalties and tortures of its own that no other form of combat has: Frostbitten fingers that cannot load the clip; frozen gun barrels that will not fire the shell; fluid in vehicles that freezes and sticks the mechanism together; frozen toes and feet that eventually kill the man who walks on them; frostbitten ears that hurt when you try to thaw them out until you could scream; snow blindness that prevents you from seeing an enemy fifty feet away; clothes that stick to the ground overnight; dead bodies you can't bury because you can't turn the soil over; food you can't eat because you can't thaw it out; glasses that steam up from sweat and then freeze; fingers that cannot pull the trigger; stiff limbs that cannot react in time to dodge the bayonet or the knife; and miserable nights so cold that you cannot sleep even though you are too tired to stand up.

The worst damage done to the "flotilla" at Bikini Atoll was done by falling HAILSTONES, which were created by Atomic fission. In the winter of 1959, upstate New York was "hub cap deep to a ferris wheel" in snow. In 1888 (March), snow stopped traffic in Brooklyn, New York, Washington, and Richmond. On a winter day in Chicago (1962), the traffic moved at 11.7 mph. You say, "What made the difference?" Well, about ten inches of snow.

Curly Hollinger (Bay Minette, Alabama) was captured by the German 14th Army when he was fighting with the 45th Division at the Anzio Beachhead (February 16, 1944). The 45th was holding a line from Padiglione to the Anzio-Albano Road, and they took the headon charge of the German 715th Infantry Division, the 114th Light Infantry Division, and the 3rd Panzer Grenadier Division. For the next few weeks Curly marched north with the POW's. It got colder, and it began to snow. He caught pneumonia. As he marched in a ragged line of prionsers, he saw men hanging on fences who had their bellies ripped open with bayonets. He saw prisoners grabbing raw food by the roadside, and then they would start vomiting and writhing in pain; some of them died. On a cold snowy night, they stopped to sleep [outdoors ]{.class_3759}on the road. Curly lay down in a snow drift with his head full of mucous and a temperature of about 103 degrees. He lay down to die, knowing he would never survive that night. The snow covered him up, and more snow fell. When he plowed his way out of his "burrow" the next morning, he was [well]{.class_3759}.

(An examination of snowfalls in Siberia show that it is nearly eighty degrees warmer [under the snow ]{.class_3759}than above it; Alpine plants have been known to perish in the mild winter of England for lack of enough snow to keep them warm. Absolute Zero is 460 degrees below Fahrenheit, while the boiling point of water is about 212 degrees above the freezing point. Just think. If the freezing point had been four percent lower than 32 degrees it would rain at six degrees above zero. Ain't "evolution" wonderful?)

21\. ["By what way is the light PARTED, which scattereth the east wind upon the earth?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 24). It can be ["parted"]{.class_3760} with a prism of a "spectroscope," but God did not let any sinner find that out till long after He put the question to Job. To make sure that the Bible does not hint at anything in the future, the "new" translations (as old as Hell) have stated that the verse doesn't read this way, but should say "where is the path to, etc.," (see [ASV, NASV]{.class_3759}, etc.). Again (see note under verse 19), this is quite typical of the bloated, puffed-up egotists of 1880--1980, who fancy that the sun rises and sets on "modern science." If the reader doubts it, let him examine the remarks of Dr. Jan Lever---a born-again Christian who believes in the "Fundamentals."

"We can never derive from Scripture exact physical, astronomical and biological knowledge." In reference to Genesis, Dr. Lever says that it has no "concrete contact" with any investigation into physical life, and that the Scriptures do not "impart to us scientific data." In line with the modern Conservatives and Fundamentalists of the Laodicean church, Lever says that the Bible is not a "scientific treatise" about God's acts, and therefore Genesis cannot convey anything to us about nature in "scientific terms," etc. Neither did anything Lever ever read, wrote, said, or saw. "SCIENTIFIC" means truth that is [known to be truth]{.class_3761}. The Bible is the only SCIENTIFIC TREATISE on [life;]{.class_3761} [there are no others.]{.class_3761}

Now, the format above (cited from [Creation and Evolution]{.class_3759}, pp. 21, 56, 121, 139, and 214) is the standard format for fifty "bastions of Orthodoxy" in the United States. It is really just Kant's old rag-bag about "faith" being in one bracket and "science" being in the other so that "us intellectuals who deal with FACTS can always get the upper-hand over you dumb, Bible-believing people who only deal in FAITH." Well, we deal with more facts than "science" has access to, at least where those facts deal with the practical, major, historical issues. If "science" is slow in catching up to the Bible, that is their problem; but if you think for a minute that any of us are stupid enough to respect the "scholarship" or the "valid data" of men who have enough FAITH to believe in Ice Ages, Miocene, Pleistocene, Pliocene, Oligocene, and Eocene ages (or "periods"---don't confuse the issue with invented terminology), you are "Giganticopethicus Blacki!" (See Koenigswald, [Anthropology Papers]{.class_3759}, American Museum of Natural History, 1952, pp. 295--325.)

You see, the whole trend of Christian education (above the high school level) is to get you to respect the OPINIONS of these deluded asses (or their friends), or at least take note of their learning and intellectual achievements. If this can be done, the leaven has been inserted (Matt. 13:33), and it will not be long before you will be consulting these rascals for [advice]{.class_3759}. Shortly after that, you will be propagating their views [at the expense of the word of God]{.class_3759}. Don't ever doubt it for a minute; no man who ever "respected" the Biblical scholarship of Trench, Hort, Westcott, Vincent, Gregory, Tischendorf, Lachmann, Schaff, Robertson, Nestle, Aland, Metzger, or Wuest ever got off again with believing the [Bible ]{.class_3759}was the final authority: He substituted Christian education for the final authority. The less respect the Bible believer has for men who think they are smart enough to correct the Book, the better off he will be, and the better off his church and his nation will be. And don't give us this unholy gas about "at least we should give these men the [respect ]{.class_3759}due to their standing, because of their vast research and vast labors in\..." In WHAT, sonny? I said, "In WHAT?"[ Research in WHAT? ]{.class_3759}Isn't the truth of the matter that you are simply awed by a vocabulary you don't understand, and it was invented so you wouldn't understand it? What is THIS, for example---hieroglyphics?

Upper Cretaceous, Eocene, Creodonta, Condylarthra, Amblypoda, Taeniodonta, Fissipeda, Ungulata, Edentata, Hyracoidea, Probosecidea, Cetacea, Zeuglodontia, Pangolins, Aardvarks, Litoptenra, Typotheria, Entelodon, Mysidae, Toxodontia, Pyrotheria, Embrithopoda, Anamniota, Lymnaeidae, Cypraeidae, Rudista, Sirenia, Miohippus, Perissodactyla, Artiodactyla, Sinanthropus, Erinaceus, Meganthropus, Ephippidae, Palaeodictyoptera, Nasions, Parahippus, Nuculidae, Xenopithecus, Halichoerus, Pithecanthropidae, Palaeosimia, Hylapithecus, Naricas, Myriopoda, Velutinae, Palinuridae, Myxophyceae, Diplopoda, Pauropoda, Chilopoda, etc., etc.

Now, as you were saying: "\...vast researches in\...." [IN WHAT?]{.class_3759}

Don't you get the message yet? ["Have ye yet no understanding?"]{.class_3760}

The men who [invented ]{.class_3759}these names to match the Disneyland figments of their depraved imaginations thought that ["Leviathan"]{.class_3760} (Job 41:1) was a [crocodile]{.class_3759}. So did Custer, Westcott, Hort, and Dr. A. T. Robertson.

Do you get the message yet?

The men who memorized the list you just read thought ["Behemoth" ]{.class_3760}(Job 40:15) was a [hippopotomus]{.class_3759}! So did Vincent, Trench, Schaff, and Tischendorf.

Now, when will you get it through your thick, stupid, unbelieving head that the last 50,000 scholars who corrected the [King James Bible]{.class_3759}---from ANY field of human endeavor (science, philosophy, physics, biology, paleontology, archaeology, religion, psychiatry, or socialism)---spent the majority of their time trying to make an ASS out of you and a clown out of God!?

Now tie that down. Keep it where you can look at it. And when some educated idiot begins to hound you about "Brother Ruckman," or "Pete Ruckman," being "disrespectful of scholarship," etc., ask him: "Disrespectful of WHAT?" Or, to practise what some of these meatheads preach, put yourself in my shoes for awhile and consider that after a proper amount of time studying the theories and findings of Sir Albert Seward, Walcott, Metzger, Gregory, Raymond, Barrett, Cayeux, Lawson, Darwin, E. S. Moore, Pompecki, C. E. Van Grundy, Daly, R. S. Baseler, G. Stiasny, W. K. Brooks, Grabau, Bradley, Lamarck, Laley, Lyell, Huxley, Nietzche, De Vries, Bateson, Rhodes, Goldschmidt, Simpson, Medawar, Lysenko, Tobias, Price, Zuckerman, Popper, Heisenberg, Schwindwolf, Einstein, Bergson, Reichenbach, Russell, Davies, Schilder, Morris, Nelson, Rommer, Smith, Pattern, Nuttal, and Newman (where they speak of evolution and creationism), and then carefully studying Rimmer, Larkin, Pember, Scofield, Stam, Bullinger, Ironside, Pieters, Pentecost, Wuest, Nee, Thieme, Vincent, Trench, Pettingill, Joe Smith, Russell, Rutherford, M. E. White, Armstrong, Robertson, Gregory, Davis, Burgon, Dake, Miller, Scrivener, Westcott, Hort, Dollinger, Lightfoot, Ellicott, Newell, Alford, Farrar, Eusebius, Schaff, Newman, Gesenius, Lange, Henry, Clarke, Keil, Wellhausen, Barnhouse, Newell, Weiss, Seiss, Baxter, Cronin, Darby, Morgan, Kant, Astruc, Plato, Socrates, Leibnitz, Aristotle, Dewey, Hegel, Bacon, Descartes, Tillich, Kierkegaard, Graf, Brunner, Barth, Rauschenbusch, Schleirmacher, and Zen Buddhism (where they speak of the Scriptures or philosophy or "reality"), how would you feel if some nut tried to convince you that because he knew that "man" was neither truly "nidifugous or nidicolous" that he himself was "scholarly?" What would you do? Laugh or go to sleep?

I mean, the very idea of some amateur like the faculty members of Dallas or the University of Chicago trying to impress us when they alter the [King James ]{.class_3759}text. Who are you trying to impress, sonny, someone as green and naive as you are?

I mean, after giving careful attention to most of the literature on Astronomy and Abnormal Psychology, and much of the literature on Chemistry, Geology, and Archaeology; plus the esoteric literature on UFOs, space ships, ESP, TM, the wisdom of the Rosicrucians, black magic, demonism, Satanism, clairvoyance, the cults, the Sutras, Shastas, Puranas, Tripitaka, and the Koran; plus the handbooks on masonry, carpentry, hunting, fishing, boating, camping, and survival; plus the literature on World War I and II, the Civil War, the Korean War, the Vietnam War, the campaigns of Alexander, Baibars, Hannibal, Napoleon, Saladin, Frederick, and Gustavus Adolphus; plus the literature by Shaw, Lord, Leckie, Remarque, Heinrich, Catton, Critchell, Mailer, Jones, Cope, Craig, Woulk, Cochester, Michene, Laurence, Middleton, Yank Magazine, Churchill, Bowman, Stiles, Van Praag, Casey, the Ballatnine Series, Myrer, Shirer, Wyeth, West, Dawes, Henderson, Goss, Freeman, Mauldin, Pyle, Forsyth, Poert, Hinman, Trobrian, Pullen, Lewis, Wallace, Livermore, Bowman, Lamb, Bulwer, Garrett, and Hemingway; plus the literature on Karate, Judo, close combat, hand-to-hand fighting, infantry weapons and tactics; plus the literature on drawing, popular and classical music, art techniques, sculpture, opera, symphony; and the theologies of Calvin, Anselm, Aquinas, Chafer, Strong, Berkhof, Dabney, Kuyper, Hodge, and O'Leary; and then plowing through forty-two Bible commentaries and forty church histories numbering over 200 volumes, plus six different Greek Testaments, what do you think a man like ME is going to do when some naive, superstitious muttonhead says, "We should RESPECT the labors of these men because of their untiring efforts to\...." To do WHAT, doctor? Make mud pies? String beads? Cut out paper dolls?

Why, children, if that [King James Bible ]{.class_3759}cannot thoroughly correct any 20,000 writers who ever wrote about ANYTHING mentioned above (directly or indirectly),[ I wouldn't waste time to break in the binding on it.]{.class_3759}

If the combined faculty members of the ten highest rated universities in the world were to combine their knowledge and enforce it with a World Court, they could no more compete with a [King James Bible ]{.class_3759}(when it comes to absolute truth) than a cockroach could compete with a German Shepherd in taking care of a bank. [Truth ]{.class_3759}is not about to yield to some half-baked upstart who thinks that brick-and-mortar monuments are greater than the eternal [truths ]{.class_3759}of God's eternal word. Where 30,000 authors alter the Book, you alter them. Do it at once, and do it without regard for their training, background, upbringing, breeding, scholarship, or education. "Respect" is out of the question. If they want our respect, let them keep their defiled, unbelieving hands off of our Book.

Now the ["light"]{.class_3760} of verse 24 is said to scatter ["the east wind upon the earth"]{.class_3760} (vs. 24, cf. Job 28:26.) For this reason Clarke and others take it to be lightning which scatters the "eastern storm" (p. 171). If the verse is taken in this fashion, no one knows the[ "way"]{.class_3760} the light is parted, for no one knows why lightning takes the zig-zag form it takes. (No, you don't get rid of it by, "Oh the plus and minus charges, etc.") There isn't an electrician alive who can tell what causes positive and negative charges. You say, "Magnetism." And what is "magnetism," doctor? No, don't tell us. It's like "GRAVITY," isn't it? (You see, it is as we have stated the matter. You invent words to impress people, and just so the word can't be found in the Bible, it will do. Imagine these hucksters and hamsters who make their living by substituting "reliable translations" for the word of God, telling us that we should "respect their scholarship" or the scholarship of some linguistic specialist simply because he had a reputation for "accredited, scientific, validated research!" The theory of evolution is nothing but philosophical speculation, the depraved fantasy of heathen imagination. The theories of Westcott and Hort, used to justify Aland and Metzger's text at Bob Jones University, are the same brand. There is less evidence that the "best Greek" text was used by the [ASV ]{.class_3759}and the [NASV, ]{.class_3759}or that they were "reliable" manuscripts, than the evidence presented by Haeckel on "embryonic recaptiulation.")

22\. ["Who hath divided a watercourse for the overflowing of waters\...to cause the bud of the tender herb to spring forth"]{.class_3760} (vss. 25, 27). Since Adam Clarke cannot see "how the overflowing or torrents of water can be said to ascend any other way than by evaporation" (p. 171), he limits the passage to a regular cloud and a regular rainstorm. Since we are never particularly concerned with Bible rejectors who "can't see how" or who "see how," we shall look beyond the obvious application of the next two verses and understand that the "overflowing of the waters" occured TIDALLY in the time of Noah (see [The Genesis Flood]{.class_3759}, Whitcomb, and [The Ice Age Epoch]{.class_3759}, Patten), and COSMICALLY (Gen. 1:2) when the earth sank through space. (No, there is no "Gap theory" in Gen. 1:2, and 2 Pet. 3:6 is no more the flood of Noah's day than your bird pond.)

A way is created for the ["lightning of the thunder"]{.class_3760} as we have remarked under Job 37. The ["desolate and waste ground"]{.class_3760} (vs. 27) does have tender herbs, and it does bud, even in the desert. In the deserts of Africa, one will find the blue Kleina; in the deserts of Mexico, one will find the Mexican Sedum. In addition, the desert is often covered with a carpet of brilliant colored flowers right after a rain: white Daisies, purple Nama, yellow Eriophyllum, and the blooms from barrel cactus, hedgehog cactus, and beavertail cactus.

Furthermore, the thunder and lightning do ["cause it to rain"]{.class_3760} (vs. 26), for the explosion for the gases (hydrogen and oxygen) is instrumental in breaking up cloud formations. And all of this is still beside the point; the original question was ["WHO"]{.class_3760} (vs. 25) did these things? No modern materialist or atheist could answer the question, for his question would assume at the start---from the standpoint of a "reactionary bigot"---that the only proper question could be: "WHAT hath divided\..." (vs. 25). But consider. What is the point, anyway, in decorating the whole surface of the earth and the bottoms of the seas with myriads of plants, microbes, marine animals, flowers, shurbbery, insects, and rocks? Is there a man reading this, who spends any time in hunting, who has not found beautiful plants and shrubs (or tiny animals) outside, on the "backside of the boondocks," where no human eye would see them once every 500 years or more? Lie down on your face sometime out in the woods; lie down in some wild grass or dead leaves and take a good look at the activity that God sees every day in 20,000,000 places that no man has looked at ONCE (see vs. 39 and comments). If you had to take care of all the "critters" that God takes care of every twenty-four hours, wouldn't you be ready for the funny farm? The question is: "WHO takes care of these animals and plants?" The question is not: "WHAT takes care of them?" (But Darwin, Haegel, Freud, Marx, Huxley, Sartre, Einstein, Heidegger, and the United Nations never could get it right, and they never will.)

God Almighty, the Creator of the world (Heb. 1:2--4) and the ["Father of lights"]{.class_3760} (James 1:17), waves His hand in Infinity (Psa. 147:4) and showers forth 10,000 galaxies that His creatures could not find in 5,000 years of recorded history. He breathes on the ocean expanses (Gen. 1:20), and the swarms of living creatures spawn forth from it until 500 oceanographers, working eight hours a day for 100 years, haven't been able to catalogue all of them yet. He creates bright red fish whose scales camouflage them from nothing---see the ridiculous teaching of any evolutionist on "environmental adaption." He created animals that can't move fast enough to escape their prey, and some of them have no hard "coverings," inky clouds, sharp teeth or claws, or even poisonous auras. A man who talks about the "survival of the fittest" and "progressive evolution" is not a man to whom any "respect" should be shown, at least no more than you would show to a twelve year old newsboy. Be [polite, ]{.class_3759}but don't get carried away with a lot of bunko. And while speaking of [respect]{.class_3759}, we all agree (I am sure!) that we should respect one another enough not to force each other to go to schools we don't want to go to---[don't "we"]{.class_3759}? And we all agree that we should "respect" one another enough not to curse and tell dirty jokes on the job in front of men who are offended by either---[don't we]{.class_3759}? And of course we all "agree" (you just betcher booties, "we" do!) that we should "respect" one another enough to let Bible-believing preachers get as much TV and radio time as Catholic priests and Liberals---[don't "we"]{.class_3759}? And in dealing with such kind, loving, polite, broadminded, tolerant people, are we to "respect" the scholarship of any man who believes the prune juice that James, Dewey, Russell, Marx, Sartre, Ramm, Heidegger, Darwin, and Tillich dished out? Oh, com'on, man. Get off it. God has made thousands of animals (birds, fishes, and mammals) who have horns to [handicap ]{.class_3759}them running through the woods (deer), bright colors so they can be [seen ]{.class_3759}and [shot ]{.class_3759}better (birds), and no teeth or hard shells so they can be [eaten better ]{.class_3759}(shad minnows and shrimp); and the ones who survived the longest (400,000,000 to 800,000,000 years, according to Einstein---give or take a few hundred million) had no teeth, no shells, no camouflage, and no means of locomotion to carry them two feet in an hour. (Amoebas aren't exactly "highly complex" forms of "higher life.")

What is this fish doing with a fishing pole growing out of his head, where he can dangle "bait" before a smaller fish? What is this silly looking thing doing with warts and moles all over his body, which is as soft and slimy as a wet pollywog? What is this wretched thing I pull up on my line that is half snake and half eel? Every time he shows up the white trout (weak fish) leave. What is this ribbon-like thing I pull up, with teeth like a Tyrannosaurus and a silver hide (no scales) that shimmers and shines in the sun like a sword blade? You say, "The Ichthyologists tell us\...." Yea, but [WHO ]{.class_3759}made the thing and [WHY]{.class_3759}?

I don't care if you classify and reclassify your Phyla, Sub-phyla, and species in your "Taxonomy" until you look like a computerized zoo; you can't tell me that "mother nature" did all that stuff just so each species would "fit" its environment or be "adapted" to its habitat. And if good old mother nature did, wouldn't she be a dunce? Boy, you talk about wasting resources. You talk about extraneous "redundancy." If thirty-five birds can all live in the same temperate zone and all thirty-five of them eat the same type of food in that zone, what is the point in coloring thirty of them differently, unless someone likes "color" and gets a kick out of a "variegated palette?"

Hasn't it ever struck some of you that the real purpose behind the myriads of variations existing in the flora, fauna, and animal life is to demonstrate an Almighty hand that can do anything? Now there is a thought. God says, "Whattchee here!" BLAM! There it is (Gen. 1). And you could no more reduplicate it (Job 40:10) than you could get by the White Throne Judgment in your own righteousness. Tell us, doctor, why the pepsis wasp has to have a dead tarantula for an incubator before she lays her eggs? There are pepsis wasps all over the desert, yet there are over 2,000,000 people in Arizona, New Mexico, and Texas who have never seen one lay an egg. What were all of these variations for? To look at? Who looks at them?

23\. ["Hath the rain a FATHER? or who hath begotten\...?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 28). The answer of the natural scientist (and we do mean "natural") to this question is: "The rain does not have a 'father,' and no one 'begat' the 'dew.'" ["Professing themselves to be wise"]{.class_3760} (Rom. 1), the materialists took the very information which God let them find (Rom. 1) and then used it to prove that God had no part in it (1 Cor. 1:21). ["Professing themselves to be wise, they became fools"]{.class_3760} (Rom. 1:22). Nor do the modern Christian educators manage much better. In their zeal to add 2,000,000 dollars to the last 3,000,000, they uphold their school as the final authority, and ["professing themselves to be wise"]{.class_3760} (1 Cor. 3:19--20), their scholars take the very information which God lets them find (Luke 10:21) and use it to prove that God had no part in it (Psa. 12). But it is God who giveth ["the dew of heaven"]{.class_3760} (Gen. 27:28), and the ["dew of heaven FROM ABOVE"]{.class_3760} (Gen. 27:39) is never to be set aside by such flippant remarks as "The [AV ]{.class_3759}is wrong; dew comes from the ground." (See Exod. 16:13, 15, and comments.) When God says that ["the HEAVENS shall give their dew"]{.class_3760} (Zech. 8:12), He is not to be set aside simply because some nincompoop (whose "scholarship" is supposed to be respected) doesn't like the [King James Bible]{.class_3759}. Three concurrent sources of dew are recognized ([American Encyclopedia]{.class_3759}, Vol. 9, p. 44), and the first of these is the "condensation of the moisture of the ATMOSPHERE."

God has a way of using His words the way He wants to use them, since He is the author of all real scientific truth and He ALONE wrote the only "scientific" textbook in print which never has to be altered to match "the findings of science." ["Dew,"]{.class_3760} in the Bible, is used throughout to stand for [drops of condensed vapor]{.class_3759}, and these drops can occur in clouds (Prov. 3:20) or foggy atmospheres (Psa. 133:3) or as dew that comes from plants on the ground (Isa. 26:19). Never alter the [AV ]{.class_3759}text with Hebrew or Greek simply to match the demands of some half-batty Fundamentalist who is worried about what educated people will think of him if he doesn't [attack the Bible.]{.class_3759}

24\. ["Out of whose womb came the ice? and the hoary frost of heaven]{.class_3760}\...[?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 29). Answer: "The expressions are figurative and cannot be answered by refering to a PERSON. The question should be: 'WHAT causes ice and frost?'" (See how it is done?) But this doesn't get around the question, for notice what follows: ["The waters are hid as with a stone, and the FACE OF THE DEEP is frozen"]{.class_3760} (vs. 30). Since not one scientist---including any saved scientist in California engaged in research in "Catastrophic Geology"---ever even located ["the face of the deep"]{.class_3760} (see Gen. 1:2-3 and comments), how could an unsaved sinner answer the question? The saved scientists (Morris, Rimmer, et al.) will not believe the first four verses in Genesis; so how in the world could they begin to answer a question concerning ICE that was connected with the "Deep"? If the ["ice"]{.class_3760} (vs. 29) is the ice deposited around the "Van Allen" belts from outer space (see Patten, Ibid.), no scientists (saved or lost) before 1960 could have answered the question if the question had been "WHAT causes ice to come\...etc!"

That isn't all. Why doesn't water obey the laws of expansion and contraction? Why does it expand under cold and contract under heat, and the other elements do not? A man says, "Well, the atomic structure of the chemical elements (H[2]{.class_3770}O) is of such a nature that\..." Yes, but you are not going to tell us [why there is so much variety ]{.class_3761}(see above). Why not have everything expand and contract on the [same principles]{.class_3761}? How did "mother nature" get so fickle and capricious that she decided to have water follow one law and lead another one? And what is Venus doing spinning the wrong way on her axis (clockwise)? Why can't the moon turn on its axis?

Now, the scientists have a lot of pretty little "pat answers" on these things which they derive from "laws." However, these same fools (Rom. 1:22) will flatly reject [their own laws ]{.class_3759}when these laws clearly indicate that "progressive evolution" or "spontaneous generation" are pipe dreams. The First and Second Law of Thermodynamics (adopted by all Evolutionists) would [forbid ]{.class_3759}any evolutionist from believing in evolution. So, what do they do when they find a scientific law that goes against their theories? They [annul the law ]{.class_3759}and go on looking for "facts" to support the "THEORY." But, you understand, you are to trust these birdbrains when they give you an answer based on "the laws of physics" dealing with planetary motions and celestial phenomena. How do you know that God just didn't jam the whole works in Genesis 1:2 and again in Genesis 6? Like He will do AGAIN in Revelation 19--20?

"[The face of the deep,"]{.class_3760} for example, ["is FROZEN"]{.class_3762} (vs. 30) because it is at absolute zero (460 degrees below zero) to form a crystalized "firmament" (Rev. 4, 14) with the properties of fire (Rev. 15:2). Nor do we ever have to make any allowances or "adjustments" about these matters, although science will constantly demand them of us as she "progresses" with "ever new discoveries" of "hidden, blah, blah, blah, etc." The [King James Bible ]{.class_3761}will state the scientific FACT, and if you catch up with it in a lifetime, you will be doing better than average; and if you don't, it won't change one letter to meet the demands of some reactionary bigot who thinks a Greek or Hebrew lexicon is more accurate.

Surgeons did everything but jail a physician in Vienna, back in 1850, for teaching that germs stay on a surgeon's hands if he doesn't wash them in running water (Lev. 14). If they had caught up to (not "back to") the [King James ]{.class_3759}1611 Bible in 1850, they would not have talked like a bunch of bigoted, narrow-minded, archaic jackasses, [and they would have saved 90 percent more of their patients. Back to the Bible or back to the jungle:]{.class_3759} Take your pick. "Back to the Catholic Greek text of [Vaticanus]{.class_3759}" (see any text put out by Aland, Metzger, Bob Jones, Westcott, Hort, Wuest, or Nestle) is not a third option. Vaticanus was written in Africa by an African church (Latin) for African scholars (Augustine and Origen), and it is as close to the "JUNGLE" as you can get without disappearing into the vines.

25\. ["Canst thou bind the sweet influences of Pleiades or loose the bands of Orion?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 31). The Pleiades are seven stars in the Constellation of Orion; they make their appearance in spring. Orion is the "giant" of the constellations, and it can be seen off and on from October to January. The question God asks Job is simple: "Can you make spring stay all through summer, and can you take off the bonds of winter from nature?" No man can. No man ever has, and no man ever will. And whether you "air-condition" all summer to ["bind the sweet influences"]{.class_3760} (vs. 31), or whether you heat electrically all winter to ["loose the bands"]{.class_3760} (vs. 31), you will run out of energy, your electric bill will double every five years, your body will get filled with poisons from not sweating, your land and crops will lie under snow in the winter and drought in the summer, and you are a blank fool to think you can trifle with God (or the [Book of Job]{.class_3759}) just because you imagine that "science" has done anything since Cain killed Abel (see Gen. 3-4 and comments).

Orion appears on the southern horizon and slightly westward throughout the winter. Bullinger wrongly marks the "strong one" as the "coming Prince," referring to Jesus Christ, but this is grossly in error. "Scorpio," for example, is not "the Redeemer's conflict," and a crab ("Cancer") no more represents the "Messiah's position held fast" (p. 18) than it represents the underground passages of the Chase National Bank. The stars which make up Canis Minor no more represent "the victorious, conquering Redeemer" (Bullinger, p. 18) than they represent the John Birch Society. Crabs and dogs are [unclean animals ]{.class_3759}(Lev. 11), according to the infallible definition given by the [Creator ]{.class_3759}of dogs and crabs. The Lord Jesus Christ, in His suffering and atonement, is likened to a worm (Psa. 22) and a serpent (John 3), but never to dogs or crabs; "dogs" attack Him when he is dying (Psa. 22:16). Get your Bible straight.

Kesil (Orion) also means "the FOOL," so the typology is indisputable; the Redeemer was never a "fool," but there is a fool and a "foolish man" in Job 5:2--3; Proverbs 17:12, 24, 18:2, 6--7; Luke 12:20; and Zechariah 11:15 (check out that last one) who could well be a giant (Gen. 6:2--6), and he might even be GIGANTOPETHICUS BLACKI. (If the last reference is a little obscure, consult your nearest university anthropology professor or biology professor---preferably one who is a member of the NEA and well read on current hallucinations.) The giants have been here before; they were FOOLS when they were here, and any reader of the infallible text knew that in 1700, 1750, 1800, 1850, and 1900, before any atom was split, before any trips were made to the moon, and long before Velikovsky or Van Daniken were old enough to make guesses regarding any history of the earth. You don't go [forward ]{.class_3759}with science; you go BACKWARD.

Furthermore, "Orion" will be bound literally (see Rev. 20:1--2), and you could not "loose his bands" if you had access to the lost wisdom of Atlantis, the hidden wisdom of the Martians, ESP, TM, an astrological computer, and an I.Q. of 170. Nor could you loose the bands of the "giants" who are now bound in ["chains of darkness"]{.class_3760} (2 Pet. 2:4); nor could your professors (saved or lost) find any of those cross-references in any Greek or Hebrew text unless we showed them where they were. ["The bands of Orion,"]{.class_3760} the mighty hunter (see Gen. 10:9), is a reference to scientific fact so far beyond the reach of the contents of the Library of Congress, at this point (1974), that you would waste your time trying to find the material.

26\. ["Canst thou bring forth Mazzaroth in his season?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 32). The reference is probably to the twelve signs of the Zodiac (Virgo, Libra, Scorpio, Sagittarius, Capricornus, Aquarius, Pisces, Aries, Taurus, Gemini, Cancer, and Leo). Most commentators suppose that the Hebrew scribe has erred and written "[resh]{.class_3759}" for "[lamed]{.class_3759}" in the Hebrew---[Mazzaluth]{.class_3759} (Gesenius, p. 462). In this case, the meaning would be: "Can you bring forth each one of the signs of the Zodiac out of his 'house' at the time he is due, or can you make the sun pass through this 'house' or dwelling place, at each season?"

However, there is something much deeper than this in the passage, for Orion (vs. 31) is so clearly a picture of the Antichrist that only Biederwolf, Payne, Pember, Larkin, Kirban, Lindsey, Von Daniken (keep on, make your own list) could miss it. Sticking with the Bible text, we would have this: "Can you bring forth the constellations of the Zodiac in HIS season---Lucifer's." (Notice how the [Vulgate ]{.class_3759}jumps at this interpretation and writes the word "Lucifer" down in verse 32.) The modern [Masoretic Bible ]{.class_3759}has translated the possessive as "their" seasons, to match the interpretation given by most commentators. However, the Hebrew is "[בצתו]{.class_3779}["---]{.class_3786}the third person SINGULAR, masculine. In view of the events which will take place in Isaiah 13 and Revelation 6 (and 16:1--10), the "Mazzaroth" will NOT come in their seasons, nor will they be even visible at times during the reign of Orion, the mighty hunter.

27\. ["Canst thou guide Arcturus with his sons?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 32). Arcturus is Ursa Major ("The Big Bear"), which includes what we call "the Big Dipper." This constellation is also called "the bier" in Arabic, and the three stars which comprise the handle of the Big Dipper are called, "the daughters of the beir." Here, the expression ["his sons"]{.class_3760} (vs. 32) is supposed to refer to these three stars, but again, we are dealing with more than Arabic roots or even astronomy. Any man who spotted the BEAR of Daniel chapter 7 and the BEAR of Revelation chapter 13 and the BEAR of Amos 5:19 knows better than to "wish upon a star" and think positive thoughts about "bears!" When the Lord says that He will tear Israel to pieces like a "bear bereaved of her whelps," He is talking about somebody's "sons," and they are not "the sons of God," in the sense of John 1:12. The ["ranging BEAR"]{.class_3760} of Proverbs 28:15 comes on the scene, connected with a Lion four times (Prov. 28:15; Dan. 7:5; Rev. 13:2; and 1 Sam. 17:35). Not in one instance is anything expressed "positively" about "redemption" (Bullinger, Ibid.) or "sharing your religious experience." A ranging bear is about as constructive and "helpful" as a forest fire.

28\. ["Knowest thou the ordinances of heaven?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 33). No, not even if you have waded through LaPlace, Kepler, Newton, Copernicus, Patten, Einstein, Price, Nelson, Velikovsky, and the "pulps." The landings on the moon did not solve one important question for mankind that wasn't solved in the Book of Proverbs and Job. The "findings of lunar rock" didn't contribute one iota of evidence for evolution (of any kind), although that was why the \$25,000,000,000 was spent in the first place. Outside of providing philosophical food for speculative fanatics---granted that some of them make a good living off of it---there has been no discovery (or discoveries) by anyone for 3,000 years that have enabled man to know the ORDINANCES of heaven. In 1978 they are still guessing origins of the solar system, the origins of life on earth, the origins of stars, the composition of stars, the origin of the universe, and "life on other planets." The best astronomer you know doesn't know enough about the "heavens" to tell you how to get to any star in them or what to do after you get there.

You don't know why Venus goes one way and Mars goes another. You don't know why our atmosphere turned out differently than those of Neptune and Pluto. You don't know what happened to Vulcan or Typhon. You don't know if the stars have been up there for 400,000,000,000 years, and if you had to prove it by the speed of light, you could no more prove it than prove that Uranium proves the age of this earth. If you had seen Adam (Gen. 2), you would have sworn on a stack of "living bibles" that it had taken that man thirty years to arrive in the condition you saw him, and you would have been just as wrong as if you had stated the earth was 1,000,000,000 years old. God made everything in the universe so that it had the [appearance ]{.class_3759}of age; Adam was born "growed."

You don't know why some Nebulas are dark and others are not; you don't know where the empty place over the North is; you don't know why stars represent angels (and vice versa); you don't know how creatures move up and down in outer space (Eph. 6) without UFOs of any kind; and you don't know how God can know everything that is happening on this earth, down to the activity of sparrows (Matt. 10:31), while at the same time He is keeping track of galaxies beyond the reach of your telescope.

And if you DID understand the physical ordinances of heaven, would you know the moral and spiritual ordinances?

29.["Canst thou set the dominion thereof IN THE EARTH?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 33). Five hundred million Roman Catholics have been praying ["thy kingdom come, thy will be done IN EARTH as it is in HEAVEN"]{.class_3760} (Matt. 6:10) through ten centuries of killing, torturing, burning, and murdering Bible believers; did the dominion ever come? These silly Postmillennialists (all Communists and Socialists), who believe man can bring in a perfect kingdom by his own self-effort, have been talking about "bringing in the Kingdom" ever since the great, Bible-rejecting evolutionist, St. Augustine, keeled over and sank in the fog of Neo-Platonism. Did you ever bring it in? "His truth is marching on," is it? You "had a dream," did you (M. L. King Jr.)? Can you set the dominion thereof on the EARTH? You say, "We're working on it." So did Napoleon, Marx, Charlemagne, Angela Davis, Alexander, Pope Urban, Louis XIV, Pepin, Bloody Mary, Castro, Hitler, Lenin, Stalin, Roosevelt, Mao Tse-tung, Ho Chi Minh, and Abbie Hoffmann. You say, "Pete Ruckman, you are being sarcastic; not all of those people thought\...." Well, that shows what a greenhorn YOU are, doesn't it? [Every man and woman in that list had a plan for improving world conditions; every one of them was sincere in his belief that his plans would make the world a better place to live in, and every one of them honestly believed that killing,]{.class_3759} [lying, stealing, and swearing falsely were perfectly justifiable if they attained the good ends which he had in mind. ]{.class_3759}No unsaved leader (religious, political, military, scientific, or educational) ever looked at matters any differently.

You say, "We shouldn't despair! Don't give up hope! If we can just all 'get together'\...." And make the black people white? And the white people black? And the Catholics Protestant and the Protestants Catholic? And all the men womanly? Right? Isn't that about it? Make the Orientals Occidental and the Occidentals Oriental? Right? Make the poor folks rich and the rich folks poor, the adults juvenile and the juveniles adult, and then call evil good and good evil, and\...!

Are THOSE the ["ordinances of heaven"]{.class_3760} (vs. 33)? Can you prove it?

There isn't a religious or political leader (living or dead) who could answer either of Job's questions in the affirmative (Job 38:33). (See [The Sure Word of Prophecy]{.class_3759}, 1970.)

30\. ["Canst thou lift up thy voice to the clouds, that abundance of waters may cover thee?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 34). If you could, there are 200,000,000 people waiting to pay you your own price. When the good old Communist FDR brought the beer back in, the wind blew western Oklahoma and western Kansas into the dust bowl. On one of those vast wastes in the Dakotas (1933), which used to be a farm, a gruesome sign was erected. It said: "You gave us BEER, now give us WATER." FDR couldn't give them water; neither can you.

When God turns off the spigot of His water courses in the Great Tribulation (James 5:17), you can lift your voice to Venus and back by means of "teleframus- flimstratographicionized-electroscopic-lasernontics," and you will still breathe dust (1 Kings 17:7). "Science" has never solved one major problem man ever had, and it never will; science is a clown. Science has "proven conclusively" that if your grandfather and your great-grandfather had no children, you won't have any either. At its best, science has been able to improvise a few gadgets to keep some rich people alive a few weeks longer, and allow some rich people to move about more than they would have. At its worst, science has been responsible for more destructive, violent killing nonsense than any medium on earth outside of the news media and religion, and both of these sources tend to make a god out of "science."

31\. ["Canst thou send lightnings, that they may go, and say unto thee, Here we are?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 35). Ben Franklin (1706--1790) and A. G. Bell (1847--1922) finally got around to it, but you'll have to admit that twenty-six centuries is a pretty good "lag" behind "scientific fact." Tamed electricity finally produced a telephone where someone could ["say unto thee, Here we are,"]{.class_3760} but Job couldn't answer the question any more than Franklin or Bell could answer the question God put to Job in verse 4: What is "electricity"? "Well, you see, when the magnet turns inside the coil of wire, the electrons\...."

"But, I mean what is that MAGNETISM you keep talking about?"

"Well, magnetism is kind of like GRAVITATION!"

So, we always come in where we go out and vice versa. The modern attitude is "Well, it works, and look at all we have done with it (pragmatism), so who cares how it comes about?" Well, how did the human race get along for 5,000 years without it? Is there any evidence that Dollinger and Eusebius had any more trouble with their eyes, while writing their histories, than La Tourette or Newman? Is there any more evidence that Nathaniel Bedford Forrest and Charlemagne were any punier than Larry Csonka or General Patton because of their lack of automobiles? What proof is there that John Wesley and Charles Wesley were more carnal than Billy Graham or Dave Wilkerson, even though they didn't have radio and TV? If Ohn (1878--1854), Faraday (1791--1867), Morse (1791--1872), Marconi (1874--1937), Edison (1847--1931), and Steinmetz (1865--1923) had never messed with the stuff, could you have had an Atom bomb? Cancer through TV tube rays? Intercontinental ballistic missiles?

A friend of mine was black as a cinder after 3,000 volts hit him while he was painting a roof on a church. A man in Dayton, Ohio, had his arms melted and welded to his sides by a jolt; he was left for dead, leaning on a tree, and a nurse got him "alive" again after four hours work on him. A man shocked in Cincinnati had his hair blown clear through his hat, and one hand and one foot blown off his arm and leg. A man here in Pensacola got 440 volts through his body, and it looked like someone had gone across his body with an acetylene welding torch. But look at electricity "positively!"

Think how much better things are now when you can work all night long and keep a plant running twenty-four hours a day. Look how this has helped anti-pollution and conservation of "energy." And think how much better it is to wait six to eight hours after the sun has gone down before going to bed and then paying \$100.00 a month to cook your toast, wash your clothes, dry your hair, fry your bacon, argue with the telephone operator, carve your turkey, sue the power company, beat your eggs, and scratch your back. And what would we do without dead batteries, blown fuses, busted light switches, headlights that go out, tail lights that don't work, backup lights that don't shine, radios that short-circuit your ignition, telephone companies that double your rates every five years, light bulbs that last two months, and flashlights for "emergencies" that go dead every time an emergency shows up? And if you are going to tell the whole truth about it, why not point out the beautiful destructive properties of radio pulse, echo techniques, Loran, electronic jamming, proximity fuses, electrical predictors, gyroscope lead computing devices, electronic computers, peizoelectric effects on quartz crystal, radio sonobuoys, homing torpedoes, guided missiles, and atomic fission---all made possible through "man's vast researches into electricity by the inductive scientific method!"

Don't kid us. Men died in their twenties, thirties, forties, and fifties in the seventeenth and eighteenth century; they still do. There have been as many men in America (between twenty and fifty) killed on the highway since 1920 as there were men (between twenty and fifty) who died of pneumonia and TB between 1800 and 1850. Don't kid us; kid your head-shrink. You live longer now because you pay a bigger hospital bill for it. Half the gadgets they treat you with work on ELECTRICITY. Don't kid us. If you can harness the lightning and make it run and say, ["Here we are"]{.class_3760} (vs. 35), you are to be commended for getting one question out of thirty-one correct. "Progress" was not a point in question.

38:36 Who hath put wisdom in the inward parts? or who hath given understanding to the heart?

37 Who can number the clouds in wisdom? or who can stay the bottles of heaven,

38 When the dust groweth into hardness, and the clods cleave fast together?

39 Wilt thou hunt the prey for the lion? or fill the appetite of the young lions,

40 When they couch in their dens, and abide in the covert to lie in wait?

41 Who provideth for the raven his food? when his young ones cry unto God, they wander for lack of meat.

32\. ["Who hath put wisdom in the inward parts\... understanding to the heart?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 36). Well, mother nature didn't, and Darwin didn't, and you didn't, and evolution didn't, and education has never done much more than make a smart crook out of a dumb one. [Wisdom ]{.class_3759}is knowing how to use what you know, and [understanding ]{.class_3759}is knowing how it is related to God (see 28:28). Wisdom goes to the inward parts of animals while understanding (see Prov. 1:2, 5 and comments) goes to the heart of man. Where God deprives an animal of wisdom (see Job 39:17), a disaster follows, and where God deprives a man of understanding (Prov. 6:32), a disaster follows. Neither education, talent, training, religion, science, or sacraments can supply these essential ingredients. Illustrations (from nature) about the imparted wisdom found in the animal creation would take ten text books of 800 pages each to document. Spiders "instinctively" know how to construct webs, fish "instinctively" know when and where to lay eggs, birds "instinctively" know where to fly and where to land, sick animals know "instinctively" what to chew on and where to hide out, and the activity of BEES and ANTS is of such a nature that man has to be half insane to observe them and come to the conclusion that "instinct" is anything but IMPARTED WISDOM.

33\. ["Who can number the clouds in wisdom?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 37). Nobody. You can't even number the stars (Jer. 31:35), but God has them all numbered and named (Psa. 147:4). The stars are fairly stationary compared to the clouds, and many of them are visible in fixed positions for many nights at a time. With clouds it is otherwise; they form and disintegrate in a matter of minutes or hours. Some of them move swiftly, some sit like a ball of cotton in the air for fifteen minutes without moving a hundred yards, some of them pile up to 50,000 feet, while others evaporate as they are forming, some of the cloud banks cover 3,000,000 square miles, and sometimes they come three and four layers thick. Nobody can "number the clouds" but God, for by the time you calculated the number of the clouds, the number would have changed. The only way you could "number" them would be by having automatic arithmetical computers, operating by radar and laser, set up to cover every square mile of land on the surface of the earth: They would all have to report to a central control station within two minutes, and they would have to be able to report the separate clouds that make up a thunderhead and the number of clouds in the layers above the cloud immediately over the path of the radar. Don't try it; it won't work.

34\. ["Who can stay the bottles of heaven\...and the clods cleave fast together?"]{.class_3760} (vss. 37--38). Nobody, because at the end of a three and a half year drought, it is going to pour rain (Hos. 6:3; Prov. 16:15; Psa. 68:9; 1 Kings 18:44--45) after it has rained "cats and dogs and\...babies" (Psa. 11:6; Exod. 9:34; Luke 17:29; and Song. of Sol. 2:11). You see the ["bottles of heaven"]{.class_3760} (vs. 37) were real bottles (Rev. 16:1--10), and when "it rains, it POURS!"

35\. Last question in this chapter, Job. ["Wilt thou hunt the prey for the lion\...provideth for the raven his food?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 39--41). No, you won't. From the king of beasts to the avenger of the birds, God is in charge. The young lions (vs. 39) cannot rush and leap on the prey yet, so they ["crouch in their dens, and abide in the covert to lie in wait"]{.class_3760} (vs. 40). If God doesn't send a meal by their hiding place, they go hungry. And from the very first time that the law of "tooth and claw" was given (Gen. 9:3), until the lion and leopard "lie down" with the calf and the ox (Isa. 11:3--9), the rule in nature is "dog eat dog." Some other animal is the prey. As beautiful as she is, and as full of displays of God's power and glory as she is "mother nature" is like a weeping bride, standing alone at an altar, waiting for a marriage that has not yet been consummated (literally, you rascal: Look at Hosea 2:19. You can't reject that exposition just because you don't know enough about God's word to think clearly.).

The ravens ["cry unto God"]{.class_3760} (vs. 41) for the corn and scraps, and God feeds them according to Matthew 6:26.

[]{#IMh58iSMTFKKU0J9qyaeHw3344.xhtml}

CHAPTER 39

39:1 Knowest thou the time when the wild goats of the rock bring forth? or canst thou mark when the hinds do calve?

2 Canst thou number the months that they fulfil? or knowest thou the time when they bring forth?

3 They bow themselves, they bring forth their young ones, they cast out their sorrows.

4 Their young ones are in good liking, they grow up with corn; they go forth, and return not unto them.

Having gone from the king of the beasts to the scavenger of the birds, the Lord now reviews things from the scavenger of the beasts (vs. 1) to the king of the birds (vs. 27). There are ten animals listed in this chapter. Counting the two already mentioned (the lion and the raven) in the previous chapter and the two in Chapters 40--41, there are 14 "beasts" listed: However, two of these are plainly SPIRITUAL beings similar to the "beasts" of Revelation 4:7 and Ezekiel 1:10. On goes the questioning, but we will no longer list the questions by number, for it is apparent by now that the average college graduate in America could not possibly get half of them right. If he got ten out of the first thirty-five, he could consider himself a genius; nobody bats .300 when God starts asking the questions: See for example Mark 2:9, 25; 3:4, 23; 7:18, 19, and 8:18.

"[Knowest thou the time\...?"]{.class_3760} (vs. 1). All the follows shows that Job is being asked about the gestation periods for wild goats and hinds (vs. 2). If you asked the first 5,000 college graduates (in Europe or America) this question tomorrow, you would do good to get fifty answers right: One out of 100 would be an excellent response, if you could get it. Ordinary goats run about 147 to 155 days; ewes run about 145 to 152, while the large animals (mares, cows, asses) run anywhere from 279 to 372 days. The wild goats and ["hinds"]{.class_3762} bow themselves when ["they bring forth their young ones"]{.class_3762} (vs. 3), and they ["cast out their sorrows"]{.class_3762} in the sense of Genesis 3:16, where the human species brings forth children ["in sorrow."]{.class_3762} They are relieved from their burden and the pain, when the "young one" is brought forth. (Observe "young un" and "you UNS" in the Southland, compared with the German "unser" and "uns." The German words mean "our," so it has been used for a plural in the old Southland dialect: "We uns don't look at it that way.")

"[They grow up\...go forth\...return not\..."]{.class_3760} (vs. 4). This refers to the fact that the offspring of wild animals learn how to "make it on their own" after awhile, and they go out and set up their own "families."

39:5 "Who hath sent out the wild ass free? or who hath loosed the bands of the wild ass?

6 Whose house I have made the wilderness, and the barren land his dwellings.

7 He scorneth the multitude of the city, neither regardeth he the crying of the driver.

8 The range of the mountains is his pasture, and he searcheth after every green thing.

We have commented on the wild ass before, under Exodus 13:13 and Job 11:12, which see. Wild asses are still found in South Tartary, Persia, Syria, and the islands of the Archipelago. Some of them still run in the deserts of Libya and Numidia, although civilization (since 1918) has cut into their ranks considerably. At the time God speaks to Job, there are herds of wild asses in Syria and Arabia and North Africa. Now the wild ass not only runs without a bridle (["who hath loosed the bands"]{.class_3760}), but his nature is so uncontrollable that you cannot break him in until he has been ridden. Verses 6 and 7 are self-explanatory, and any "mule skinner" who has had to handle the fifteen to twenty foot whip can testify that the wild ass REGARDETH NOT ["the crying of the driver"]{.class_3760} (vs. 7). Stories are numerous.

A Yankee wants to know why a southern Darky is hitting a mule in the face with a two-by-four to get him to pull a cart. "Well, fust," says the dark one, "you gots to get his attenchun!" A Yankee, appalled at the beating a Negro is giving a stubborn mule, says to him, "I say, my good man, don't beat him like that! Talk to him." Whereupon the Negro goes up to the head of the beast, and leaning on a lamppost by the curb says, "My name's Willie Roosevelt, what's yours?"

"Stubborn as a mule" (see Prov. 26:9 and comments) is as proverbial as "clear as crystal" or "hot as fire." One farmer finally builds a fire under a mule who refuses to pull a load; the mule takes five steps forward and stops again, and the fire burns up the wagon and its load. The old "twenty mule teams" took a driver with an arm like a jackhammer and a vocabulary like a thirty-year Navy man. One of those old mule skinners (1880) got converted: The week following his public profession, a crowd gathered to see him start a balky team. They were betting odds of five to one that the "old words" would come out of his mouth before he got the team in motion. After ten minutes of hollering "Giddap!" and two minutes of enraged silence, the Christian team driver suddenly bawled: "Alleluia! Alleluia!", and a team accustomed to "%&\*?%\*!!" began to move.

The classic illustration is where a preacher in Colorado buys him a "religious horse" that has been taught to stop on "Alleluia" and go on "Praise the Lord." On the first trial run up the mountain things go fairly well, although the preacher says "Whoa" and "Giddap" several times before getting the hang of the thing. About half way up a 1,000 foot ledge, the horse shied at a snake and galloped madly toward the rim of a cliff. In vain the preacher hollered: "Whoa, there boy, stop! WHOAA!" Within a foot of the precipice, the preacher suddenly remembered and hollered, "Alleluia!!" The horse stopped dead in his tracks. The preacher mopped his brow and said gratefully, "Praise the Lord!"

(Verse 8 is self-explanatory.)

39:9 Will the unicorn be willing to serve thee, or abide by thy crib?

10 Canst thou bind the unicorn with his band in the furrow? or will he harrow the valleys after thee?

11 Wilt thou trust him, because his strength is great? or wilt thou leave thy labour to him?

12 Wilt thou believe him, that he will bring home thy seed, and gather it into thy barn?

Now, the animal in question has a "single horn" (["unicorn,"]{.class_3760} vs. 9) which is probably a reference to something [like ]{.class_3759}a rhinoceros; however, before confining the horse-like animal of legend (with the long curled horn on his forehead) to the coats of arms and armory in Europe, let us "look well to our going." For a moment, let us stop over here where we left these Devonian, Silurian, Cretaceous, Jurassic, Oligocene, Eocene, Miocene, and Carboniferous Crackerheads, and see if they could be credulous enough to believe in a [real ]{.class_3759}["unicorn."]{.class_3760}

Here is old ["Notharctus"]{.class_3759} with a racoon's tail and a rat's head, mounted on a monkey's body with a lemur's feet. Here is good old ["uintatherium" ]{.class_3759}with elephants' feet, a rhinoceros' body (rhinoceri? rhinoceroses? rhinocerisis?), and a lion's tail. But we are told that the most striking thing about the Uintatherium was "its SIX HORNED skull, with two horns on the end of the nose." Now, if you are dupe enough to believe in that animal on the basis of a cartoon picture drawn by a dialectical materialist, how is it you have so much trouble with a ["unicorn"]{.class_3760}? But believe you me, ["Uinthaterium"]{.class_3759} was a conservative character alongside good ol' "Syndyoceras." "Syndyoceras" (Cindy-circus?) has two thin goat horns above his eyes and then a Y-shaped horn on the end of his nose. And if you are still not amused, try good ol' Tainilabis or Ctenacodon or Zalabmdalestes or Ptiolodus or Solenodon. Or if that isn't good enough to qualify for Disneyland, try Barlambda, Corphodon, Phenacondus, and Tetracaenodon. If the TV tube blows or you get snowed in (some winters), I'll guarantee you that Dinicuts, Hoplophoneus, Patriofelis, Brontotheirium, Oredonts, Illingocerus, Prosynthetoceras, Moropus, Teleocerus, and Megatherium are as good as any cartoons in [Mad Magazine ]{.class_3759}or [Cracked Magazine]{.class_3759}: same crowd.

Now you understand that we are to "respect" the "brilliant scholarship" or the "unquestioned scholarship" or the "erudite scholarship" of these poor, deluded fanatics (Rom. 1:2--23), and at the same time we are to pretend that a horse never lived with a spike on his snoot! [Now think about that eight or nine years]{.class_3759}. Let it sink in good.

Here are a bunch of blind, Bible- rejecting fools who think that the monstrosities in nature, produced by [radioactive bombardment ]{.class_3759}from outer space (or [disarranged genes]{.class_3759}, or [volcanic activity ]{.class_3759}on the earth) are proof that whole races of "missing link" animals and missing link men lived between 1,000,000 to 600,000,000 years ago. The foundation of modern science is the [fossil remains of a destroyed creation ]{.class_3759}(Gen. 1:1, 6--8) [which rejected the preached word of God]{.class_3759} (2 Pet. 2:5). Ape-men and men-apes (as weasel-dogs, cat-bears, and deer-goats) only prove that the genes, chromosomes, and cell structures of scores of creatures were radically affected by beastiality and atmospheric changes in "the days of Noah."

Why would we find giant MEN on the earth (["In those days,"]{.class_3760} Gen. 6) and not find giant sloths, giant tigers, giant sharks, giant bears, and giant buffaloes? The ["sons of God"]{.class_3760} could handle the forces of energy (Dan. 11:38), for they were present on creation's morning (Job 38:4, 7), and they could produce any number of permutations which would be found later by monkey-men looking for a monkey ancestry. You can make a monkey out of any unsaved man if you just wave a few words in front of his face like Cryptozoic, Precambrian, Permian, Triassic, Mesozoic, Paleozoic, Pleistocene, Triceratops, and Prosynthetoceres. Unsaved men (as Eve) think such a vocabulary comes from superior knowledge. But any fool can make up a list if he knows a little Latin and Greek, and if he runs out of Latin and Greek, he can always use German or Japanese. The following list of "pre-historic" animals is just as "authentic" and "reliable" as the last ten lists you studied in the textbooks published for Columbia University.

1\. [Gehendondecobisa]{.class_3759}: German-Spanish-Pampangan for "He goes where I don't like it."
